    1\u2192#include \\\"ext_authz.h\\\"\\n     2\u2192#include \\\"source/extensions/filters/http/ext_authz/ext_authz.h\\\"\\n     3\u2192\\n     4\u2192#include <chrono>\\n     5\u2192#include <optional>\\n     6\u2192#include <string>\\n     7\u2192#include <vector>\\n     8\u2192\\n     9\u2192#include \\\"envoy/config/core/v3/base.pb.h\\\"\\n    10\u2192\\n    11\u2192#include \\\"source/common/common/assert.h\\\"\\n    12\u2192#include \\\"source/common/common/enum_to_int.h\\\"\\n    13\u2192#include \\\"source/common/common/matchers.h\\\"\\n    14\u2192#include \\\"source/common/http/utility.h\\\"\\n    15\u2192#include \\\"source/common/router/config_impl.h\\\"\\n    16\u2192\\n    17\u2192namespace Envoy {\\n    18\u2192namespace Extensions {\\n    19\u2192namespace HttpFilters {\\n    20\u2192namespace ExtAuthz {\\n    21\u2192\\n    22\u2192namespace {\\n    23\u2192\\n    24\u2192using MetadataProto = ::envoy::config::core::v3::Metadata;\\n    25\u2192using Filters::Common::MutationRules::CheckOperation;\\n    26\u2192using Filters::Common::MutationRules::CheckResult;\\n    27\u2192\\n    28\u2192void fillMetadataContext(const std::vector<const MetadataProto*>& source_metadata,\\n    29\u2192                         const std::vector<std::string>& metadata_context_namespaces,\\n    30\u2192                         const std::vector<std::string>& typed_metadata_context_namespaces,\\n    31\u2192                         MetadataProto& metadata_context) {\\n    32\u2192  for (const auto& context_key : metadata_context_namespaces) {\\n    33\u2192    for (const MetadataProto* metadata : source_metadata) {\\n    34\u2192      if (metadata == nullptr) {\\n    35\u2192        continue;\\n    36\u2192      }\\n    37\u2192      const auto& filter_metadata = metadata->filter_metadata();\\n    38\u2192      if (const auto metadata_it = filter_metadata.find(context_key);\\n    39\u2192          metadata_it != filter_metadata.end()) {\\n    40\u2192        (*metadata_context.mutable_filter_metadata())[metadata_it->first] = metadata_it->second;\\n    41\u2192        break;\\n    42\u2192      }\\n    43\u2192    }\\n    44\u2192  }\\n    45\u2192\\n    46\u2192  for (const auto& context_key : typed_metadata_context_namespaces) {\\n    47\u2192    for (const MetadataProto* metadata : source_metadata) {\\n    48\u2192      if (metadata == nullptr) {\\n    49\u2192        continue;\\n    50\u2192      }\\n    51\u2192      const auto& typed_filter_metadata = metadata->typed_filter_metadata();\\n    52\u2192      if (const auto metadata_it = typed_filter_metadata.find(context_key);\\n    53\u2192          metadata_it != typed_filter_metadata.end()) {\\n    54\u2192        (*metadata_context.mutable_typed_filter_metadata())[metadata_it->first] =\\n    55\u2192            metadata_it->second;\\n    56\u2192        break;\\n    57\u2192      }\\n    58\u2192    }\\n    59\u2192  }\\n    60\u2192}\\n    61\u2192\\n    62\u2192} // namespace\\n    63\u2192\\n    64\u2192FilterConfig::FilterConfig(const envoy::extensions::filters::http::ext_authz::v3::ExtAuthz& config,\\n    65\u2192                           Stats::Scope& scope, const std::string& stats_prefix,\\n    66\u2192                           Server::Configuration::ServerFactoryContext& factory_context)\\n    67\u2192    : allow_partial_message_(config.with_request_body().allow_partial_message()),\\n    68\u2192      failure_mode_allow_(config.failure_mode_allow()),\\n    69\u2192      failure_mode_allow_header_add_(config.failure_mode_allow_header_add()),\\n    70\u2192      clear_route_cache_(config.clear_route_cache()),\\n    71\u2192      max_request_bytes_(config.with_request_body().max_request_bytes()),\\n    72\u2192\\n    73\u2192      // `pack_as_bytes_` should be true when configured with the HTTP service because there is no\\n    74\u2192      // difference to where the body is written in http requests, and a value of false here will\\n    75\u2192      // cause non UTF-8 body content to be changed when it doesn't need to.\\n    76\u2192      pack_as_bytes_(config.has_http_service() || config.with_request_body().pack_as_bytes()),\\n    77\u2192\\n    78\u2192      encode_raw_headers_(config.encode_raw_headers()),\\n    79\u2192\\n    80\u2192      status_on_error_(toErrorCode(config.status_on_error().code())),\\n    81\u2192      validate_mutations_(config.validate_mutations()), scope_(scope),\\n    82\u2192      decoder_header_mutation_checker_(\\n    83\u2192          config.has_decoder_header_mutation_rules()\\n    84\u2192              ? absl::optional<Filters::Common::MutationRules::Checker>(\\n    85\u2192                    Filters::Common::MutationRules::Checker(config.decoder_header_mutation_rules(),\\n    86\u2192                                                            factory_context.regexEngine()))\\n    87\u2192              : absl::nullopt),\\n    88\u2192      enable_dynamic_metadata_ingestion_(\\n    89\u2192          PROTOBUF_GET_WRAPPED_OR_DEFAULT(config, enable_dynamic_metadata_ingestion, true)),\\n    90\u2192      runtime_(factory_context.runtime()), http_context_(factory_context.httpContext()),\\n    91\u2192      filter_metadata_(config.has_filter_metadata() ? absl::optional(config.filter_metadata())\\n    92\u2192                                                    : absl::nullopt),\\n    93\u2192      emit_filter_state_stats_(config.emit_filter_state_stats()),\\n    94\u2192      filter_enabled_(config.has_filter_enabled()\\n    95\u2192                          ? absl::optional<Runtime::FractionalPercent>(\\n    96\u2192                                Runtime::FractionalPercent(config.filter_enabled(), runtime_))\\n    97\u2192                          : absl::nullopt),\\n    98\u2192      filter_enabled_metadata_(\\n    99\u2192          config.has_filter_enabled_metadata()\\n   100\u2192              ? absl::optional<Matchers::MetadataMatcher>(\"}]},\"uuid\":\"681ff18c-3f6b-452a-9f47-551271f04632\",\"timestamp\":\"2026-02-18T03:32:44.993Z\",\"sourceToolAssistantUUID\":\"d971f7b4-e37d-4919-bfda-deeb1b19565f\"}\n{\"parentUuid\":\"681ff18c-3f6b-452a-9f47-551271f04632\",\"isSidechain\":true,\"userType\":\"external\",\"cwd\":\"/workspace\",\"sessionId\":\"6e5abf8f-0611-4d50-82c4-ab3bbf4bccd5\",\"version\":\"2.1.45\",\"gitBranch\":\"HEAD\",\"agentId\":\"ac84c83\",\"slug\":\"bright-moseying-sprout\",\"message\":{\"model\":\"claude-haiku-4-5-20251001\",\"id\":\"msg_01UpnM4RTGkuHoGtMjfXg1gf\",\"type\":\"message\",\"role\":\"assistant\",\"content\":[{\"type\":\"tool_use\",\"id\":\"toolu_01VWTLL8cSd5TiMotGpNNiEF\",\"name\":\"Read\",\"input\":{\"file_path\":\"/workspace/api/envoy/service/auth/v3/external_auth.proto\",\"limit\":80},\"caller\":{\"type\":\"direct\"}}],\"stop_reason\":null,\"stop_sequence\":null,\"usage\":{\"input_tokens\":6,\"cache_creation_input_tokens\":7505,\"cache_read_input_tokens\":30269,\"cache_creation\":{\"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens\":0,\"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens\":7505},\"output_tokens\":1,\"service_tier\":\"standard\",\"inference_geo\":\"not_available\"}},\"requestId\":\"req_011CYEq6weEBVTr3JojFF1TA\",\"type\":\"assistant\",\"uuid\":\"e92937d7-cac3-4a66-801c-48cae5a0ac26\",\"timestamp\":\"2026-02-18T03:32:45.338Z\"}\n{\"parentUuid\":\"e92937d7-cac3-4a66-801c-48cae5a0ac26\",\"isSidechain\":true,\"userType\":\"external\",\"cwd\":\"/workspace\",\"sessionId\":\"6e5abf8f-0611-4d50-82c4-ab3bbf4bccd5\",\"version\":\"2.1.45\",\"gitBranch\":\"HEAD\",\"agentId\":\"ac84c83\",\"slug\":\"bright-moseying-sprout\",\"type\":\"progress\",\"data\":{\"type\":\"hook_progress\",\"hookEvent\":\"PostToolUse\",\"hookName\":\"PostToolUse:Read\",\"command\":\"callback\"},\"parentToolUseID\":\"toolu_01VWTLL8cSd5TiMotGpNNiEF\",\"toolUseID\":\"toolu_01VWTLL8cSd5TiMotGpNNiEF\",\"timestamp\":\"2026-02-18T03:32:45.340Z\",\"uuid\":\"e58ac74a-d0f4-4ad9-b3d1-8af131a7d507\"}\n{\"parentUuid\":\"e92937d7-cac3-4a66-801c-48cae5a0ac26\",\"isSidechain\":true,\"userType\":\"external\",\"cwd\":\"/workspace\",\"sessionId\":\"6e5abf8f-0611-4d50-82c4-ab3bbf4bccd5\",\"version\":\"2.1.45\",\"gitBranch\":\"HEAD\",\"agentId\":\"ac84c83\",\"slug\":\"bright-moseying-sprout\",\"type\":\"user\",\"message\":{\"role\":\"user\",\"content\":[{\"tool_use_id\":\"toolu_01VWTLL8cSd5TiMotGpNNiEF\",\"type\":\"tool_result\",\"content\":\"     1\u2192syntax = \\\"proto3\\\";\\n     2\u2192\\n     3\u2192package envoy.service.auth.v3;\\n     4\u2192\\n     5\u2192import \\\"envoy/config/core/v3/base.proto\\\";\\n     6\u2192import \\\"envoy/service/auth/v3/attribute_context.proto\\\";\\n     7\u2192import \\\"envoy/type/v3/http_status.proto\\\";\\n     8\u2192\\n     9\u2192import \\\"google/protobuf/struct.proto\\\";\\n    10\u2192import \\\"google/rpc/status.proto\\\";\\n    11\u2192\\n    12\u2192import \\\"envoy/annotations/deprecation.proto\\\";\\n    13\u2192import \\\"udpa/annotations/status.proto\\\";\\n    14\u2192import \\\"udpa/annotations/versioning.proto\\\";\\n    15\u2192\\n    16\u2192option java_package = \\\"io.envoyproxy.envoy.service.auth.v3\\\";\\n    17\u2192option java_outer_classname = \\\"ExternalAuthProto\\\";\\n    18\u2192option java_multiple_files = true;\\n    19\u2192option go_package = \\\"github.com/envoyproxy/go-control-plane/envoy/service/auth/v3;authv3\\\";\\n    20\u2192option (udpa.annotations.file_status).package_version_status = ACTIVE;\\n    21\u2192\\n    22\u2192// [#protodoc-title: Authorization service]\\n    23\u2192\\n    24\u2192// The authorization service request messages used by external authorization :ref:`network filter\\n    25\u2192// <config_network_filters_ext_authz>` and :ref:`HTTP filter <config_http_filters_ext_authz>`.\\n    26\u2192\\n    27\u2192// A generic interface for performing authorization check on incoming\\n    28\u2192// requests to a networked service.\\n    29\u2192service Authorization {\\n    30\u2192  // Performs authorization check based on the attributes associated with the\\n    31\u2192  // incoming request, and returns status `OK` or not `OK`.\\n    32\u2192  rpc Check(CheckRequest) returns (CheckResponse) {\\n    33\u2192  }\\n    34\u2192}\\n    35\u2192\\n    36\u2192message CheckRequest {\\n    37\u2192  option (udpa.annotations.versioning).previous_message_type = \\\"envoy.service.auth.v2.CheckRequest\\\";\\n    38\u2192\\n    39\u2192  // The request attributes.\\n    40\u2192  AttributeContext attributes = 1;\\n    41\u2192}\\n    42\u2192\\n    43\u2192// HTTP attributes for a denied response.\\n    44\u2192message DeniedHttpResponse {\\n    45\u2192  option (udpa.annotations.versioning).previous_message_type =\\n    46\u2192      \\\"envoy.service.auth.v2.DeniedHttpResponse\\\";\\n    47\u2192\\n    48\u2192  // This field allows the authorization service to send an HTTP response status code to the\\n    49\u2192  // downstream client. If not set, Envoy sends ``403 Forbidden`` HTTP status code by default.\\n    50\u2192  type.v3.HttpStatus status = 1;\\n    51\u2192\\n    52\u2192  // This field allows the authorization service to send HTTP response headers\\n    53\u2192  // to the downstream client. Note that the :ref:`append field in HeaderValueOption <envoy_v3_api_field_config.core.v3.HeaderValueOption.append>` defaults to\\n    54\u2192  // false when used in this message.\\n    55\u2192  repeated config.core.v3.HeaderValueOption headers = 2;\\n    56\u2192\\n    57\u2192  // This field allows the authorization service to send a response body data\\n    58\u2192  // to the downstream client.\\n    59\u2192  string body = 3;\\n    60\u2192}\\n    61\u2192\\n    62\u2192// HTTP attributes for an OK response.\\n    63\u2192// [#next-free-field: 9]\\n    64\u2192message OkHttpResponse {\\n    65\u2192  option (udpa.annotations.versioning).previous_message_type =\\n    66\u2192      \\\"envoy.service.auth.v2.OkHttpResponse\\\";\\n    67\u2192\\n    68\u2192  // HTTP entity headers in addition to the original request headers. This allows the authorization\\n    69\u2192  // service to append, to add or to override headers from the original request before\\n    70\u2192  // dispatching it to the upstream. Note that the :ref:`append field in HeaderValueOption <envoy_v3_api_field_config.core.v3.HeaderValueOption.append>` defaults to\\n    71\u2192  // false when used in this message. By setting the ``append`` field to ``true``,\\n    72\u2192  // the filter will append the correspondent header value to the matched request header.\\n    73\u2192  // By leaving ``append`` as false, the filter will either add a new header, or override an existing\\n    74\u2192  // one if there is a match.\\n    75\u2192  repeated config.core.v3.HeaderValueOption headers = 2;\\n    76\u2192\\n    77\u2192  // HTTP entity headers to remove from the original request before dispatching\\n    78\u2192  // it to the upstream. This allows the authorization service to act on auth\\n    79\u2192  // related headers (like ``Authorization``), process them, and consume them.\\n    80\u2192  // Under this model, the upstream will either receive the request (if    80\u2192  // Under this model, the upstream will either receive the request (if it's\\n    81\u2192  // authorized) or not receive it (if it's not), but will not see headers\\n    82\u2192  // containing authorization credentials.\\n    83\u2192  //\\n    84\u2192  // Pseudo headers (such as ``:authority``, ``:method``, ``:path`` etc), as well as\\n    85\u2192  // the header ``Host``, may not be removed as that would make the request\\n    86\u2192  // malformed. If mentioned in ``headers_to_remove`` these special headers will\\n    87\u2192  // be ignored.\\n    88\u2192  //\\n    89\u2192  // When using the HTTP service this must instead be set by the HTTP\\n    90\u2192  // authorization service as a comma separated list like so:\\n    91\u2192  // ``x-envoy-auth-headers-to-remove: one-auth-header, another-auth-header``.\\n    92\u2192  repeated string headers_to_remove = 5;\\n    93\u2192\\n    94\u2192  // This field has been deprecated in favor of :ref:`CheckResponse.dynamic_metadata\\n    95\u2192  // <envoy_v3_api_field_service.auth.v3.CheckResponse.dynamic_metadata>`. Until it is removed,\\n    96\u2192  // setting this field overrides :ref:`CheckResponse.dynamic_metadata\\n    97\u2192  // <envoy_v3_api_field_service.auth.v3.CheckResponse.dynamic_metadata>`.\\n    98\u2192  google.protobuf.Struct dynamic_metadata = 3\\n    99\u2192      [deprecated = true, (envoy.annotations.deprecated_at_minor_version) = \\\"3.0\\\"];\\n   100\u2192\\n   101\u2192  // This field allows the authorization service to send HTTP response headers\\n   102\u2192  // to the downstream client on success. Note that the :ref:`append field in HeaderValueOption <envoy_v3_api_field_config.core.v3.HeaderValueOption.append>`\\n   103\u2192  // defaults to false when used in this message.\\n   104\u2192  repeated config.core.v3.HeaderValueOption response_headers_to_add = 6;\\n   105\u2192\\n   106\u2192  // This field allows the authorization service to set (and overwrite) query\\n   107\u2192  // string parameters on the original request before it is sent upstream.\\n   108\u2192  repeated config.core.v3.QueryParameter query_parameters_to_set = 7;\\n   109\u2192\\n   110\u2192  // This field allows the authorization service to specify which query parameters\\n   111\u2192  // should be removed from the original request before it is sent upstream. Each\\n   112\u2192  // element in this list is a case-sensitive query parameter name to be removed.\\n   113\u2192  repeated string query_parameters_to_remove = 8;\\n   114\u2192}\\n   115\u2192\\n   116\u2192// Intended for gRPC and Network Authorization servers ``only``.\\n   117\u2192message CheckResponse {\\n   118\u2192  option (udpa.annotations.versioning).previous_message_type =\\n   119\u2192      \\\"envoy.service.auth.v2.CheckResponse\\\";\\n   120\u2192\\n   121\u2192  // Status ``OK`` allows the request. Any other status indicates the request should be denied, and\\n   122\u2192  // for HTTP filter, if not overridden by :ref:`denied HTTP response status <envoy_v3_api_field_service.auth.v3.DeniedHttpResponse.status>`\\n   123\u2192  // Envoy sends ``403 Forbidden`` HTTP status code by default.\\n   124\u2192  google.rpc.Status status = 1;\\n   125\u2192\\n   126\u2192  // An message that contains HTTP response attributes. This message is\\n   127\u2192  // used when the authorization service needs to send custom responses to the\\n   128\u2192  // downstream client or, to modify/add request headers being dispatched to the upstream.\\n   129\u2192  oneof http_response {\\n   130\u2192    // Supplies http attributes for a denied response.\\n   131\u2192    DeniedHttpResponse denied_response = 2;\\n   132\u2192\\n   133\u2192    // Supplies http attributes for an ok response.\\n   134\u2192    OkHttpResponse ok_response = 3;\\n   135\u2192  }\\n   136\u2192\\n   137\u2192  // Optional response metadata that will be emitted as dynamic metadata to be consumed by the next\\n   138\u2192  // filter. This metadata lives in a namespace specified by the canonical name of extension filter\\n   139\u2192  // that requires it:\\n   140\u2192  //\\n   141\u2192  // - :ref:`envoy.filters.http.ext_authz <config_http_filters_ext_authz_dynamic_metadata>` for HTTP filter.\\n   142\u2192  // - :ref:`envoy.filters.network.ext_authz <config_network_filters_ext_authz_dynamic_metadata>` for network filter.\\n   143\u2192  google.protobuf.Struct dynamic_metadata = 4;\\n   144\u2192}\\n {\\n    22\u2192namespace Common {\\n    23\u2192namespace ExtAuthz {\\n    24\u2192\\n    25\u2192namespace {\\n    26\u2192\\n    27\u2192// Static header map used for creating authorization requests.\\n    28\u2192const Http::HeaderMap& lengthZeroHeader() {\\n    29\u2192  static const auto headers = Http::createHeaderMap<Http::RequestHeaderMapImpl>(\\n    30\u2192      {{Http::Headers::get().ContentLength, std::to_string(0)}});\\n    31\u2192  return *headers;\\n    32\u2192}\\n    33\u2192\\n    34\u2192// Static response used for creating authorization ERROR responses.\\n    35\u2192const Response& errorResponse() {\\n    36\u2192  CONSTRUCT_ON_FIRST_USE(Response, Response{CheckStatus::Error,\\n    37\u2192                                            UnsafeHeaderVector{},\\n    38\u2192                                            UnsafeHeaderVector{},\\n    39\u2192                                            UnsafeHeaderVector{},\\n    40\u2192 48\u2192                                            Http::Code::Forbidden,\\n    49\u2192                                            ProtobufWkt::Struct{}});\\n    50\u2192}\\n    51\u2192\\n    52\u2192// SuccessResponse used for creating either DENIED or OK authorization responses.\\n    53\u2192struct SuccessResponse {\\n    54\u2192  SuccessResponse(const Http::HeaderMap& headers, const MatcherSharedPtr& matchers,\\n    55\u2192                  const MatcherSharedPtr& append_matchers,\\n    56\u2192                  const MatcherSharedPtr& response_matchers,\\n    57\u2192                  const MatcherSharedPtr& dynamic_metadata_matchers, Response&& response)\\n    58\u2192      : headers_(headers), matchers_(matchers), append_matchers_(append_matchers),\\n    59\u2192        response_matchers_(response_matchers),\\n    60\u2192        to_dynamic_metadata_matchers_(dynamic_metadata_matchers),\\n    61\u2192        response_(std::make_unique<Response>(response)) {\\n    62\u2192    headers_.iterate([this](const Http::HeaderEntry& header) -> Http::HeaderMap::Iterate {\\n    63\u2192      // UpstreamHeaderMatcher\\n    64\u2192      if (matchers_->matches(header.key().getStringView())) {\\n    65\u2192        response_->headers_to_set.emplace_back(header.key().getStringView(),\\n    66\u2192                                               header.value().getStringView());\\n    67\u2192      }\\n    68\u2192      if (append_matchers_->matches(header.key().getStringView())) {\\n    69\u2192        // If there is an existing matching key in the current headers, the new entry will be\\n    70\u2192        // appended with the same key. For example, given {\\\"key\\\": \\\"value1\\\"} headers, if there is\\n    71\u2192        // a matching \\\"key\\\" from the authorization response headers {\\\"key\\\": \\\"value2\\\"}, the\\n    72\u2192        // request to upstream server will have two entries for \\\"key\\\": {\\\"key\\\": \\\"value1\\\", \\\"key\\\":\\n    73\u2192        // \\\"value2\\\"}.\\n    74\u2192        response_->headers_to_add.emplace_back(header.key().getStringView(),\\n    75\u2192                                               header.value().getStringView());\\n    76\u2192      }\\n    77\u2192      if (response_matchers_->matches(header.key().getStringView())) {\\n    78\u2192        // For HTTP implementation, the response headers from the auth server will, by default, be\\n    79\u2192        // appended (using addCopy) to the encoded response headers.\\n    80\u2192        response_->response_headers_to_add.emplace_back(header.key().getStringView(),\"}]},\"uuid\":\"b1a55a5a-3e7d-4f14-b143-8bd1f60de5e3\",\"timestamp\":\"2026-02-18T03:32:47.347Z\",\"sourceToolAssistantUUID\":\"83024615-ed47-42d2-8a0d-e6fa5a5336c7\"}\n{\"parentUuid\":\"b1a55a5a-3e7d-4f14-b143-8bd1f60de5e3\",\"isSidechain\":true,\"userType\":\"external\",\"cwd\":\"/workspace\",\"sessionId\":\"6e5abf8f-0611-4d50-82c4-ab3bbf4bccd5\",\"version\":\"2.1.45\",\"gitBranch\":\"HEAD\",\"agentId\":\"ac84c83\",\"slug\":\"bright-moseying-sprout\",\"message\":{\"model\":\"claude-haiku-4-5-20251001\",\"id\":\"msg_0185DVAXyEvA4CJRCdiJmSL1\",\"type\":\"message\",\"role\":\"assistant\",\"content\":[{\"type\":\"tool_use\",\"id\":\"toolu_01B13EYmzBDoLPDjyZPuwEJM\",\"name\":\"Read\",\"input\":{\"file_path\":\"/workspace/source/extensions/filters/common/ext_authz/ext_authz_grpc_impl.cc\",\"limit\":80},\"caller\":{\"type\":\"direct\"}}],\"stop_reason\":null,\"stop_sequence\":null,\"usage\":{\"input_tokens\":6,\"cache_creation_input_tokens\":6273,\"cache_read_input_tokens\":37774,\"cache_creation\":{\"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens\":0,\"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens\":6273},\"output_tokens\":3,\"service_tier\":\"standard\",\"inference_geo\":\"not_available\"}},\"requestId\":\"req_011CYEq76T43pHQaGPzF85PJ\",\"type\":\"assistant\",\"uuid\":\"38fd4d02-9b3c-4ccb-8d04-e25c3fc0f937\",\"timestamp\":\"2026-02-18T03:32:47.649Z\"}\n{\"parentUuid\":\"38fd4d02-9b3c-4ccb-8d04-e25c3fc0f937\",\"isSidechain\":true,\"userType\":\"external\",\"cwd\":\"/workspace\",\"sessionId\":\"6e5abf8f-0611-4d50-82c4-ab3bbf4bccd5\",\"version\":\"2.1.45\",\"gitBranch\":\"HEAD\",\"agentId\":\"ac84c83\",\"slug\":\"bright-moseying-sprout\",\"type\":\"progress\",\"data\":{\"type\":\"hook_progress\",\"hookEvent\":\"PostToolUse\",\"hookName\":\"PostToolUse:Read\",\"command\":\"callback\"},\"parentToolUseID\":\"toolu_01B13EYmzBDoLPDjyZPuwEJM\",\"toolUseID\":\"toolu_01B13EYmzBDoLPDjyZPuwEJM\",\"timestamp\":\"2026-02-18T03:32:47.652Z\",\"uuid\     1\u2192#include \\\"source/extensions/filters/common/ext_authz/ext_authz_grpc_impl.h\\\"\\n     2\u2192\\n     3\u2192#include \\\"envoy/config/core/v3/base.pb.h\\\"\\n     4\u2192#include \\\"envoy/service/auth/v3/external_auth.pb.h\\\"\\n     5\u2192\\n     6\u2192#include \\\"source/common/common/assert.h\\\"\\n     7\u2192#include \\\"source/common/grpc/async_client_impl.h\\\"\\n     8\u2192#include \\\"source/common/http/headers.h\\\"\\n     9\u2192#include \\\"source/common/http/utility.h\\\"\\n    10\u2192#include \\\"source/common/network/utility.h\\\"\\n    11\u2192#include \\\"source/common/protobuf/protobuf.h\\\"\\n    12\u2192\\n    13\u2192namespace Envoy {\\n    14\u2192namespace Extensions {\\n    15\u2192namespace Filters {\\n    16\u2192namespace Common {\\n    17\u2192namespace ExtAuthz {\\n    18\u2192\\n    19\u2192void copyHeaderFieldIntoResponse(\\n    20\u2192    ResponsePtr& response,\\n    21\u2192    const Protobuf::RepeatedPtrField<envoy::config::core::v3::HeaderValueOption>& headers) {\\n    22\u2192  for (const auto& header : headers) {\\n    23\u2192    if (header.append().value()) {\\n    24\u2192      response->headers_to_append.emplace_back(header.header().key(), header.header().value());\\n    25\u2192    } else {\\n    26\u2192      response->headers_to_set.emplace_back(header.header().key(), header.header().value());\\n    27\u2192    }\\n    28\u2192  }\\n    29\u2192}\\n    30\u2192\\n    31\u2192void copyOkResponseMutations(ResponsePtr& response,\\n    32\u2192                             const envoy::service::auth::v3::OkHttpResponse& ok_response) {\\n    33\u2192  copyHeaderFieldIntoResponse(response, ok_response.headers());\\n    34\u2192\\n    35\u2192  for (const auto& header : ok_response.response_headers_to_add()) {\\n    36\u2192    if (header.has_append()) {\\n    37\u2192      if (header.append().value()) {\\n    38\u2192        response->response_headers_to_add.emplace_back(header.header().key(),\\n    39\u2192                                                       header.header().value());\\n    40\u2192      } else {\\n    41\u2192        response->response_headers_to_set.emplace_back(header.header().key(),\\n    42\u2192                                                       header.header().value());\\n    43\u2192      }\\n    44\u2192    } else {\\n    45\u2192      switch (header.append_action()) {\\n    46\u2192        PANIC_ON_PROTO_ENUM_SENTINEL_VALUES;\\n    47\u2192      case Router::HeaderValueOption::APPEND_IF_EXISTS_OR_ADD:\\n    48\u2192        response->response_headers_to_add.emplace_back(header.header().key(),\\n    49\u2192                                                       header.header().value());\\n    50\u2192        break;\\n    51\u2192      case Router::HeaderValueOption::ADD_IF_ABSENT:\\n    52\u2192        response->response_headers_to_add_if_absent.emplace_back(header.header().key(),\\n    53\u2192                                                                 header.header().value());\\n    54\u2192        break;\\n    55\u2192      case Router::HeaderValueOption::OVERWRITE_IF_EXISTS:\\n    56\u2192        response->response_headers_to_overwrite_if_exists.emplace_back(header.header().key(),\\n    57\u2192                                                                       header.header().value());\\n    58\u2192        break;\\n    59\u2192      case Router::HeaderValueOption::OVERWRITE_IF_EXISTS_OR_ADD:\\n    60\u2192        response->response_headers_to_set.emplace_back(header.header().key(),\\n     1\u2192syntax = \\\"proto3\\\";\\n     2\u2192\\n     3\u2192package envoy.service.auth.v3;\\n     4\u2192\\n     5\u2192import \\\"envoy/config/core/v3/address.proto\\\";\\n     6\u2192import \\\"envoy/config/core/v3/base.proto\\\";\\n     7\u2192\\n     8\u2192import \\\"google/protobuf/timestamp.proto\\\";\\n     9\u2192\\n    10\u2192import \\\"udpa/annotations/migrate.proto\\\";\\n    11\u2192import \\\"udpa/annotations/status.proto\\\";\\n    12\u2192import \\\"udpa/annotations/versioning.proto\\\";\\n    13\u2192\\n    14\u2192option java_package = \\\"io.envoyproxy.envoy.service.auth.v3\\\";\\n    15\u2192option java_outer_classname = \\\"AttributeContextProto\\\";\\n    16\u2192option java_multiple_files = true;\\n    17\u2192option go_package = \\\"github.com/envoyproxy/go-control-plane/envoy/service/auth/v3;authv3\\\";\\n    18\u2192option (udpa.annotations.file_status).package_version_status = ACTIVE;\\n    19\u2192\\n    20\u2192// [#protodoc-title: Attribute context]\\n    21\u2192\\n    22\u2192// See :ref:`network filter configuration overview <config_network_filters_ext_authz>`\\n    23\u2192// and :ref:`HTTP filter configuration overview <config_http_filters_ext_authz>`.\\n    24\u2192\\n    25\u2192// An attribute is a piece of metadata that describes an activity on a network.\\n    26\u2192// For example, the size of an HTTP request, or the status code of an HTTP response.\\n    27\u2192//\\n    28\u2192// Each attribute has a type and a name, which is logically defined as a proto message field\\n    29\u2192// of the ``AttributeContext``. The ``AttributeContext`` is a collection of individual attributes\\n    30\u2192// supported by Envoy authorization system.\\n    31\u2192// [#comment: The following items are left out of this proto\\n    32\u2192// Request.Auth field for jwt tokens\\n    33\u2192// Request.Api for api management\\n    34\u2192// Origin peer that originated the request\\n    35\u2192// Caching Protocol\\n    36\u2192// request_context return values to inject back into the filter chain\\n    37\u2192// peer.claims -- from X.509 extensions\\n    38\u2192// Configuration\\n    39\u2192// - field mask to send\\n    40\u2192// - which return values from request_context are copied back\\n    41\u2192// - which return values are copied into request_headers]\\n    42\u2192// [#next-free-field: 14]\\n    43\u2192message AttributeContext {\\n    44\u2192  option (udpa.annotations.versioning).previous_message_type =\\n    45\u2192      \\\"envoy.service.auth.v2.AttributeContext\\\";\\n    46\u2192\\n    47\u2192  // This message defines attributes for a node that handles a network request.\\n    48\u2192  // The node can be either a service or an application that sends, forwards,\\n    49\u2192  // or receives the request. Service peers should fill in the ``service``,\\n    50\u2192  // ``principal``, and ``labels`` as appropriate.\\n    51\u2192  // [#next-free-field: 6]\\n    52\u2192  message Peer {\\n    53\u2192    option (udpa.annotations.versioning).previous_message_type =\\n    54\u2192        \\\"envoy.service.auth.v2.AttributeContext.Peer\\\";\\n    55\u2192\\n    56\u2192    // The address of the peer, this is typically the IP address.\\n    57\u2192    // It can also be UDS path, or others.\\n    58\u2192    config.core.v3.Address address = 1;\\n    59\u2192\\n    60\u2192    // The canonical service name of the peer.\\n    61\u2192    // It should be set to :ref:`the HTTP x-envoy-downstream-service-cluster\\n    62\u2192    // <config_http_conn_man_headers_downstream-service-cluster>`\\n    63\u2192    // If a more trusted source of the service name is available through mTLS/secure naming, it\\n    64\u2192    // should be used.\\n    65\u2192    string service = 2;\\n    66\u2192\\n    67\u2192    // The labels associated with the peer.\\n    68\u2192    // These could be pod labels for Kubernetes or tags for VMs.\\n    69\u2192    // The source of the labels could be an X.509 certificate or other configuration.\\n    70\u2192    map<string, string> labels = 3;\\n    71\u2192\\n    72\u2192    // The authenticated identity of this peer.\\n    73\u2192    // For example, the identity associated with the workload such as a service account.\\n    74\u2192    // If an X.509 certificate is used to assert the identity this field should be sourced from\\n    75\u2192    // ``URI Subject Alternative Names``, ``DNS Subject Alternate Names`` or ``Subject`` in that order.\\n    76\u2192    // The primary identity should be the principal. The principal format is issuer specific.\\n    77\u2192    //\\n    78\u2192    // Examples:\\n    79\u2192    //\\n    80\u2192    // - SPIFFE format is ``spiffe://trust-domain/path``.\\n    81\u2192    // - Google account format is ``https://accounts.google.com/{userid}``.\\n    82\u2192    string principal = 4;\\n    83\u2192\\n    84\u2192    // The X.509 certificate used to authenticate the identify of this peer.\\n    85\u2192    // When present, the certificate contents are encoded in URL and PEM format.\\n    86\u2192    string certificate = 5;\\n    87\u2192  }\\n    88\u2192\\n    89\u2192  // Represents a network request, such as an HTTP request.\\n    90\u2192  message Request {\\n    91\u2192    option (udpa.annotations.versioning).previous_message_type =\\n    92\u2192        \\\"envoy.service.auth.v2.AttributeContext.Request\\\";\\n    93\u2192\\n    94\u2192    // The timestamp when the proxy receives the first byte of the request.\\n    95\u2192    google.protobuf.Timestamp time = 1;\\n    96\u2192\\n    97\u2192    // Represents an HTTP request or an HTTP-like request.\\n    98\u2192    HttpRequest http = 2;\\n    99\u2192  }\\n   100\u2192\"}]},\"uuid\":\"32bbbf87-07b3-42a9-992f-f6cf574c8f7c\",\"timestamp\":\"2026-02-18T03:32:49.336Z\",\"sourceToolAssistantUUID\":\"4a5c4894-579e-4142-802d-fac356cd5709\"}\n{\"parentUuid\":\"32bbbf87-07b3-42a9-992f-f6cf574c8f7c\",\"isSidechain\":true,\"userType\":\"external\",\"cwd\":\"/workspace\",\"sessionId\":\"6e5abf8f-0611-4d50-82c4-ab3bbf4bccd5\",\"version\":\"2.1.45\",\"gitBranch\":\"HEAD\",\"agentId\":\"ac84c83\",\"slug\":\"bright-moseying-sprout\",\"message\":{\"model\":\"claude-haiku-4-5-20251001\",\"id\":\"msg_01ChiawcYDvShKASADUgtNcx\",\"type\":\"message\",\"role\":\"assistant\",\"content\":[{\"type\":\"tool_use\",\"id\":\"toolu_01DhMhk7VF16WdnJ4jS2ypaT\",\"name\":\"Read\",\"input\":{\"file_path\":\"/workspace/source/extensions/filters/network/ext_authz/config.h\"},\"caller\":{\"type\":\"direct\"}}],\"stop_reason\":null,\"stop_sequence\":null,\"usage\":{\"input_tokens\":6,\"cache_creation_input_tokens\":4239,\"cache_read_input_tokens\":44047,\"cache_creation\":{\"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens\":0,\"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens\":4239},\"output_tokens\":1,\"service_tier\":\"standard\",\"inference_geo\":\"not_available\"}},\"requestId\":\"req_011CYEq7GDgPyYmciPYi8wTz\",\"type\":\"assistant\",\"uuid\":\"7f22f623-cf2c-4f44-bd08-f741b899ba0f\",\"timestamp\":\"2026-02-18T03:32:49.622Z\"}\n{\"parentUuid\":\"7f22f623-cf2c-4f44-bd08-f741b899ba0f\",\"isSidechain\":true,\"userType\":\"external\",\"cwd\":\"/workspace\",\"sessionId\":\"6e5abf8f-0611-4d50-82c4-ab3bbf4bccd5\",\"version\":\"2.1.45\",\"gitBranch\":\"HEAD\",\"agentId\":\"ac84c83\",\"slug\":\"bright-moseying-sprout\",\"type\":\"progress\",\"data\":{\"type\":\"hook_progress\",\"hookEvent\":\"PostToolUse\",\"hookName\":\"PostToolUse:Read\",\"command\":\"callback\"},\"parentToolUseID\":\"toolu_01DhMhk7VF16WdnJ4jS2ypaT\",\"toolUseID\":\"toolu_01DhMhk7VF16WdnJ4jS2ypaT\",\"timestamp\":\"2026-02-18T03:32:49.624Z\",\"uuid\":\"fc7644a5-77c6-4357-9be2-cf9aead488c9\"}\n{\"parentUuid\":\"7f22f623-cf2c-4f44-bd08-f741b89 \\\"source/common/tracing/http_tracer_impl.h\\\"\\n    11\u2192#include \\\"source/extensions/filters/network/well_known_names.h\\\"\\n    12\u2192\\n    13\u2192namespace Envoy {\\n    14\u2192namespace Extensions {\\n    15\u2192namespace NetworkFilters {\\n    16\u2192namespace ExtAuthz {\\n    17\u2192\\n    18\u2192InstanceStats Config::generateStats(const std::string& name, Stats::Scope& scope) {\\n    19\u2192  const std::string final_prefix = fmt::format(\\\"ext_authz.{}.\\\", name);\\n    20\u2192  return {ALL_TCP_EXT_AUTHZ_STATS(POOL_COUNTER_PREFIX(scope, final_prefix),\\n    21\u2192                                  POOL_GAUGE_PREFIX(scope, final_prefix))};\\n    22\u2192}\\n    23\u2192\\n    24\u2192void Filter::callCheck() {\\n    25\u2192  Filters::Common::ExtAuthz::CheckRequestUtils::createTcpCheck(\\n    26\u2192      filter_callbacks_, check_request_, config_->includePeerCertificate(),\\n    27\u2192      config_->includeTLSSession(), config_->destinationLabels());\\n    28\u2192  // Store start time of ext_authz filter call\\n    29\u2192  start_time_ = filter_callbacks_->connection().dispatcher().timeSource().monotonicTime();\\n    30\u2192  status_ = Status::Calling;\\n    31\u2192  config_->stats().active_.inc();\\n    32\u2192  config_->stats().total_.inc();\\n    33\u2192\\n    34\u2192  calling_check_ = true;\\n    35\u2192  client_->check(*this, check_request_, Tracing::NullSpan::instance(),\\n    36\u2192                 filter_callbacks_->connection().streamInfo());\\n    37\u2192  calling_check_ = false;\\n    38\u2192}\\n    39\u2192\\n    40\u2192Network::FilterStatus Filter::onData(Buffer::Instance&, bool /* end_stream */) {\\n    41\u2192  if (!filterEnabled(filter_callbacks_->connection().streamInfo().dynamicMetadata())) {\\n    42\u2192    config_->stats().disabled_.inc();\\n    43\u2192    return Network::FilterStatus::Continue;\\n    44\u2192  }\\n    45\u2192\\n    46\u2192  if (status_ == Status::NotStarted) {\\n    47\u2192    // By waiting to invoke the check at onData() the call to authorization service will have\\n    48\u2192    // sufficient information to fill out the checkRequest_.\\n    49\u2192    callCheck();\\n    50\u2192  }\\n    51\u2192  return filter_return_ == FilterReturn::Stop ? Network::FilterStatus::StopIteration\\n    52\u2192                                              : Network::FilterStatus::Continue;\\n    53\u2192}\\n    54\u2192\\n    55\u2192Network::FilterStatus Filter::onNewConnection() {\\n    56\u2192  // Wait till onData() happens.\\n    57\u2192  return Network::FilterStatus::Continue;\\n    58\u2192}\\n    59\u2192\\n    60\u2192void Filter::onEvent(Network::ConnectionEvent event) {\\n    61\u2192  if (event == Network::ConnectionEvent::RemoteClose ||\\n    62\u2192      event == Network::ConnectionEvent::LocalClose) {\\n    63\u2192    if (status_ == Status::Calling) {\\n    64\u2192      // Make sure that any pending request in the client is cancelled. This will be NOP if the\\n    65\u2192      // request already completed.\\n    66\u2192      client_->cancel();\\n    67\u2192      config_->stats().active_.dec();\\n    68\u2192    }\\n    69\u2192  }\\n    70\u2192}\\n    71\u2192\\n    72\u2192void Filter::onComplete(Filters::Common::ExtAuthz::ResponsePtr&& response) {\\n    73\u2192  status_ = Status::Complete;\\n    74\u2192  config_->stats().active_.dec();\\n    75\u2192\\n    76\u2192  switch (response->status) {\\n    77\u2192  case Filters::Common::ExtAuthz::CheckStatus::OK:\\n    78\u2192    config_->stats().ok_.inc();\\n    79\u2192    // Add duration of call to dynamic metadata if applicable\\n    80\u2192    if (start_time_.has_value()) {\"}]},\"uuid\":\"b76c3268-a26c-4b51-abe6-4c26658d0f19\",\"timestamp\":\"2026-02-18T03:32:52.382Z\",\"sourceToolAssistantUUID\":\"2494b4a3-2f6c-4636-a764-8d410bf7f266\"}\n{\"parentUuid\":\"b76c3268-a26c-4b51-abe6-4c26658d0f19\",\"isSidechain\":true,\"userType\":\"external\",\"cwd\":\"/workspace\",\"sessionId\":\"6e5abf8f-0611-4d50-82c4-ab3bbf4bccd5\",\"version\":\"2.1.45\",\"gitBranch\":\"HEAD\",\"agentId\":\"ac84c83\",\"slug\":\"bright-moseying-sprout\",\"message\":{\"model\":\"claude-haiku-4-5-20251001\",\"id\":\"msg_01UBPFYPQJPEbR1Hnw3769SK\",\"type\":\"message\",\"role\":\"assistant\",\"content\":[{\"type\":\"tool_use\",\"id\":\"toolu_01MPNjEUCJ7VfqXEn9TZ6iaW\",\"name\":\"Read\",\"input\":{\"file_path\":\"/workspace/source/extensions/filters/http/ext_authz/config.cc\",\"limit\":80},\"caller\":{\"type\":\"direct\"}}],\"stop_reason\":null,\"stop_sequence\":null,\"usage\":{\"input_tokens\":6,\"cache_creation_input_tokens\":2397,\"cache_read_input_tokens\":48286,\"cache_creation\":{\"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens\":0,\"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens\":2397},\"output_tokens\":1,\"service_tier\":\"standard\",\"inference_geo\":\"not_available\"}},\"requestId\":\"req_011CYEq7WD3oYwFrv8HbFcYB\",\"type\":\"assistant\",\"uuid\":\"2593adb7-535f-4462-ae3a-3943deffabd4\",\"timestamp\":\"2026-02-18T03:32:52.644Z\"}\n{\"parentUuid\":\"2593adb7-535f-4462-ae3a-3943deffabd4\",\"isSidechain\":true,\"userType\":\"external\",\"cwd\":\"/workspace\",\"sessionId\":\"6e5abf8f-0611-4d50-82c4-ab3bbf4bccd5\",\"version\":\"2.1.45\",\"gitBranch\":\"HEAD\",\"agentId\":\"ac84c83\",\"slug\":\"bright-moseying-sprout\",\"type\":\"progress\",\"data\":{\"type\":\"hook_progress\",\"hookEvent\":\"PostToolUse\",\"hookName\":\"PostToolUse:Read\",\"command\":\"callback\"},\"parentToolUseID\":\"toolu_01MPNjEUCJ7VfqXEn9TZ6iaW\",\"toolUseID\":\"toolu_01MPNjEUCJ7VfqXEn9TZ6iaW\",\"timestamp\":\"2026-02-18T03:32:52.647Z\",\"uuid\":\"716b292e-8093-41c1-a92a-a14a91c66af7\"}\n{\"parentUuid\":\"2593adb7-535f-4462-ae3a-3943 \\\"source/extensions/filters/common/ext_authz/ext_authz_grpc_impl.h\\\"\\n    15\u2192#include \\\"source/extensions/filters/common/ext_authz/ext_authz_http_impl.h\\\"\\n    16\u2192#include \\\"source/extensions/filters/http/ext_authz/ext_authz.h\\\"\\n    17\u2192\\n    18\u2192namespace Envoy {\\n    19\u2192namespace Extensions {\\n    20\u2192namespace HttpFilters {\\n    21\u2192namespace ExtAuthz {\\n    22\u2192\\n    23\u2192Http::FilterFactoryCb ExtAuthzFilterConfig::createFilterFactoryFromProtoWithServerContextTyped(\\n    24\u2192    const envoy::extensions::filters::http::ext_authz::v3::ExtAuthz& proto_config,\\n    25\u2192    const std::string& stats_prefix, Server::Configuration::ServerFactoryContext& server_context) {\\n    26\u2192  const auto filter_config = std::make_shared<FilterConfig>(proto_config, server_context.scope(),\\n    27\u2192                                                            stats_prefix, server_context);\\n    28\u2192  // The callback is created in main thread and executed in worker thread, variables except factory\\n    29\u2192  // context must be captured by value into the callback.\\n    30\u2192  Http::FilterFactoryCb callback;\\n    31\u2192  if (proto_config.has_http_service()) {\\n    32\u2192    // Raw HTTP client.\\n    33\u2192    const uint32_t timeout_ms = PROTOBUF_GET_MS_OR_DEFAULT(proto_config.http_service().server_uri(),\\n    34\u2192                                                           timeout, DefaultTimeout);\\n    35\u2192    const auto client_config =\\n    36\u2192        std::make_shared<Extensions::Filters::Common::ExtAuthz::ClientConfig>(\\n    37\u2192            proto_config, timeout_ms, proto_config.http_service().path_prefix(), server_context);\\n    38\u2192    callback = [filter_config = std::move(filter_config), client_config,\\n    39\u2192                &server_context](Http::FilterChainFactoryCallbacks& callbacks) {\\n    40\u2192      auto client = std::make_unique<Extensions::Filters::Common::ExtAuthz::RawHttpClientImpl>(\\n    41\u2192          server_context.clusterManager(), client_config);\\n    42\u2192      callbacks.addStreamFilter(std::make_shared<Filter>(filter_config, std::move(client)));\\n    43\u2192    };\\n    44\u2192  } else {\\n    45\u2192    // gRPC client.\\n    46\u2192    const uint32_t timeout_ms =\\n    47\u2192        PROTOBUF_GET_MS_OR_DEFAULT(proto_config.grpc_service(), timeout, DefaultTimeout);\\n    48\u2192    THROW_IF_NOT_OK(Config::Utility::checkTransportVersion(proto_config));\\n    49\u2192    Envoy::Grpc::GrpcServiceConfigWithHashKey config_with_hash_key =\\n    50\u2192        Envoy::Grpc::GrpcServiceConfigWithHashKey(proto_config.grpc_service());\\n    51\u2192    callback = [&server_context, filter_config = std::move(filter_config), timeout_ms,\\n    52\u2192                config_with_hash_key](Http::FilterChainFactoryCallbacks& callbacks) {\\n    53\u2192      auto client_or_error = server_context.clusterManager()\\n    54\u2192                                 .grpcAsyncClientManager()\\n    55\u2192                                 .getOrCreateRawAsyncClientWithHashKey(\\n    56\u2192                                     config_with_hash_key, server_context.scope(), true);\\n    57\u2192      THROW_IF_NOT_OK_REF(client_or_error.status());\\n    58\u2192      auto client = std::make_unique<Filters::Common::ExtAuthz::GrpcClientImpl>(\\n    59\u2192          client_or_error.value(), std::chrono::milliseconds(timeout_ms));\\n    60\u2192      callbacks.addStreamFilter(std::make_shared<Filter>(filter_config, std::move(client)));\\n    61\u2192    };\\n    62\u2192  }\\n    63\u2192  return callback;\\n    64\u2192}\\n    65\u2192\\n    66\u2192Router::RouteSpecificFilterConfigConstSharedPtr\\n    67\u2192ExtAuthzFilterConfig::createRouteSpecificFilterConfigTyped(\\n    68\u2192    const envoy::extensions::filters::http::ext_authz::v3::ExtAuthzPerRoute& proto_config,\\n    69\u2192    Server::Configuration::ServerFactoryContext&, ProtobufMessage::ValidationVisitor&) {\\n    70\u2192  return std::make_shared<FilterConfigPerRoute>(proto_config);\\n    71\u2192}\\n    72\u2192\\n    73\u2192/**\\n    74\u2192 * Static registration for the external authorization filter. @see RegisterFactory.\\n    75\u2192 */\\n    76\u2192LEGACY_REGISTER_FACTORY(ExtAuthzFilterConfig, Server::Configuration::NamedHttpFilterConfigFactory,\\n    77\u2192                        \\\"envoy.ext_authz\\\");\\n    78\u2192\\n    79\u2192} // namespace ExtAuthz\\n    80\u2192} // namespace     1\u2192syntax = \\\"proto3\\\";\\n     2\u2192\\n     3\u2192package envoy.extensions.filters.network.ext_authz.v3;\\n     4\u2192\\n     5\u2192import \\\"envoy/config/core/v3/config_source.proto\\\";\\n     6\u2192import \\\"envoy/config/core/v3/grpc_service.proto\\\";\\n     7\u2192import \\\"envoy/type/matcher/v3/metadata.proto\\\";\\n     8\u2192\\n     9\u2192import \\\"udpa/annotations/status.proto\\\";\\n    10\u2192import \\\"udpa/annotations/versioning.proto\\\";\\n    11\u2192import \\\"validate/validate.proto\\\";\\n    12\u2192\\n    13\u2192option java_package = \\\"io.envoyproxy.envoy.extensions.filters.network.ext_authz.v3\\\";\\n    14\u2192option java_outer_classname = \\\"ExtAuthzProto\\\";\\n    15\u2192option java_multiple_files = true;\\n    16\u2192option go_package = \\\"github.com/envoyproxy/go-control-plane/envoy/extensions/filters/network/ext_authz/v3;ext_authzv3\\\";\\n    17\u2192option (udpa.annotations.file_status).package_version_status = ACTIVE;\\n    18\u2192\\n    19\u2192// [#protodoc-title: Network External Authorization ]\\n    20\u2192// The network layer external authorization service configuration\\n    21\u2192// :ref:`configuration overview <config_network_filters_ext_authz>`.\\n    22\u2192// [#extension: envoy.filters.network.ext_authz]\\n    23\u2192\\n    24\u2192// External Authorization filter calls out to an external service over the\\n    25\u2192// gRPC Authorization API defined by\\n    26\u2192// :ref:`CheckRequest <envoy_v3_api_msg_service.auth.v3.CheckRequest>`.\\n    27\u2192// A failed check will cause this filter to close the TCP connection.\\n    28\u2192// [#next-free-field: 9]\\n    29\u2192message ExtAuthz {\\n    30\u2192  option (udpa.annotations.versioning).previous_message_type =\\n    31\u2192      \\\"envoy.config.filter.network.ext_authz.v2.ExtAuthz\\\";\\n    32\u2192\\n    33\u2192  // The prefix to use when emitting statistics.\\n    34\u2192  string stat_prefix = 1 [(validate.rules).string = {min_len: 1}];\\n    35\u2192\\n    36\u2192  // The external authorization gRPC service configuration.\\n    37\u2192  // The default timeout is set to 200ms by this filter.\\n    38\u2192  config.core.v3.GrpcService grpc_service = 2;\\n    39\u2192\\n    40\u2192  // The filter's behaviour in case the external authorization service does\\n    41\u2192  // not respond back. When it is set to true, Envoy will also allow traffic in case of\\n    42\u2192  // communication failure between authorization service and the proxy.\\n    43\u2192  // Defaults to false.\\n    44\u2192  bool failure_mode_allow = 3;\\n    45\u2192\\n    46\u2192  // Specifies if the peer certificate is sent to the external service.\\n    47\u2192  //\\n    48\u2192  // When this field is true, Envoy will include the peer X.509 certificate, if available, in the\\n    49\u2192  // :ref:`certificate<envoy_v3_api_field_service.auth.v3.AttributeContext.Peer.certificate>`.\\n    50\u2192  bool include_peer_certificate = 4;\\n    51\u2192\\n    52\u2192  // API version for ext_authz transport protocol. This describes the ext_authz gRPC endpoint and\\n    53\u2192  // version of Check{Request,Response} used on the wire.\\n    54\u2192  config.core.v3.ApiVersion transport_api_version = 5\\n    55\u2192      [(validate.rules).enum = {defined_only: true}];\\n    56\u2192\\n    57\u2192  // Specifies if the filter is enabled with metadata matcher.\\n    58\u2192  // If this field is not specified, the filter will be enabled for all requests.\\n    59\u2192  type.matcher.v3.MetadataMatcher filter_enabled_metadata = 6;\\n    60\u2192\\n    61\u2192  // Optional labels that will be passed to :ref:`labels<envoy_v3_api_field_service.auth.v3.AttributeContext.Peer.labels>` in\\n    62\u2192  // :ref:`destination<envoy_v3_api_field_service.auth.v3.AttributeContext.destination>`.\\n    63\u2192  // The labels will be read from :ref:`metadata<envoy_v3_api_msg_config.core.v3.Node>` with the specified key.\\n    64\u2192  string bootstrap_metadata_labels_key = 7;\\n    65\u2192\\n    66\u2192  // Specifies if the TLS session level details like SNI are sent to the external service.\\n    67\u2192  //\\n    68\u2192  // When this field is true, Envoy will include the SNI name used for TLSClientHello, if available, in the\\n    69\u2192  // :ref:`tls_session<envoy_v3_api_field_service.auth.v3.AttributeContext.tls_session>`.\\n    70\u2192  bool include_tls_session = 8;\\n    71\u2192}\\n    72\u2192\"}]},\"uuid\":\"43b14eb0-4ef2-42ce-866c-7114229ef3b8\",\"timestamp\":\"2026-02-18T03:32:52.957Z\",\"sourceToolAssistantUUID\":\"a8ad3885-6e49-4075-b489-62720603ac36\"}\n{\"parentUuid\":\"43b14eb0-4ef2-42ce-866c-7114229ef3b8\",\"isSidechain\":true,\"userType\":\"external\",\"cwd\":\"/workspace\",\"sessionId\":\"6e5abf8f-0611-4d50-82c4-ab3bbf4bccd5\",\"version\":\"2.1.45\",\"gitBranch\":\"HEAD\",\"agentId\":\"ac84c83\",\"slug\":\"bright-moseying-sprout\",\"message\":{\"model\":\"claude-haiku-4-5-20251001\",\"id\":\"msg_011y4warNLVUPaf3ZoEPHPYD\",\"type\":\"message\",\"role\":\"assistant\",\"content\":[{\"type\":\"text\",\"text\":\"Excellent! total\",\"is_error\":false}]},\"uuid\":\"dcad8fa2-a8a6-45e0-b798-0d6ec1639c35\",\"timestamp\":\"2026-02-18T03:32:54.851Z\",\"sourceToolAssistantUUID\":\"68976d44-2b84-4bf3-86a4-ad5dad381ae7\"}\n{\"parentUuid\":\"dcad8fa2-a8a6-45e0-b798-0d6ec1639c35\",\"isSidechain\":true,\"userType\":\"external\",\"cwd\":\"/workspace\",\"sessionId\":\"6e5abf8f-0611-4d50-82c4-ab3bbf4bccd5\",\"version\":\"2.1.45\",\"gitBranch\":\"HEAD\",\"agentId\":\"ac84c83\",\"slug\":\"bright-moseying-sprout\",\"message\":{\"model\":\"claude-haiku-4-5-20251001\",\"id\":\"msg_011y4warNLVUPaf3ZoEPHPYD\",\"type\":\"message\",\"role\":\"assistant\",\"content\":[{\"type\":\"tool_use\",\"id\":\"toolu_01KPK7bsVm36gVUK9yxJ9xAw\",\"name\":\"Bash\",\"input\":{\"command\":\"ls Now I have a comprehensive understanding. Let me create a detailed map of the ext_authz codebase.\\n\\n## Comprehensive Map of Envoy ext_authz Filter Architecture\\n\\nI've completed a thorough exploration of the Envoy codebase for the ext_authz (external authorization) filter. Here's a detailed map of all source files organized by their roles and relationships:\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 1. MAIN FILTER IMPLEMENTATIONS\\n\\n### HTTP Filter (source/extensions/filters/http/ext_authz/)\\n- **ext_authz.h** (18,148 bytes)\\n  - `FilterConfig` - Configuration class for HTTP ext_authz filter\\n  - `Filter` - Main HTTP stream filter implementing ext_authz functionality\\n  - `FilterConfigPerRoute` - Per-route configuration overrides\\n  - `ExtAuthzLoggingInfo` - Logging and telemetry information\\n  - `ExtAuthzFilterStats` - Statistics macro definitions\\n  - **Key Methods:**\\n    - `decodeHeaders()` - Process incoming HTTP headers\\n    - `decodeData()` - Buffer request body\\n    - `decodeTrailers()` - Process request trailers\\n    - `encodeHeaders()` - Process outgoing response headers\\n    - `onComplete()` - Callback from authorization service\\n\\n- **ext_authz.cc** (901 lines)\\n  - Implementation of HTTP filter request/response processing\\n  - Request header/body buffering logic\\n  - Response header mutation handling\\n  - Statistics tracking\\n  - Per-route configuration merging\\n\\n- **config.h** (1,962 bytes)\\n  - `ExtAuthzFilterConfig` - Factory for creating HTTP ext_authz filters\\n  - Implements `NamedHttpFilterConfigFactory`\\n  - Creates both gRPC and HTTP client implementations\\n\\n- **config.cc** (4,152 bytes)\\n  - Factory implementation\\n  - Client instantiation (gRPC or HTTP based on config)\\n  - Route-specific filter configuration creation\\n\\n### Network Filter (source/extensions/filters/network/ext_authz/)\\n- **ext_authz.h** (6,785 bytes)\\n  - `Config` - Network filter configuration\\n  - `Filter` - TCP/network layer ext_authz filter\\n  - `InstanceStats` - Network filter statistics\\n  - **Key Methods:**\\n    - `onNewConnection()` - Handle new TCP connections\\n    - `onData()` - Process incoming data\\n    - `onEvent()` - Handle connection events\\n    - `onComplete()` - Callback from authorization service\\n\\n- **ext_authz.cc** (~200 lines)\\n  - Implementation of network filter\\n  - TCP check request creation\\n  - Connection lifecycle handling\\n\\n- **config.h** (1KB)\\n  - `ExtAuthzConfigFactory` - Factory for network filters\\n  - Implements `NamedNetworkFilterConfigFactory`\\n\\n- **config.cc** (similar to HTTP)\\n  - Creates gRPC client for network filter\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 2. SHARED/COMMON FILTER CODE (source/extensions/filters/common/ext_authz/)\\n\\n### Core Abstractions\\n- **ext_authz.h** (6,785 bytes)\\n  - `Client` - Abstract base class for authorization clients\\n  - `RequestCallbacks` - Callback interface for async responses\\n  - `Response` - Response object containing authorization decision\\n  - `CheckStatus` - Enum: OK, Error, Denied\\n  - Header and response code constants\\n  - **Key Structures:**\\n    - `UnsafeHeader` / `UnsafeHeaderVector` - Header mutations\\n    - `Response` - Contains decision, headers, query params, body, status\\n\\n### gRPC Client Implementation\\n- **ext_authz_grpc_impl.h** (3,094 bytes)\\n  - `GrpcClientImpl` - gRPC client for ext_authz service\\n  - Uses `Grpc::AsyncClient<CheckRequest, CheckResponse>`\\n  - Implements async request callback interface\\n  - **Key Methods:**\\n    - `check()` - Send authorization check request\\n    - `cancel()` - Cancel inflight request\\n    - `onSuccess()` - Handle successful gRPC response\\n    - `onFailure()` - Handle gRPC failures\\n\\n- **ext_authz_grpc_impl.cc** (162 lines)\\n  - Response parsing from gRPC CheckResponse\\n  - Header mutation extraction\\n  - Dynamic metadata handling\\n  - Query parameter mutations\\n\\n### HTTP Client Implementation\\n- **ext_authz_http_impl.h** (6,282 bytes)\\n  - `ClientConfig` - Configuration for HTTP authorization client\\n  - `RawHttpClientImpl` - Raw HTTP client for ext_authz service\\n  - Implements `Http::AsyncClient::Callbacks`\\n  - **Key Methods:**\\n    - `check()` - Send HTTP authorization request\\n    - `onSuccess()` - Handle HTTP response\\n    - `onFailure()` - Handle HTTP request failures\\n  - **Header Matchers:**\\n    - Client header matchers (forward to client)\\n    - Upstream header matchers (forward to upstream)\\n    - Dynamic metadata matchers\\n\\n- **ext_authz_http_impl.cc** (404 lines)\\n  - HTTP request construction\\n  - Response header parsing and filtering\\n  - Header matcher application\\n  - Query parameter handling\\n\\n### Request Utilities\\n- **check_request_utils.h** (7,241 bytes)\\n  - `CheckRequestUtils` - Static utility for building check requests\\n  - `Matcher` / `HeaderKeyMatcher` / `NotHeaderKeyMatcher` - Header matching\\n  - **Key Static Methods:**\\n    - `createHttpCheck()` - Extract HTTP attributes for auth request\\n    - `createTcpCheck()` - Extract network attributes for auth request\\n    - `toRequestMatchers()` - Build header matchers from config\\n    - `setAttrContextPeer()` - Populate peer information\\n    - `setHttpRequest()` - Populate HTTP request details\\n    - `setTLSSession()` - Extract TLS session info\\n\\n- **check_request_utils.cc** (334 lines)\\n  - Attribute context population\\n  - Header extraction and filtering\\n  - Request body buffering\\n  - Peer certificate and TLS session handling\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 3. CONFIGURATION/PROTO FILES\\n\\n### HTTP Filter Proto (v3 - Current)\\n- **api/envoy/extensions/filters/http/ext_authz/v3/ext_authz.proto** (27KB)\\n  - `ExtAuthz` message - Main filter configuration\\n  - `HttpService` - HTTP service configuration\\n  - `BufferSettings` - Request body buffering config\\n  - `CheckSettings` - Per-route check settings\\n  - `ExtAuthzPerRoute` - Per-route overrides\\n  - **Key Config Fields:**\\n    - `grpc_service` / `http_service` - One-of service selector\\n    - `failure_mode_allow` - Fail open on errors\\n    - `with_request_body` - Buffer and send request body\\n    - `clear_route_cache` - Clear cached routes\\n    - `validate_mutations` - Validate response mutations\\n    - `metadata_context_namespaces` - Metadata to include\\n    - `include_peer_certificate` - Include TLS cert\\n    - `include_tls_session` - Include SNI/TLS info\\n    - `allowed_headers` / `disallowed_headers` - Header filtering\\n\\n### HTTP Filter Proto (v2 - Deprecated)\\n- **api/envoy/config/filter/http/ext_authz/v2/ext_authz.proto** (12KB)\\n  - Older API version (deprecated)\\n\\n### Network Filter Proto (v3)\\n- **api/envoy/extensions/filters/network/ext_authz/v3/ext_authz.proto** (1KB)\\n  - `ExtAuthz` message - Network filter configuration\\n  - Simpler than HTTP version (gRPC only)\\n  - **Key Fields:**\\n    - `grpc_service` - gRPC service endpoint\\n    - `failure_mode_allow` - Fail open behavior\\n    - `include_peer_certificate` - Include TLS cert\\n    - `include_tls_session` - Include TLS session\\n\\n### Network Filter Proto (v2)\\n- **api/envoy/config/filter/network/ext_authz/v2/ext_authz.proto**\\n\\n### Authorization Service Proto (v3 - Current)\\n- **api/envoy/service/auth/v3/external_auth.proto** (2KB)\\n  - `Authorization` service - gRPC service definition\\n  - `CheckRequest` - Authorization request message\\n    - Contains `AttributeContext attributes`\\n  - `CheckResponse` - Authorization response\\n    - `google.rpc.Status status` - OK or error\\n    - `oneof http_response` - Denied or OK response\\n    - `dynamic_metadata` - Metadata for downstream\\n  - `DeniedHttpResponse` - Custom deny response\\n    - `status` - HTTP status code\\n    - `headers` - Response headers\\n    - `body` - Response body\\n  - `OkHttpResponse` - OK response with mutations\\n    - `headers` - Headers to add to request\\n    - `headers_to_remove` - Headers to remove\\n    - `response_headers_to_add` - Response headers\\n    - `query_parameters_to_set` - Query params\\n    - `query_parameters_to_remove` - Remove query params\\n\\n### Attribute Context Proto\\n- **api/envoy/service/auth/v3/attribute_context.proto**\\n  - `AttributeContext` - Attributes sent in check request\\n  - `Peer` - Source/destination peer info\\n    - `address`, `service`, `labels`, `principal`, `certificate`\\n  - `Request` - Request attributes\\n    - `time`, `http` - HTTP request details\\n  - `HttpRequest` - HTTP-specific attributes\\n    - Headers, method, path, body, protocol, etc.\\n  - `TLSSession` - TLS session details\\n    - `sni` - Server Name Indication\\n\\n### v2 Auth Service Proto\\n- **api/envoy/service/auth/v2/external_auth.proto**\\n- **api/envoy/service/auth/v2alpha/external_auth.proto**\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 4. BUILD FILES (Configuration)\\n\\n- **source/extensions/filters/http/ext_authz/BUILD** (56 lines)\\n  - HTTP filter library dependencies\\n  - Includes: gRPC client, HTTP client, common utilities\\n\\n- **source/extensions/filters/common/ext_authz/BUILD** (87 lines)\\n  - Shared library with gRPC and HTTP implementations\\n  - No internal dependencies on filter implementations\\n\\n- **source/extensions/filters/network/ext_authz/BUILD** (50 lines)\\n  - Network filter library\\n  - Similar structure to HTTP filter\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 5. CLASS HIERARCHY & RELATIONSHIPS\\n\\n### Authorization Client Architecture (Polymorphism)\\n```\\nClient (virtual base)\\n\u251c\u2500\u2500 GrpcClientImpl\\n\u2502   \u251c\u2500\u2500 Uses: Grpc::AsyncClient<CheckRequest, CheckResponse>\\n\u2502   \u251c\u2500\u2500 Implements: ExtAuthzAsyncCallbacks\\n\u2502   \u2514\u2500\u2500 Creates: envoy::service::auth::v3::CheckRequest\\n\u2514\u2500\u2500 RawHttpClientImpl\\n    \u251c\u2500\u2500 Uses: Http::AsyncClient\\n    \u2514\u2500\u2500 Implements: Http::AsyncClient::Callbacks\\n```\\n\\n### Filter Architecture\\n```\\nHttp::StreamFilter (HTTP) / Network::ReadFilter (Network)\\n\u251c\u2500\u2500 HTTP Filter::Filter\\n\u2502   \u251c\u2500\u2500 Implements: Http::StreamDecoderFilter, Http::StreamEncoderFilter\\n\u2502   \u251c\u2500\u2500 Holds: FilterConfig (shared config), Client (gRPC or HTTP)\\n\u2502   \u2514\u2500\u2500 States: NotStarted \u2192 Calling \u2192 Complete\\n\u2514\u2500\u2500 Network Filter::Filter\\n    \u251c\u2500\u2500 Implements: Network::ReadFilter, Network::ConnectionCallbacks\\n    \u251c\u2500\u2500 Holds: Config (shared config), Client (gRPC only)\\n    \u2514\u2500\u2500 States: NotStarted \u2192 Calling \u2192 Complete\\n```\\n\\n### Configuration Architecture\\n```\\nConfig Factory\\n\u251c\u2500\u2500 HTTP: ExtAuthzFilterConfig (extends FactoryBase)\\n\u2502   \u251c\u2500\u2500 createFilterFactoryFromProtoTyped()\\n\u2502   \u2514\u2500\u2500 createRouteSpecificFilterConfigTyped()\\n\u2514\u2500\u2500 Network: ExtAuthzConfigFactory (extends FactoryBase)\\n    \u2514\u2500\u2500 createFilterFactoryFromProtoTyped()\\n```\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 6. KEY DATA FLOWS\\n\\n### HTTP Filter Request Flow:\\n1. `decodeHeaders()` \u2192 Check if filter enabled, initiate authorization check\\n2. `initiateCall()` \u2192 Build CheckRequest using CheckRequestUtils\\n3. Send to gRPC or HTTP client\\n4. `onComplete()` callback \u2192 Process response\\n5. Apply header mutations, modify request, continue\\n\\n### Authorization Response Processing:\\n1. GrpcClientImpl/RawHttpClientImpl \u2192 `onSuccess()`\\n2. Parse CheckResponse \u2192 Create Response object\\n3. Apply header matchers \u2192 Filter headers\\n4. Return to Filter \u2192 Apply mutations to request/response\\n\\n### Network Filter Request Flow:\\n1. `onNewConnection()` \u2192 Initialize\\n2. `onData()` \u2192 Build TCP CheckRequest\\n3. Call authorization service\\n4. `onComplete()` \u2192 Allow/deny connection\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 7. FILE STATISTICS\\n\\n| Category | File Count | Total Lines |\\n|----------|-----------|------------|\\n| Source Files (H) | 4 | ~50KB |\\n| Source Files (CC) | 4 | 1,801 |\\n| Proto Files | 9 | Multiple versions |\\n| BUILD Files | 3 | 193 lines |\\n| Test Files | Many | (not enumerated) |\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 8. CONFIGURATION VERSIONS\\n\\n- **v3** - Current, active (HTTP & Network)\\n- **v2** - Deprecated (HTTP & Network)\\n- **v2alpha** - Very old (Auth service only)\\n\\nKey difference: v3 uses `envoy.extensions.filters.*` package, v2 uses `envoy.config.filter.*`\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 9. IMPORTANT ARCHITECTURAL PATTERNS\\n\\n1. **Dual Client Support**: Filter can use either gRPC or HTTP backend without filter code changes\\n2. **Async Callbacks**: All external calls are asynchronous with callback interface\\n3. **Header Matching**: Flexible header filtering using matcher patterns (request, response, dynamic metadata)\\n4. **Failure Mode**: Can fail-open (allow) or fail-closed (deny) on service errors\\n5. **Dynamic Metadata**: Authorization response can inject metadata for downstream filters\\n6. **Per-Route Override**: Routes can override global filter settings\\n7. **TLS Integration**: Supports peer certificate and SNI forwarding\\n8. **Buffer Management**: Optional request body buffering for authorization checks\\n\\n---\\n\\nThis comprehensive map shows the ext_authz filter is well-modularized with clear separation between HTTP and network implementations, shared client abstractions (gRPC/HTTP), and flexible configuration options for different authorization scenarios.\"}],\"stop_reason\":null,\"stop_sequence\":null,\"usage\":{\"input_tokens\":6,\"cache_creation_input_tokens\":668,\"cache_read_input_tokens\":54899,\"cache_creation\":{\"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens\":0,\"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens\":668},\"output_tokens\":1,\"service_tier\":\"standard\",\"inference_geo\":\"not_available\"}},\"requestId\":\"req_011CYEq7rBqiCXV1NtJZFCoj\",\"type\":\"assistant\",\"uuid\":\"0fcb6416-41b8-4c2a-b62d-ac9ec64de959\",\"timestamp\":\"2026-02-18T03:33:26.004Z\"}\n",
    "status": "completed",
    "task_id": "ac84c83",
    "task_type": "local_agent"
  }
}

connection_.stream_info_.downstream_connection_info_provider_->setLocalAddress(addr_);\\n   117\u2192  }\\n   118\u2192\\n   119\u2192  void queryParameterTest(const std::string& original_path, const std::string& expected_path,\\n   120\u2192                          const Http::Utility::QueryParamsVector& add_me,\\n   121\u2192                          const std::vector<std::string>& remove_me) {\\n   122\u2192    InSequence s;\\n   123\u2192\\n   124\u2192    // Set up all the typical headers plus a path with a query string that we'll remove later.\\n   125\u2192    request_headers_.addCopy(Http::Headers::get().Host, \\\"example.com\\\");\\n   126\u2192    request_headers_.addCopy(Http::Headers::get().Method, \\\"GET\\\");\\n   127\u2192    request_headers_.addCopy(Http::Headers::get().Path, original_path);\\n   128\u2192    request_headers_.addCopy(Http::Headers::get().Scheme, \\\"https\\\");\\n   129\u2192\\n   130\u2192    prepareCheck();\\n   131\u2192\\n   132\u2192    Filters::Common::ExtAuthz::Response response{};\\n   133\u2192    response.status = Filters::Common::ExtAuthz::CheckStatus::OK;\\n   134\u2192    response.query_parameters_to_set = add_me;\\n   135\u2192    response.query_parameters_to_remove = remove_me;\\n   136\u2192\\n   137\u2192    auto response_ptr = std::make_unique<Filters::Common::ExtAuthz::Response>(response);\\n   138\u2192\\n   139\u2192    EXPECT_CALL(*client_, check(_, _, _, _))\\n   140\u2192        .WillOnce(Invoke([&](Filters::Common::ExtAuthz::RequestCallbacks& callbacks,\\n   141\u2192                             const envoy::service::auth::v3::CheckRequest&, Tracing::Span&,\\n   142\u2192                             const StreamInfo::StreamInfo&) -> void {\\n   143\u2192          callbacks.onComplete(std::move(response_ptr));\\n   144\u2192        }));\\n   145\u2192    EXPECT_CALL(decoder_filter_callbacks_, continueDecoding()).Times(0);\\n   146\u2192    EXPECT_EQ(Http::FilterHeadersStatus::Continue, filter_->decodeHeaders(request_headers_, false));\\n   147\u2192 149\u2192    EXPECT_EQ(Http::FilterTrailersStatus::Continue, std::make_unique<NiceMock<Grpc::MockAsyncClientFactory>>();\\n    41\u2192  }\\n    42\u2192};\\n    43\u2192\\n    44\u2192class ExtAuthzFilterTest : public Event::TestUsingSimulatedTime,\\n    45\u2192                           public Thread::RealThreadsTestHelper,\\n    46\u2192                           public testing::Test {\\n    47\u2192public:\\n    48\u2192  ExtAuthzFilterTest() : RealThreadsTestHelper(5), stat_names_(symbol_table_) {\\n    49\u2192    ON_CALL(context_.server_factory_context_, threadLocal())\\n    50\u2192        .WillByDefault(testing::ReturnRef(tls()));\\n    51\u2192    ON_CALL(context_.server_factory_context_, api()).WillByDefault(testing::ReturnRef(api()));\\n    52\u2192    runOnMainBlocking([&]() {\\n    53\u2192      async_client_manager_ = std::make_unique<TestAsyncClientManagerImpl>(\\n    54\u2192          context_.server_factory_context_.cluster_manager_, tls(),\\n    55\u2192          context_.server_factory_context_, stat_names_, Bootstrap::GrpcAsyncClientManagerConfig());\\n    56\u2192    });\\n    57\u2192  }\\n    58\u2192\\n    59\u2192  ~ExtAuthzFilterTest() override {\\n    60\u2192    // Reset the async client manager before shutdown threading.\\n    61\u2192    // Because its dtor will try to post to event loop to clear thread local slot.\\n    62\u2192    runOnMainBlocking([&]() { async_client_manager_.reset(); });\\n    63\u2192    // TODO(chaoqin-li1123): clean this up when we figure out how to free the threading resources in\\n    64\u2192    // RealThreadsTestHelper.\\n    65\u2192    shutdownThreading();\\n    66\u2192    exitThreads();\\n    67\u2192  }\\n    68\u2192\\n    69\u2192  Http::FilterFactoryCb createFilterFactory(\\n    70\u2192      const envoy::extensions::filters::http::ext_authz::v3::ExtAuthz& ext_authz_config) {\\n    71\u2192    // Delegate call to mock async client manager to real async client manager.\\n    72\u2192    ON_CALL(context_.server_factory_context_.cluster_manager_.async_client_manager_,\\n    73\u2192            getOrCreateRawAsyncClientWithHashKey(_, _, _))\\n    74\u2192        .WillByDefault(\\n bytes.\\n    42\u2192  bool stats_expect_response_bytes = true;\\n    43\u2192};\\n    44\u2192\\n    45\u2192struct WaitForSuccessfulUpstreamResponseOpts {\\n    46\u2192  // Fields of type Headers 50\u2192  const Http::TestRequestHeaderMapImpl new_headers_from_upstream = {};\\n    51\u2192  const Http::TestRequestHeaderMapImpl headers_to_append_multiple = {};\\n    52\u2192  bool failure_mode_allowed_header = false;\\n    53\u2192};\\n    54\u2192\\n    55\u2192class ExtAuthzGrpcIntegrationTest\\n    56\u2192    : public Grpc::BaseGrpcClientIntegrationParamTest,\\n    57\u2192    37\u2192namespace ExtAuthz {\\n    38\u2192\\n    39\u2192class ExtAuthzFilterTest : public testing::Test {\\n    40\u2192public:\\n    41\u2192  void initialize(std::string yaml) {\\n    42\u2192    envoy::extensions::filters::network::ext_authz::v3::ExtAuthz proto_config{};\\n    43\u2192    TestUtility::loadFromYaml(yaml, proto_config);\\n    44\u2192    config_ = std::make_shared<Config>(proto_config, *stats_store_.rootScope(), context_);\\n    45\u2192    client_ = new Filters::Common::ExtAuthz::MockClient();\\n    46\u2192    filter_ = std::make_unique<Filter>(config_, Filters::Common::ExtAuthz::ClientPtr{client_});\\n    47\u2192    filter_->initializeReadFilterCallbacks(filter_callbacks_);\\n    48\u2192    addr_ = *Network::Address::PipeInstance::create(\\\"/test/test.sock\\\");\\n    49\u2192\\n    50\u2192    // NOP currently.\\n    51\u2192    filter_->onAboveWriteBufferHighWatermark();\\n    52\u2192    filter_->onBelowWriteBufferLowWatermark();\\n    53\u2192  }\\n    54\u2192\\n    55\u2192  Filters::Common::ExtAuthz::ResponsePtr\\n    56\u2192  makeAuthzResponse(Filters::Common::ExtAuthz::CheckStatus status) {\\n    57\u2192    Filters::Common::ExtAuthz::ResponsePtr response =\\n    58\u2192        std::make_unique<Filters::Common::ExtAuthz::Response>();\\n    59\u2192    response->status = status;\\n    60\u2192    return response;\\n    61\u2192  }\\n    62\u2192\\n    63\u2192  ~ExtAuthzFilterTest() override {\\n    64\u2192    for (const Stats::GaugeSharedPtr& gauge : stats_store_.gauges()) {\\n    65\u2192      EXPECT_EQ(0U, gauge->value()) << \\\"guage name: \\\" << gauge->name();\\n    66\u2192    }\\n    67\u2192  }\\n    68\u2192\\n    69\u2192  void expectOKWithOnData() {\\n    70\u2192    filter_callbacks_.connection_.stream_info_.downstream_connection_info_provider_\\n    71\u2192        ->setRemoteAddress(addr_);\\n    72\u2192    filter_callbacks_.connection_.stream_info_.downstream_connection_info_provider_\\n    73\u2192        ->setLocalAddress(addr_);\\n    74\u2192    EXPECT_CALL(*client_, check(_, _, testing::A<Tracing::Span&>(), _))\\n    75\u2192        .WillOnce(\\n    76\u2192            WithArgs<0>(Invoke([&](Filters::Common::ExtAuthz::RequestCallbacks& callbacks) -> void {\\n    77\u2192              request_callbacks_ = &callbacks;\\n    78\u2192            })));\\n    79\u2192\\n    80\u2192    EXPECT_EQ(Network::FilterStatus::Continue, filter_->onNewConnection());\"}]},\"uuid\":\"0bbedeb4-58b9-4bc0-8262-e7f3df281d11\",\"timestamp\":\"2026-02-18T03:32:39.975Z\",\"sourceToolAssistantUUID\":\"7264e53c-b932-4537-9b5f-fcf4fc5a7ed3\"}\n{\"parentUuid\":\"0bbedeb4-58b9-4bc0-8262-e7f3df281d11\",\"isSidechain\":true,\"userType\":\"external\",\"cwd\":\"/workspace\",\"sessionId\":\"6e5abf8f-0611-4d50-82c4-ab3bbf4bccd5\",\"version\":\"2.1.45\",\"gitBranch\":\"HEAD\",\"agentId\":\"a5ebeda\",\"slug\":\"bright-moseying-sprout\",\"message\":{\"model\":\"claude-haiku-4-5-20251001\",\"id\":\"msg_01Jx9v8qxR7wKxcGxT3CGW9q\",\"type\":\"message\",\"role\":\"assistant\",\"content\":[{\"type\":\"text\",\"text\":\"Now     1\u2192#include \\\"envoy/service/auth/v3/external_auth.pb.h\\\"\\n     2\u2192#include \\\"envoy/type/v3/http_status.pb.h\\\"\\n     3\u2192\\n     4\u2192#include \\\"source/common/grpc/common.h\\\"\\n     5\u2192#include \\\"source/common/http/headers.h\\\"\\n     6\u2192#include \\\"source/common/protobuf/protobuf.h\\\"\\n     7\u2192#include \\\"source/extensions/filters/common/ext_authz/ext_authz_grpc_impl.h\\\"\\n     8\u2192\\n     9\u2192#include \\\"test/extensions/filters/common/ext_authz/mocks.h\\\"\\n    10\u2192#include \\\"test/extensions/filters/common/ext_authz/test_common.h\\\"\\n    11\u2192#include \\\"test/mocks/grpc/mocks.h\\\"\\n    12\u2192#include \\\"test/mocks/stream_info/mocks.h\\\"\\n    13\u2192#include \\\"test/mocks/tracing/mocks.h\\\"\\n    14\u2192\\n    15\u2192#include \\\"gmock/gmock.h\\\"\\n    16\u2192#include \\\"gtest/gtest.h\\\"\\n    17\u2192\\n    18\u2192using testing::_;\\n    19\u2192using testing::Eq;\\n    20\u2192using testing::Invoke;\\n    21\u2192using testing::Ref;\\n    22\u2192using testing::Return;\\n    23\u2192using testing::WhenDynamicCastTo;\\n    24\u2192\\n    25\u2192namespace Envoy {\\n    26\u2192namespace Extensions {\\n    27\u2192namespace Filters {\\n    28\u2192namespace Common {\\n    29\u2192namespace ExtAuthz {\\n    30\u2192\\n    31\u2192using Params = std::tuple<envoy::config::core::v3::ApiVersion>;\\n    32\u2192\\n    33\u2192class ExtAuthzGrpcClientTest : public testing::Test {\\n    34\u2192public:\\n    35\u2192  ExtAuthzGrpcClientTest() : async_client_(new Grpc::MockAsyncClient()), timeout_(10) {}\\n    36\u2192\\n    37\u2192  void initialize() {\\n    38\u2192    client_ = std::make_unique<GrpcClientImpl>(Grpc::RawAsyncClientPtr{async_client_}, timeout_);\\n    39\u2192  }\\n    40\u2192\\n    41\u2192  void expectCallSend(envoy::service::auth::v3::CheckRequest& request) {\\n    42\u2192    EXPECT_CALL(*async_client_,\\n    43\u2192                sendRaw(_, _, Grpc::ProtoBufferEq(request), Ref(*(client_.get())), _, _))\\n    44\u2192        .WillOnce(\\n    45\u2192            Invoke([this](absl::string_view service_full_name, absl::string_view method_name,\\n    46\u2192                          Buffer::InstancePtr&&, Grpc::RawAsyncRequestCallbacks&, Tracing::Span&,\\n    47\u2192                          const Http::AsyncClient::RequestOptions& options) -> Grpc::AsyncRequest* {\\n    48\u2192              EXPECT_EQ(\\\"envoy.service.auth.v3.Authorization\\\", service_full_name);\\n    49\u2192              EXPECT_EQ(\\\"Check\\\", method_name);\\n    50\u2192              EXPECT_EQ(timeout_->count(), options.timeout->count());\\n    51\u2192              return &async_request_;\\n    52\u2192            }));\\n    53\u2192  }\\n    54\u2192\\n    55\u2192  Grpc::MockAsyncClient* async_client_;\\n    56\u2192  absl::optional<std::chrono::milliseconds> timeout_;\\n    57\u2192  Grpc::MockAsyncRequest async_request_;\\n    58\u2192  GrpcClientImplPtr client_;\\n    59\u2192  MockRequestCallbacks request_callbacks_;\\n    60\u2192  Tracing::MockSpan span_;\\n    61\u2192  NiceMock<StreamInfo::MockStreamInfo> stream_info_;\\n    62\u2192  envoy::config::core::v3::ApiVersion api_version_;\\n    63\u2192};\\n    64\u2192\\n    65\u2192// Test the client when an ok response is received.\\n    66\u2192TEST_F(ExtAuthzGrpcClientTest, AuthorizationOk) {\\n    67\u2192  initialize();\\n    68\u2192\\n    69\u2192  auto check_response = std::make_unique<envoy::service::auth::v3::CheckResponse>();\\n    70\u2192  auto status = check_response->mutable_status();\\n    71\u2192\\n    72\u2192  ProtobufWkt::Struct expected_dynamic_metadata;\\n    73\u2192  auto* metadata_fields = expected_dynamic_metadata.mutable_fields();\\n    74\u2192  (*metadata_fields)[\\\"foo\\\"] = ValueUtil::stringValue(\\\"ok\\\");\\n    75\u2192  (*metadata_fields)[\\\"bar\\\"] = ValueUtil::numberValue(1);\\n    76\u2192\\n    77\u2192  // The expected dynamic metadata is set to the outer check response, hence regardless the\\n    78\u2192  // check_response's http_response value (either OkHttpResponse or DeniedHttpResponse) the dynamic\\n    79\u2192  // metadata is set to be equal to the check response's dynamic metadata.\\n    80\u2192  check_response->mutable_dynamic_metadata()->MergeFrom(expected_dynamic_metadata);\"}]},\"uuid\":\"537af595-dc50-46cc-8e42-d67dc53a4ed7\",\"timestamp\":\"2026-02-18T03:32:41.230Z\",\"sourceToolAssistantUUID\":\"22ce5859-3169-438c-9e5a-70485dc5f5c3\"}\n{\"parentUuid\":\"537af595-dc50-46cc-8e42-d67dc53a4ed7\",\"isSidechain\":true,\"userType\":\"external\",\"cwd\":\"/workspace\",\"sessionId\":\"6e5abf8f-0611-4d50-82c4-ab3bbf4bccd5\",\"version\":\"2.1.45\",\"gitBranch\":\"HEAD\",\"agentId\":\"a5ebeda\",\"slug\":\"bright-moseying-sprout\",\"message\":{\"model\":\"claude-haiku-4-5-20251001\",\"id\":\"msg_01Jx9v8qxR7wKxcGxT3CGW9q\",\"type\":\"message\",\"role\":\"assistant\",\"content\":[{\"type\":\"tool_use\",\"id\":\"toolu_01FfU7fir7gSYcbJi152gVRQ\",\"name\":\"Read\",\"input\":{\"file_path\":\"/workspace/test/extensions/filters/common/ext_authz/ext_authz_http_impl_test.cc\",\"limit\":80},\"caller\":{\"type\":\"direct\"}}],\"stop_reason\":null,\"stop_sequence\":null,\"usage\":{\"input_tokens\":7,\"cache_creation_input_tokens\":5383,\"cache_read_input_tokens\":21393,\"cache_creation\":{\"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens\":0,\"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens\":5383},\"output_tokens\":1,\"service_tier\":\"standard\",\"inference_geo\":\"not_available\"}},\"requestId\":\"req_011CYEq6hRDBVbajfRVHXdKq\",\"type\":\"assistant\",\"uuid\":\"aece95dd-f0f1-41ac-b2f6-069d01382c3d\",\"timestamp\":\"2026-02-18T03:32:41.515Z\"}\n{\"parentUuid\":\"aece95dd-f0f1-41ac-b2f6-069d01382c3d\",\"isSidechain\":true,\"userType\":\"external\",\"cwd\":\"/workspace\",\"sessionId\":\"6e5abf8f-0611-4d50-82c4-ab3bbf4bccd5\",\"version\":\"2.1.45\",\"gitBranch\":\"HEAD\",\"agentId\":\"a5ebeda\",\"slug\":\"bright-moseying-sprout\",\"type\":\"progress\",\"data\":{\"type\":\"hook_progress\",\"hookEvent\":\"PostToolUse\",\"hookName\":\"PostToolUse:Read\",\"command\":\"callback\"},\"parentToolUseID\":\"toolu_01FfU7fir7gSYcbJi152gVRQ\",\"toolUseID\":\"toolu_01FfU7fir7gSYcbJi152gVRQ\",\"timestamp\":\"2026-02-18T03:32:41.517Z\",
