   21\u2192\\n    22\u2192using testing::Return;\\n    23\u2192using testing::ReturnPointee;\\n    24\u2192using testing::ReturnRef;\\n    25\u2192\\n    26\u2192namespace Envoy {\\n    27\u2192namespace Extensions {\\n    28\u2192namespace Filters {\\n    29\u2192namespace Common {\\n    30\u2192namespace ExtAuthz {\\n    31\u2192namespace {\\n    32\u2192\\n    33\u2192class CheckRequestUtilsTest : public testing::Test {\\n    34\u2192public:\\n    35\u2192  CheckRequestUtilsTest() {\\n    36\u2192    addr_ = std::make_shared<Network::Address::Ipv4Instance>(\\\"1.2.3.4\\\", 1111);\\n    37\u2192    protocol_ = Envoy::Http::Protocol::Http10;\\n    38\u2192    buffer_ = CheckRequestUtilsTest::newTestBuffer(8192);\\n    39\u2192    ssl_ = std::make_shared<NiceMock<Envoy::Ssl::MockConnectionInfo>>();\\n    40\u2192  };\\n    41\u2192\\n    42\u2192  void expectBasicHttp() {\\n    43\u2192    EXPECT_CALL(callbacks_, connection())\\n    44\u2192        .Times(2)\\n    45\u2192        .WillRepeatedly(Return(OptRef<const Network::Connection>{connection_}));\\n    46\u2192    connection_.stream_info_.downstream_connection_info_provider_->setRemoteAddress(addr_);\\n    47\u2192    connection_.stream_info_.downstream_connection_info_provider_->setLocalAddress(addr_);\\n    48\u2192    EXPECT_CALL(Const(connection_), ssl()).Times(2).WillRepeatedly(Return(ssl_));\\n    49\u2192    EXPECT_CALL(callbacks_, streamId()).WillOnce(Return(0));\\n    50\u2192    EXPECT_CALL(callbacks_, decodingBuffer()).WillOnce(Return(buffer_.get()));\\n    51\u2192    EXPECT_CALL(callbacks_, streamInfo()).WillOnce(ReturnRef(req_info_));\\n    52\u2192    EXPECT_CALL(req_info_, protocol()).Times(2).WillRepeatedly(ReturnPointee(&protocol_));\\n    53\u2192    EXPECT_CALL(req_info_, startTime()).WillOnce(Return(SystemTime()));\\n    54\u2192  }\\n    55\u2192\\n    56\u2192  void callHttpCheckAndValidateRequestAttributes(\\n    57\u2192      bool include_peer_certificate,\\n    58\u2192      const envoy::service::auth::v3::AttributeContext_TLSSession* want_tls_session) {\\n    59\u2192    Http::TestRequestHeaderMapImpl request_headers{{\\\"x-envoy-downstream-service-cluster\\\", \\\"foo\\\"},\\n    60\u2192                                                   {\\\":path\\\", \\\"/bar\\\"}};\\n    61\u2192    envoy::service::auth::v3::CheckRequest request;\\n    62\u2192    Protobuf::Map<std::string, std::string> context_extensions;\\n    63\u2192    context_extensions[\\\"key\\\"] = \\\"value\\\";\\n    64\u2192    Protobuf::Map<std::string, std::string> labels;\\n    65\u2192    labels[\\\"label_1\\\"] = \\\"value_1\\\";\\n    66\u2192    labels[\\\"label_2\\\"] = \\\"value_2\\\";\\n    67\u2192\\n    68\u2192    envoy::config::core::v3::Metadata metadata_context;\\n    69\u2192    auto metadata_val = MessageUtil::keyValueStruct(\\\"foo\\\", \\\"bar\\\");\\n    70\u2192    (*metadata_context.mutable_filter_metadata())[\\\"meta.key\\\"] = metadata_val;\\n    71\u2192\\n    72\u2192    CheckRequestUtils::createHttpCheck(\\n    73\u2192        &callbacks_, request_headers, std::move(context_extensions), std::move(metadata_context),\\n    74\u2192        envoy::config::core::v3::Metadata(), request, /*max_request_bytes=*/0,\\n    75\u2192        /*pack_as_bytes=*/false, /*encode_raw_headers=*/false, include_peer_certificate,\\n    76\u2192        want_tls_session != nullptr, labels, nullptr, nullptr);\\n    77\u2192\\n    78\u2192    EXPECT_EQ(\\\"source\\\", request.attributes().source().principal());\\n    79\u2192    EXPECT_EQ(\\\"destination\\\", request.attributes().destination().principal());\\n    80\u2192    EXPECT_EQ(\\\"foo\\\", request.attributes().source().service());\"}]},\"uuid\":\"461b595f-86a4-468c-90af-65a96a10043a\",\"timestamp\":\"2026-02-18T03:32:41.835Z\",\"sourceToolAssistantUUID\":\"42570391-d971-4cd9-91d8-3b767b2906c7\"}\n{\"parentUuid\":\"461b595f-86a4-468c-90af-65a96a10043a\",\"isSidechain\":true,\"userType\":\"external\",\"cwd\":\"/workspace\",\"sessionId\":\"6e5abf8f-0611-4d50-82c4-ab3bbf4bccd5\",\"version\":\"2.1.45\",\"gitBranch\":\"HEAD\",\"agentId\":\"a5ebeda\",\"slug\":\"bright-moseying-sprout\",\"message\":{\"model\":\"claude-haiku-4-5-20251001\",\"id\":\"msg_01Jx9v8qxR7wKxcGxT3CGW9q\",\"type\":\"message\",\"role\":\"assistant\",\"content\":[{\"type\":\"tool_use\",\"id\":\"toolu_017dmbTvbnQYdrmL4usE1jP8\",\"name\":\"Read\",\"input\":{\"file_path\":\"/workspace/test/extensions/filters/http/ext_authz/ext_authz_http_fuzz_test.cc\",\"limit\":60},\"caller\":{\"type\":\"direct\"}}],\"stop_reason\":null,\"stop_sequence\":null,\"usage\":{\"input_tokens\":7,\"cache_creation_input_tokens\":5383,\"cache_read_input_tokens\":21393,\"cache_creation\":{\"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens\":0,\"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens\":5383},\"output_tokens\":1,\"service_tier\":\"standard\",\"inference_geo\":\"not_available\"}},\"requestId\":\"req_011CYEq6hRDBVbajfRVHXdKq\",\"type\":\"assistant\",\"uuid\":\"4e0eb9f8-9e4b-43de-a618-8edd2bf14b2a\",\"timestamp\":\"2026-02-18T03:32:42.175Z\"}\n{\"parentUuid\":\"4e0eb9f8-9e4b-43de-a618-8edd2bf14b2a\",\"isSidechain\":true,\"userType\":\"external\",\"cwd\":\"/workspace\",\"sessionId\":\"6e5abf8f-0611-4d50-82c4-ab3bbf4bccd5\",\"version\":\"2.1.45\",\"gitBranch\":\"HEAD\",\"agentId\":\"a5ebeda\",\"slug\":\"bright-moseying-sprout\",\"type\":\"progress\",\"data\":{\"type\":\"hook_progress\",\"hookEvent\":\"PostToolUse\",\"hookName\":\"PostToolUse:Read\",\"command\":\"callback\"},\"parentToolUseID\":\"toolu_017dmbTvbnQYdrmL4usE1jP8\",\"toolUseID\":\"toolu_017dmbTvbnQYdrmL4usE1jP8\",\"timestamp\":\"2026-02-18T03:32:42.178Z\",\"uuid\":\"4f97cffb-c47d-42b3-b049-9fc7f9c envoy::extensions::filters::http::ext_authz::ExtAuthzTestCaseHttp;\\n    23\u2192\\n    24\u2192namespace Envoy {\\n    25\u2192namespace Extensions {\\n    26\u2192namespace HttpFilters {\\n    27\u2192namespace ExtAuthz {\\n    28\u2192namespace {\\n    29\u2192\\n    30\u2192std::string resultCaseToHttpStatus(const ExtAuthzTestCaseHttp::AuthResult result) {\\n    31\u2192  switch (result) {\\n    32\u2192    PANIC_ON_PROTO_ENUM_SENTINEL_VALUES;\\n    33\u2192  case ExtAuthzTestCaseHttp::OK:\\n    34\u2192    return \\\"200\\\";\\n    35\u2192  case ExtAuthzTestCaseHttp::ERROR:\\n    36\u2192    return \\\"500\\\";\\n    37\u2192  case ExtAuthzTestCaseHttp::DENIED:\\n    38\u2192    return \\\"403\\\";\\n    39\u2192  }\\n    40\u2192  PANIC_DUE_TO_CORRUPT_ENUM;\\n    41\u2192}\\n    42\u2192\\n    43\u2192class ReusableHttpClientFactory {\\n    44\u2192public:\\n    45\u2192  ReusableHttpClientFactory() : http_sync_request_(&internal_http_mock_client_) {\\n    46\u2192    cm_.initializeThreadLocalClusters({\\\"ext_authz\\\"});\\n    47\u2192    ON_CALL(cm_.thread_local_cluster_, httpAsyncClient())\\n    48\u2192        .WillByDefault(ReturnRef(internal_http_mock_client_));\\n    49\u2192\\n    50\u2192    ON_CALL(internal_http_mock_client_, send_(_, _, _))\\n    51\u2192        .WillByDefault(Invoke([&](Http::RequestMessagePtr&, Http::AsyncClient::Callbacks&,\\n    52\u2192                                  const Envoy::Http::AsyncClient::RequestOptions)\\n    53\u2192                                  -> Http::AsyncClient::Request* {\\n    54\u2192          if (status_ == \\\"200\\\") {\\n    55\u2192            const auto headers = TestCommon::makeHeaderValueOption({{\\\":status\\\", status_, false}});\\n    56\u2192            http_client_->onSuccess(http_sync_request_, TestCommon::makeMessageResponse(headers));\\n    57\u2192          } else {\\n    58\u2192            http_client_->onFailure(http_sync_request_, Http::AsyncClient::FailureReason::Reset);\\n    59\u2192          }\\n    60\u2192          return testing::WithArgs;\\n    18\u2192\\n    19\u2192namespace Envoy {\\n    20\u2192namespace Extensions {\\n    21\u2192namespace NetworkFilters {\\n    22\u2192namespace ExtAuthz {\\n    23\u2192\\n    24\u2192Filters::Common::ExtAuthz::ResponsePtr\\n    25\u2192makeAuthzResponse(Filters::Common::ExtAuthz::CheckStatus status) {\\n    26\u2192  Filters::Common::ExtAuthz::ResponsePtr response =\\n    27\u2192      std::make_unique<Filters::Common::ExtAuthz::Response>();\\n    28\u2192  response->status = status;\\n    29\u2192  return response;\\n    30\u2192}\\n    31\u2192\\n    32\u2192Filters::Common::ExtAuthz::CheckStatus resultCaseToCheckStatus(\\n    33\u2192    envoy::extensions::filters::network::ext_authz::Result::ResultSelectorCase result_case) {\\n    34\u2192  Filters::Common::ExtAuthz::CheckStatus check_status;\\n    35\u2192  switch (result_case) {\\n    36\u2192  case envoy::extensions::filters::network::ext_authz::Result::kCheckStatusOk: {\\n    37\u2192    check_status = Filters::Common::ExtAuthz::CheckStatus::OK;\\n    38\u2192    break;\\n    39\u2192  }\\n    40\u2192  case envoy::extensions::filters::network::ext_authz::Result::kCheckStatusError: {\\n    41\u2192    check_status = Filters::Common::ExtAuthz::CheckStatus::Error;\\n    42\u2192    break;\\n    43\u2192  }\\n    44\u2192  case envoy::extensions::filters::network::ext_authz::Result::kCheckStatusDenied: {\\n    45\u2192    check_status = Filters::Common::ExtAuthz::CheckStatus::Denied;\\n    46\u2192    break;\\n    47\u2192  }\\n    48\u2192  default: {\\n    49\u2192    // Unhandled status\\n    50\u2192    PANIC(\\\"A check status handle is missing\\\");\\n    51\u2192  }\\n    52\u2192  }\\n    53\u2192  return check_status;\\n    54\u2192}\\n    55\u2192\\n    56\u2192DEFINE_PROTO_FUZZER(const envoy::extensions::filters::network::ext_authz::ExtAuthzTestCase& input) {\\n    57\u2192  try {\\n    58\u2192    TestUtility::validate(input);\\n    59\u2192  } catch (const EnvoyException& e) {\\n    60\u2192    ENVOY_LOG_MISC(debug, \\\"EnvoyException during validation: {}\\\", e.what());\"}]},\"uuid\":\"3aacae0f-7adb-4d63-a4e8-5e7ddc483ef7\",\"timestamp\":\"2026-02-18T03:32:43.446Z\",\"sourceToolAssistantUUID\":\"ba4abace-177a-4455-a09a-7efae600e5c7\"}\n{\"parentUuid\":\"3aacae0f-7adb-4d63-a4e8-5e7ddc483ef7\",\"isSidechain\":true,\"userType\":\"external\",\"cwd\":\"/workspace\",\"sessionId\":\"6e5abf8f-0611-4d50-82c4-ab3bbf4bccd5\",\"version\":\"2.1.45\",\"gitBranch\":\"HEAD\",\"agentId\":\"a5ebeda\",\"slug\":\"bright-moseying-sprout\",\"message\":{\"model\":\"claude-haiku-4-5-20251001\",\"id\":\"msg_01Uw8qZVhjPfrX9vVEHEZuVS\",\"type\":\"message\",\"role\":\"assistant\",\"content\":[{\"type\":\"tool_use\",\"id\":\"toolu_01Ea5tR5QT82QDoGvjvzkg96\",\"name\":\"Read\",\"input\":{\"file_path\":\"/workspace/test/extensions/filters/network/ext_authz/config_test.cc\",\"limit\":60},\"caller\":{\"type\":\"direct\"}}],\"stop_reason\":null,\"stop_sequence\":null,\"usage\":{\"input_tokens\":7,\"cache_creation_input_tokens\":5208,\"cache_read_input_tokens\":26776,\"cache_creation\":{\"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens\":0,\"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens\":5208},\"output_tokens\":5,\"service_tier\":\"standard\",\"inference_geo\":\"not_available\"}},\"requestId\":\"req_011CYEq6rrjzekyGN9iEziY2\",\"type\":\"assistant\",\"uuid\":\"c203838c-8cf4-431b-96ee-0f988ac307e5\",\"timestamp\":\"2026-02-18T03:32:43.732Z\"}\n{\"parentUuid\":\"c203838c-8cf4-431b-96ee-0f988ac307e5\",\"isSidechain\":true,\"userType\":\"external\",\"cwd\":\"/workspace\",\"sessionId\":\"6e5abf8f-0611-4d50-82c4-ab3bbf4bccd5\",\"version\":\"2.1.45\",\"gitBranch\":\"HEAD\",\"agentId\":\"a5ebeda\",\"slug\":\"bright-moseying-sprout\",\"type\":\"progress\",\"data\":{\"type\":\"hook_progress\",\"hookEvent\":\"PostToolUse\",\"hookName\":\"PostToolUse:Read\",\"command\":\"callback\"},\"parentToolUseID\":\"toolu_01Ea5tR5QT82QDoGvjvzkg96\",\"toolUseID\":\"toolu_01Ea5tR5QT82QDoGvjvzkg96\",\"timestamp\":\"2026-02-18T03:32:43.735Z\",\"uuid\":\"e0794739-29b8-4f1d-8472-306726689659\"}\n{\"parentUuid\":\"c203838c-8cf4     1\u2192#include \\\"envoy/config/core/v3/grpc_service.pb.h\\\"\\n     2\u2192#include \\\"envoy/extensions/filters/network/ext_authz/v3/ext_authz.pb.h\\\"\\n     3\u2192#include \\\"source/extensions/filters/network/ext_authz/config.h\\\"\\n     7\u2192\\n     8\u2192#include \\\"test/mocks/server/factory_context.h\\\"\\n     9\u2192#include \\\"test/test_common/utility.h\\\"\\n    10\u2192\\n    11\u2192#include \\\"gmock/gmock.h\\\"\\n    12\u2192#include \\\"gtest/gtest.h\\\"\\n    13\u2192\\n    14\u2192using testing::_;\\n    15\u2192using testing::Invoke;\\n    16\u2192\\n    17\u2192namespace Envoy {\\n    18\u2192namespace Extensions {\\n    19\u2192namespace NetworkFilters {\\n    20\u2192namespace ExtAuthz {\\n    21\u2192\\n    22\u2192namespace {\\n    23\u2192void expectCorrectProto() {\\n    24\u2192  std::string yaml = R\\\"EOF(\\n    25\u2192  grpc_service:\\n    26\u2192    google_grpc:\\n    27\u2192      target_uri: ext_authz_server\\n    28\u2192      stat_prefix: google\\n    29\u2192  failure_mode_allow: false\\n    30\u2192  stat_prefix: name\\n    31\u2192)EOF\\\";\\n    32\u2192\\n    33\u2192  ExtAuthzConfigFactory factory;\\n    34\u2192  ProtobufTypes::MessagePtr proto_config = factory.createEmptyConfigProto();\\n    35\u2192  TestUtility::loadFromYaml(yaml, *proto_config);\\n    36\u2192\\n    37\u2192  NiceMock<Server::Configuration::MockFactoryContext> context;\\n    38\u2192  EXPECT_CALL(context.server_factory_context_.cluster_manager_.async_client_manager_,\\n    39\u2192              factoryForGrpcService(_, _, _))\\n    40\u2192      .WillOnce(Invoke([](const envoy::config::core::v3::GrpcService&, Stats::Scope&, bool) {\\n    41\u2192        return std::make_unique<NiceMock<Grpc::MockAsyncClientFactory>>();\\n    42\u2192      }));\\n    43\u2192  Network::FilterFactoryCb cb =\\n    44\u2192      factory.createFilterFactoryFromProto(*proto_config, context).value();\\n    45\u2192  Network::MockConnection connection;\\n    46\u2192  EXPECT_CALL(connection, addReadFilter(_));\\n    47\u2192  cb(connection);\\n    48\u2192}\\n    49\u2192} // namespace\\n    50\u2192\\n    51\u2192TEST(ExtAuthzFilterConfigTest, ValidateFail) {\\n    52\u2192  NiceMock<Server::Configuration::MockFactoryContext> context;\\n    53\u2192  envoy::extensions::filters::network::ext_authz::v3::ExtAuthz config;\\n    54\u2192  config.set_transport_api_version(envoy::config::core::v3::ApiVersion::V3);\\n    55\u2192  EXPECT_THROW(ExtAuthzConfigFactory().createFilterFactoryFromProto(config, context).IgnoreError(),\\n    56\u2192               ProtoValidationException);\\n    57\u2192}\\n    58\u2192\\n    59\u2192TEST(ExtAuthzFilterConfigTest, ExtAuthzCorrectProto) { expectCorrectProto(); }\\n    60\u2192\"}]},\"uuid\":\"1b2bb0fd-9aef-46e0-b1bb-aa23c20195c7\",\"timestamp\":\"2026-02-18T03:32:43.735Z\",\"sourceToolAssistantUUID\":\"c203838c-8cf4-431b-96ee-0f988ac307e5\"}\n{\"parentUuid\":\"1b2bb0fd-9aef-46e0-b1bb-aa23c20195c7\",\"isSidechain\":true,\"userType\":\"external\",\"cwd\":\"/workspace\",\"sessionId\":\"6e5abf8f-0611-4d50-82c4-ab3bbf4bccd5\",\"version\":\"2.1.45\",\"gitBranch\":\"HEAD\",\"agentId\":\"a5ebeda\",\"slug\":\"bright-moseying-sprout\",\"message\":{\"model\":\"claude-haiku-4-5-20251001\",\"id\":\"msg_01Uw8qZVhjPfrX9vVEHEZuVS\",\"type\":\"message\",\"role\":\"assistant\",\"content\":[{\"type\":\"tool_use\",\"id\":\"toolu_01BYmBkCQvPaQzDm3kWjDbsy\",\"name\":\"Read\",\"input\":{\"file_path\":\"/workspace/test/extensions/filters/common/ext_authz/test_common.h\",\"limit\":80},\"caller\":{\"type\":\"direct\"}}],\"stop_reason\":null,\"stop_sequence\":null,\"usage\":{\"input_tokens\":7,\"cache_creation_input_tokens\":5208,\"cache_read_input_tokens\":26776,\"cache_creation\":{\"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens\":0,\"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens\":5208},\"output_tokens\":5,\"service_tier\":\"standard\",\"inference_geo\":\"not_available\"}},\"requestId\":\"req_011CYEq6rrjzekyGN9iEziY2\",\"type\":\"assistant\",\"uuid\":\"4997ad6f-830e-440d-aeab-ec528f0f8cb6\",\"timestamp\":\"2026-02-18T03:32:44.023Z\"}\n{\"parentUuid\":\"4997ad6f-830e-440d-aeab-ec528f0f8cb6\",\"isSidechain\":true,\"userType\":\"external\",\"cwd\":\"/workspace\",\"sessionId\":\"6e5abf8f-0611-4d50-82c4-ab3bbf4bccd5\",\"version\":\"2.1.45\",\"gitBranch\":\"HEAD\",\"agentId\":\"a5ebeda\",\"slug\":\"bright-moseying-sprout\",\"type\":\"progress\",\"data\":{\"type\":\"hook_progress\",\"hookEvent\":\"PostToolUse\",\"hookName\":\"PostToolUse:Read\",\"command\":\"callback\"},\"parentToolUseID\":\"toolu_01BYmBkCQvPaQzDm3kWjDbsy\",\"toolUseID\":\"toolu_01BYmBkCQvPaQzDm3kWjDbsy\",\"timestamp\":\"2026-02-18T03:32:44.025Z\",\"uuid\":\"1831af5c-e749-4671-994b-99013d6976dd\"}\n{\"parentUuid\":\"4997ad6f-830e-440     1\u2192#pragma once\\n     2\u2192\\n     3\u2192#include \\\"envoy/config/core/v3/base.pb.h\\\"\\n     4\u2192#include \\\"envoy/service/auth/v3/external_auth.pb.h\\\"\\n     5\u2192#include \\\"envoy/type/v3/http_status.pb.h\\\"\\n     6\u2192\\n     7\u2192#include \\\"source/common/http/headers.h\\\"\\n     8\u2192#include \\\"source/extensions/filters/common/ext_authz/ext_authz_grpc_impl.h\\\"\\n     9\u2192\\n    10\u2192#include \\\"test/extensions/filters/common/ext_authz/mocks.h\\\"\\n    11\u2192#include \\\"test/test_common/utility.h\\\"\\n    12\u2192\\n    13\u2192namespace Envoy {\\n    14\u2192namespace Extensions {\\n    15\u2192namespace Filters {\\n    16\u2192namespace Common {\\n    17\u2192namespace ExtAuthz {\\n    18\u2192\\n    19\u2192// NOLINTNEXTLINE(readability-identifier-naming)\\n    20\u2192void PrintTo(const ResponsePtr& ptr, std::ostream* os);\\n    21\u2192\\n    22\u2192// NOLINTNEXTLINE(readability-identifier-naming)\\n    23\u2192void PrintTo(const Response& response, std::ostream* os);\\n    24\u2192\\n    25\u2192struct KeyValueOption {\\n    26\u2192  std::string key;\\n    27\u2192  std::string value;\\n    28\u2192  bool append;\\n    29\u2192};\\n    30\u2192\\n    31\u2192using KeyValueOptionVector = std::vector<KeyValueOption>;\\n    32\u2192using HeaderValueOptionVector = std::vector<envoy::config::core::v3::HeaderValueOption>;\\n    33\u2192using CheckResponsePtr = std::unique_ptr<envoy::service::auth::v3::CheckResponse>;\\n    34\u2192\\n    35\u2192class TestCommon {\\n    36\u2192public:\\n    37\u2192  static Http::ResponseMessagePtr makeMessageResponse(const HeaderValueOptionVector& headers,\\n    38\u2192                                                      const std::string& body = std::string{});\\n    39\u2192\\n    40\u2192  static CheckResponsePtr makeCheckResponse(Grpc::Status::GrpcStatus response_status,\\n    41\u2192                                            envoy::type::v3::StatusCode http_status_code,\\n    42\u2192                                            const std::string& body,\\n    43\u2192                                            const HeaderValueOptionVector& headers,\\n    44\u2192                                            const HeaderValueOptionVector& downstream_headers);\\n    45\u2192\\n    46\u2192  static Response\\n    47\u2192  makeAuthzResponse(CheckStatus status, Http::Code status_code = Http::Code::OK,\\n    48\u2192                    const std::string& body = std::string{},\\n    49\u2192                    const HeaderValueOptionVector& headers = HeaderValueOptionVector{},\\n    50\u2192                    const HeaderValueOptionVector& downstream_headers = HeaderValueOptionVector{});\\n    51\u2192\\n    52\u2192  static HeaderValueOptionVector makeHeaderValueOption(KeyValueOptionVector&& headers);\\n    53\u2192\\n    54\u2192  static bool compareHeaderVector(const UnsafeHeaderVector& lhs, const UnsafeHeaderVector& rhs);\\n    55\u2192  static bool compareQueryParamsVector(const Http::Utility::QueryParamsVector& lhs,\\n    56\u2192                                       const Http::Utility::QueryParamsVector& rhs);\\n    57\u2192  static bool compareVectorOfHeaderName(const std::vector<std::string>& lhs,\\n    58\u2192                                        const std::vector<std::string>& rhs);\\n    59\u2192  static bool compareVectorOfUnorderedStrings(const std::vector<std::string>& lhs,\\n    60\u2192                                              const std::vector<std::string>& rhs);\\n    61\u2192};\\n    62\u2192\\n    63\u2192MATCHER_P(AuthzErrorResponse, status, \\\"\\\") {\\n    64\u2192  // These fields should be always empty when the status is an error.\\n    65\u2192  if (!arg->headers_to_add.empty() || !arg->headers_to_append.empty() || !arg->body.empty()) {\\n    66\u2192    return false;\\n    67\u2192  }\\n    68\u2192  // HTTP status code should be always set to Forbidden.\\n    69\u2192  if (arg->status_code != Http::Code::Forbidden) {\\n    70\u2192    return false;\\n    71\u2192  }\\n    72\u2192  return arg->status == status;\\n    73\u2192}\\n    74\u2192\\n    75\u2192MATCHER_P(AuthzResponseNoAttributes, response, \\\"\\\") {\\n    76\u2192  const bool equal_status = arg->status == response.status;\\n    77\u2192  const bool equal_metadata =\\n    78\u2192      TestUtility::protoEqual(arg->dynamic_metadata, response.dynamic_metadata);\\n    79\u2192  if (!equal_metadata) {\\n    80\u2192    *result_listener <<    : internal_grpc_mock_client_(std::make_shared<NiceMock<Grpc::MockAsyncClient>>()) {\\n    34\u2192    ON_CALL(*internal_grpc_mock_client_, sendRaw(_, _, _, _, _, _))\\n    35\u2192 check_request;\\n    40\u2192              EXPECT_TRUE(check_request.ParseFromString(serialized_req->toString()))\\n    41\u2192                  << \\\"Could not parse serialized check request\\\";\\n    42\u2192\\n    43\u2192              ENVOY_LOG_MISC(trace, \\\"Check Request attributes:\\\\n{}\\\",\\n    44\u2192 }));\\n    54\u2192  }\\n    55\u2192\\n    56\u2192  std::unique_ptr<Filters::Common::ExtAuthz::GrpcClientImpl>\\n    57\u2192  newGrpcClientImpl(const ExtAuthzTestCaseGrpc& input) {\\n    58\u2192 0;\\n    39\u2192    DENIED = 1;\\n    40\u2192    ERROR = 2;\\n    41\u2192  }\\n    42\u2192  // Set default auth check result.\\n    43\u2192  AuthResult result = 3     8\u2192message Result {\\n     9\u2192  oneof result_selector {\\n    10\u2192    option (validate.required) = true;\\n    11\u2192    // Authorization check status\\n    12\u2192 for this and the following onData()\\n    22\u2192  Result result = 3;\\n    23\u2192}\\n    24\u2192\\n    25\u2192message Action {\\n    26\u2192  oneof action_selector {\\n    27\u2192    option (validate.required) = true;\\n    28\u2192    // Call onNewConnection().\\n    29\u2192    google.protobuf.Empty on_new_connection = 1;\\n    30\u2192    // Call onData().\\n    31\u2192    OnData Now I have comprehensive information. Let me compile my final report:\\n\\n## Summary: All ext_authz Filter Tests in Envoy Codebase\\n\\nI've conducted a thorough search of the Envoy codebase and identified all test files related to the ext_authz filter. Here's a complete breakdown:\\n\\n---\\n\\n### **1. HTTP Filter Tests** (`/workspace/test/extensions/filters/http/ext_authz/`)\\n\\n#### **A. Unit Tests**\\n**File:** `ext_authz_test.cc` (4,071 lines)\\n- **Type:** HTTP filter unit tests\\n- **Key Test Classes:**\\n  - `HttpFilterTestBase<T>` - Base test class for filter testing\\n  - `HttpFilterTest` - Main unit tests\\n  - `InvalidMutationTest` - Tests for invalid header/query parameter mutations\\n  - `DecoderHeaderMutationRulesTest` - Tests for header mutation rules\\n  \\n- **Coverage includes:**\\n  - Configuration merging (MergeConfig)\\n  - Error handling (ErrorFailClose, ErrorFailOpen, ErrorCustomStatusCode)\\n  - Header mutations (query parameters, response headers, etc.)\\n  - Header validation rules and expressions\\n  - Authorization response handling\\n  - Dynamic metadata ingestion\\n  - Filter state statistics\\n  - Multiple test scenarios (50+ test cases)\\n\\n#### **B. Config Tests**\\n**File:** `config_test.cc` (309 lines)\\n- **Type:** Filter configuration and factory tests\\n- **Tests:**\\n  - `ExtAuthzFilterHttpTest::ExtAuthzFilterFactoryTestHttp` - HTTP service config\\n  - `ExtAuthzFilterHttpTest::FilterWithServerContext` - Server context setup\\n  - `ExtAuthzFilterGrpcTest::EnvoyGrpc` - Envoy gRPC configuration\\n  - `ExtAuthzFilterGrpcTest::GoogleGrpc` - Google gRPC configuration\\n  \\n- **Coverage:** Filter factory creation, async client manager, thread-local setup\\n\\n#### **C. Integration Tests**\\n**File:** `ext_authz_integration_test.cc` (1,793 lines)\\n- **Type:** End-to-end HTTP integration tests\\n- **Test Suites:**\\n  - `ExtAuthzGrpcIntegrationTest` - GRPC auth service integration (parameterized)\\n  - `ExtAuthzHttpIntegrationTest` - HTTP auth service integration (parameterized)\\n  - `ExtAuthzLocalReplyIntegrationTest` - Local reply handling\\n  \\n- **Key Test Cases:**\\n  - Request/response body handling (HTTP/1.1, HTTP/2)\\n  - Large body handling\\n  - Header mutation propagation\\n  - Timeout scenarios (fail-open, fail-closed)\\n  - Authorization decision enforcement\\n  - Metadata propagation\\n  - Disabled authorization with metadata override\\n  - Direct and redirect responses\\n  - UTF-8 validation\\n  - Retry mechanisms\\n  - Mutation validation\\n  - 30+ parameterized test cases\\n\\n#### **D. Fuzz Tests (GRPC)**\\n**File:** `ext_authz_grpc_fuzz_test.cc` (113 lines)\\n- **Type:** Fuzzing test for GRPC authorization service\\n- **Proto:** `ext_authz_fuzz.proto` - Defines `ExtAuthzTestCaseGrpc` with:\\n  - Filter config\\n  - HTTP request data\\n  - Authorization response (or failure reason)\\n  - Filter metadata\\n- **Corpus:** 11 fuzz test cases in `ext_authz_grpc_corpus/`:\\n  - `bad_config`, `custom_status`, `denied_response`, `error_fail_close`, `example`, `invalid_headers_to_remove`, `invalid_query_parameters_to_set`, `metadata_context`, `no_regex_engine`, `ok_response`, `request_data`\\n\\n#### **E. Fuzz Tests (HTTP)**\\n**File:** `ext_authz_http_fuzz_test.cc` (154 lines)\\n- **Type:** Fuzzing test for HTTP authorization service\\n- **Proto:** `ext_authz_fuzz.proto` - Defines `ExtAuthzTestCaseHttp` with:\\n  - Filter config\\n  - HTTP request data\\n  - Auth result (OK, DENIED, ERROR)\\n  - Filter metadata\\n- **Corpus:** 9 fuzz test cases in `ext_authz_http_corpus/`:\\n  - Similar test cases to GRPC variant\\n\\n#### **F. Fuzz Library**\\n**Files:** \\n- `ext_authz_fuzz_lib.h/cc` (70 lines of CC)\\n- `ReusableFilterFactory` - Factory for creating filters in fuzz tests\\n- `ReusableFuzzerUtil` - Utility for fuzz test setup\\n\\n#### **G. Supporting Test Files**\\n- `logging_test_filter.proto` + `logging_test_filter.cc` - Test filter for logging auth decisions\\n- `ext_authz.yaml` - Integration test configuration (regression test for issue #17344)\\n\\n#### **H. BUILD File**\\nDefines:\\n- `envoy_extension_cc_test` targets for ext_authz_test, config_test, ext_authz_integration_test\\n- `envoy_cc_fuzz_test` targets for GRPC and HTTP fuzzing\\n- `envoy_cc_test_library` for fuzz shared libraries\\n- Dependencies on mocks and protobuf definitions\\n\\n---\\n\\n### **2. Network Filter Tests** (`/workspace/test/extensions/filters/network/ext_authz/`)\\n\\n#### **A. Unit Tests**\\n**File:** `ext_authz_test.cc` (568 lines)\\n- **Type:** Network filter unit tests\\n- **Main Test Class:** `ExtAuthzFilterTest`\\n- **Test Cases:**\\n  - `BadExtAuthzConfig` - Configuration validation\\n  - `OKWithOnData` - Successful authorization\\n  - `DeniedWithOnData` - Denied authorization\\n  - `FailOpen`, `FailClose` - Failure modes\\n  - `DoNotCallCancelonRemoteClose`, `VerifyCancelOnRemoteClose` - Cancellation handling\\n  - `ImmediateOK`, `ImmediateNOK` - Synchronous results\\n  - `ImmediateErrorFailOpen` - Error handling\\n  - `DisabledWithMetadata`, `EnabledWithMetadata` - Metadata control\\n  - 13 test cases total\\n\\n#### **B. Config Tests**\\n**File:** `config_test.cc` (64 lines)\\n- **Type:** Configuration factory tests\\n- **Tests:**\\n  - `ExtAuthzFilterConfigTest::ValidateFail` - Invalid proto validation\\n  - `ExtAuthzFilterConfigTest::ExtAuthzCorrectProto` - Valid proto creation\\n  \\n- **Coverage:** Filter factory from proto, gRPC service setup\\n\\n#### **C. Fuzz Tests**\\n**File:** `ext_authz_fuzz_test.cc` (132 lines)\\n- **Type:** Fuzzing test for network filter\\n- **Proto:** `ext_authz_fuzz.proto` - Defines:\\n  - Filter configuration\\n  - List of actions (onNewConnection, onData, remoteClose, localClose)\\n  - Authorization result (OK, DENIED, ERROR)\\n- **Corpus:** 3 fuzz test crash cases in `ext_authz_corpus/`:\\n  - `crash-72c994c...` (crash ID)\\n  - `crash-309531f...` (crash ID)\\n  - `re_program_size_too_big`\\n- **DEFINE_PROTO_FUZZER** - Fuzzer entry point for network filter\\n\\n#### **D. BUILD File**\\nDefines:\\n- `envoy_extension_cc_test` targets for unit and config tests\\n- `envoy_cc_fuzz_test` for fuzzing\\n- Dependencies on network mocks and ext_authz implementation\\n\\n---\\n\\n### **3. Common/Shared Tests** (`/workspace/test/extensions/filters/common/ext_authz/`)\\n\\n#### **A. GRPC Implementation Tests**\\n**File:** `ext_authz_grpc_impl_test.cc` (459 lines)\\n- **Type:** Unit tests for GRPC client implementation\\n- **Test Class:** `ExtAuthzGrpcClientTest`\\n- **Key Tests:**\\n  - `AuthorizationOk`, `AuthorizationDenied` - Basic auth results\\n  - `AuthorizationOkWithAllAttributes`, `AuthorizationDeniedWithAllAttributes` - Full attributes\\n  - `StreamInfo` - Stream info propagation\\n  - `IndifferentToInvalidHeaders` - Header validation\\n  - `UnknownError`, `CancelledAuthorizationRequest` - Error handling\\n  - `AuthorizationRequestTimeout` - Timeout handling\\n  - `AuthorizationOkWithDynamicMetadata` - Metadata handling\\n  - `AuthorizationOkWithQueryParameters` - Query param support\\n  - `AuthorizationOkWithAppendActions` - Header append actions\\n  - 15 test cases\\n\\n#### **B. HTTP Implementation Tests**\\n**File:** `ext_authz_http_impl_test.cc` (630 lines)\\n- **Type:** Unit tests for HTTP client implementation\\n- **Test Class:** `ExtAuthzHttpClientTest`\\n- **Key Tests:**\\n  - `StreamInfo` - Stream information\\n  - `ClientConfig` - Configuration validation\\n  - `TestDefaultAllowedClientAndUpstreamHeaders` - Header filtering\\n  - `PathPrefixShouldBeSanitized` - Path handling\\n  - `AuthorizationOkWithPathRewrite` - Path rewriting\\n  - `AuthorizationOk`, `AuthorizationOkWithBody` - Basic authorization\\n  - `AuthorizationOkWithRawBody` - Raw body handling\\n  - `AuthorizationDenied`, `AuthorizationDeniedWithAllAttributes` - Denial cases\\n  - `CancelledAuthorizationRequest` - Cancellation\\n  - `NoCluster` - Error handling\\n  - `EncodeRawHeaders` - Header encoding\\n  - 25+ test cases\\n\\n#### **C. Check Request Utils Tests**\\n**File:** `check_request_utils_test.cc` (773 lines)\\n- **Type:** Unit tests for request building utilities\\n- **Test Class:** `CheckRequestUtilsTest`\\n- **Key Tests:**\\n  - `BasicTcp`, `BasicHttp` - Basic request construction\\n  - `TcpPeerCertificate`, `TcpTlsSession` - Certificate handling\\n  - `BasicHttpWithBody`, `BasicHttpWithFullBody` - Body handling\\n  - `BasicHttpWithRequestHeaderAllowlist/Denylist` - Header filtering\\n  - `HeadersAsBytes*` - Header encoding as bytes\\n  - `CheckAttrContextPeer*` - Peer information\\n  - `CheckAttrContextPeerCertificate`, `CheckAttrContextPeerTLSSession` - TLS info\\n  - 22+ test cases\\n\\n#### **D. Mock Classes**\\n**File:** `mocks.h/cc`\\n- `MockClient` - Mock ExtAuthz client interface\\n- `MockRequestCallbacks` - Mock request callbacks\\n- Used across all filter tests\\n\\n#### **E. Test Common Helpers**\\n**File:** `test_common.h/cc`\\n- `TestCommon` class with static helpers:\\n  - `makeMessageResponse()` - Create HTTP response messages\\n  - `makeCheckResponse()` - Create CheckResponse protos\\n  - `makeAuthzResponse()` - Create Response objects\\n  - `makeHeaderValueOption()` - Create header options\\n  - Comparison utilities for vectors, headers, query params\\n- Custom GMOCK matchers: `AuthzErrorResponse`, `AuthzResponseNoAttributes`\\n\\n#### **F. BUILD File**\\nDefines:\\n- `envoy_cc_test` for unit tests\\n- `envoy_cc_mock` for mock libraries\\n- Dependencies on gRPC mocks, tracing mocks, stream info mocks\\n\\n---\\n\\n### **Summary Statistics**\\n\\n| Category | Count | Total Lines |\\n|----------|-------|-------------|\\n| **HTTP Filter Tests** | 2 unit/config | 4,380 |\\n| **HTTP Integration Tests** | 1 | 1,793 |\\n| **HTTP Fuzz Tests** | 2 (GRPC + HTTP) | 267 |\\n| **Network Filter Tests** | 2 unit/config | 632 |\\n| **Network Fuzz Tests** | 1 | 132 |\\n| **Common/Shared Tests** | 3 (GRPC, HTTP, Utils) | 1,862 |\\n| **Mock/Helper Libraries** | 2 | Supporting |\\n| **Total Test Code** | ~11 files | ~9,238 |\\n\\n---\\n\\n### **Key Test Aspects Covered**\\n\\n1. **Configuration Validation** - Proto validation, factory creation\\n2. **Authorization Flows** - OK, Denied, Error with various failure modes\\n3. **Request/Response Handling** - Headers, bodies, metadata, query parameters\\n4. **GRPC vs HTTP Backends** - Both implementation types tested\\n5. **Error Scenarios** - Timeouts, cancellations, malformed responses\\n6. **Header Mutations** - Adding, removing, appending headers with validation rules\\n7. **Metadata Propagation** - Dynamic metadata, filter metadata\\n8. **Body Handling** - Full, partial, raw body encoding\\n9. **TLS/Certificate Info** - Certificate propagation, SNI handling\\n10. **Integration Testing** - End-to-end HTTP flows with real configuration\\n11. **Fuzz Testing** - Randomized input generation for both HTTP and network filters\\n\\nAll files use standard testing frameworks (GoogleTest/gMock) and follow Envoy's testing conventions with mock dependencies.\"}],\"stop_reason\":null,\"stop_sequence\":null,\"usage\":{\"input_tokens\":7,\"cache_creation_input_tokens\":788,\"cache_read_input_tokens\":47474,\"cache_creation\":{\"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens\":0,\"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens\":788},\"output_tokens\":1,\"service_tier\":\"standard\",\"inference_geo\":\"not_available\"}},\"requestId\":\"req_011CYEq88WcN2sTEVXwAu5zb\",\"type\":\"assistant\",\"uuid\":\"4af69f72-3c3b-42fd-a084-eea900c4e2ee\",\"timestamp\":\"2026-02-18T03:33:26.445Z\"}\n",
    "prompt": "Find all test files related to the ext_authz filter in the Envoy codebase. Search thoroughly:\n\n1. Unit tests - look in test/extensions/filters/http/ext_authz/ and test/extensions/filters/network/ext_authz/\n2. Integration tests - look in test/integration/ or test/extensions/filters/http/ext_authz/\n3. Common/shared test files - test/extensions/common/ext_authz/\n4. Any fuzz tests\n5. Any config test files\n\nFor each test file found, read enough to understand:\n- What type of test it is (unit, integration, fuzz, config validation)\n- What aspects of ext_authz it tests\n- Key test fixtures and helpers used\n\nAlso look for BUILD or CMakeLists files that show how tests are compiled and run.",

105\u2192    }\\n   106\u2192    if (filter_metadata.has_value()) {\\n   107\u2192      *proto_config.mutable_filter_metadata() = *filter_metadata;\\n   108\u2192    }\\n   109\u2192    return proto_config;\\n   110\u2192  }\\n   111\u2192\\n   112\u2192  void prepareCheck() {\\n   113\u2192    ON_CALL(decoder_filter_callbacks_, connection())\\n   114\u2192        .WillByDefault(Return(OptRef<const Network::Connection>{connection_}));\\n   115\u2192    connection_.stream_info_.downstream_connection_info_provider_->setRemoteAddress(addr_);\\n   116\u2192    connection_.stream_info_.downstream_connection_info_provider_->setLocalAddress(addr_);\\n   117\u2192  }\\n   118\u2192\\n   119\u2192  void queryParameterTest(const std::string& original_path, const std::string& expected_path,\\n   120\u2192                          const Http::Utility::QueryParamsVector& add_me,\\n   121\u2192                          const std::vector<std::string>& remove_me) {\\n   122\u2192    InSequence s;\\n   123\u2192\\n   124\u2192    // Set up all the typical headers plus a path with a query string that we'll remove later.\\n   125\u2192    request_headers_.addCopy(Http::Headers::get().Host, \\\"example.com\\\");\\n   126\u2192    request_headers_.addCopy(Http::Headers::get().Method, \\\"GET\\\");\\n   127\u2192    request_headers_.addCopy(Http::Headers::get().Path, original_path);\\n   128\u2192    request_headers_.addCopy(Http::Headers::get().Scheme, \\\"https\\\");\\n   129\u2192\\n   130\u2192    prepareCheck();\\n   131\u2192\\n   132\u2192    Filters::Common::ExtAuthz::Response response{};\\n   133\u2192    response.status = Filters::Common::ExtAuthz::CheckStatus::OK;\\n   134\u2192    response.query_parameters_to_set = add_me;\\n   135\u2192    response.query_parameters_to_remove = remove_me;\\n   136\u2192\\n   137\u2192    auto response_ptr = std::make_unique<Filters::Common::ExtAuthz::Response>(response);\\n   138\u2192\\n   139\u2192    EXPECT_CALL(*client_, check(_, _, _, _))\\n   140\u2192        .WillOnce(Invoke([&](Filters::Common::ExtAuthz::RequestCallbacks& callbacks,\\n   141\u2192                             const envoy::service::auth::v3::CheckRequest&, Tracing::Span&,\\n   142\u2192                             const StreamInfo::StreamInfo&) -> void {\\n   143\u2192          callbacks.onComplete(std::move(response_ptr));\\n   144\u2192        }));\\n   145\u2192    EXPECT_CALL(decoder_filter_callbacks_, continueDecoding()).Times(0);\\n   146\u2192    EXPECT_EQ(Http::FilterHeadersStatus::Continue, filter_->decodeHeaders(request_headers_, false));\\n   147\u2192    EXPECT_EQ(Http::FilterDataStatus::Continue, filter_->decodeData(data_, false));\\n   148\u2192    EXPECT_EQ(Http::FilterTrailersStatus::Continue, filter_->decodeTrailers(request_trailers_));\\n   149\u2192    EXPECT_EQ(Http::FilterTrailersStatus::Continue, filter_->decodeTrailers(request_trailers_));\"}]},\"uuid\":\"036ae65b-9d63-4b66-8fe7-d6f8c41adfee\",\"timestamp\":\"2026-02-18T03:32:39.042Z\",\"sourceToolAssistantUUID\":\"9c3448ec-2246-4dd9-9a4c-f688533d62a4\"}\n{\"parentUuid\":\"036ae65b-9d63-4b66-8fe7-d6f8c41adfee\",\"isSidechain\":true,\"userType\":\"external\",\"cwd\":\"/workspace\",\"sessionId\":\"6e5abf8f-0611-4d50-82c4-ab3bbf4bccd5\",\"version\":\"2.1.45\",\"gitBranch\":\"HEAD\",\"agentId\":\"a5ebeda\",\"slug\":\"bright-moseying-sprout\",\"message\":{\"model\":\"claude-haiku-4-5-20251001\",\"id\":\"msg_01Ay3UrQHsnYPWZRedPYSmz5\",\"type\":\"message\",\"role\":\"assistant\",\"content\":[{\"type\":\"tool_use\",\"id\":\"toolu_01YWDEo6wck79AQThgaCSxo9\",\"name\":\"Read\",\"input\":{\"file_path\":\"/workspace/test/extensions/filters/http/ext_authz/config_test.cc\",\"limit\":80},\"caller\":{\"type\":\"direct\"}}],\"stop_reason\":null,\"stop_sequence\":null,\"usage\":{\"input_tokens\":7,\"cache_creation_input_tokens\":7577,\"cache_read_input_tokens\":13816,\"cache_creation\":{\"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens\":0,\"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens\":7577},\"output_tokens\":4,\"service_tier\":\"standard\",\"inference_geo\":\"not_available\"}},\"requestId\":\"req_011CYEq6XmYB8YY9eZgJ5BSd\",\"type\":\"assistant\",\"uuid\":\"d2bbde4c-c35c-47ac-9702-fec197de512b\",\"timestamp\":\"2026-02-18T03:32:39.371Z\"}\n{\"parentUuid\":\"d2bbde4c-c35c-47ac-9702-fec197de512b\",\"isSidechain\":true,\"userType\":\"external\",\"cwd\":\"/workspace\",\"sessionId\":\"6e5abf8f-0611-4d50-82c4-ab3bbf4bccd5\",\"version\":\"2.1.45\",\"gitBranch\":\"HEAD\",\"agentId\":\"a5ebeda\",\"slug\":\"bright-moseying-sprout\",\"type\":\"progress\",\"data\":{\"type\":\"hook_progress\",\"hookEvent\":\"PostToolUse\",\"hookName\":\"PostToolUse:Read\",\"command\":\"callback\"},\"parentToolUseID\":\"toolu_01YWDEo6wck79AQThgaCSxo9\",\"toolUseID\":\"toolu_01YWDEo6wck79AQThgaCSxo9\",\"timestamp\":\"2026-02-18T03:32:39.375Z\",\"uuid\":\"2a18f7de-af6f-45b8-a072-5b189517927f\"}\n before shutdown threading.\\n    61\u2192    // Because its dtor will try to post to event loop to clear thread local slot.\\n    62\u2192    runOnMainBlocking([&]() { async_client_manager_.reset(); });\\n    63\u2192    // TODO(chaoqin-li1123): clean this up when we figure out how to free the threading resources in\\n    64\u2192    // RealThreadsTestHelper.\\n    65\u2192    shutdownThreading();\\n    66\u2192    exitThreads();\\n    67\u2192  }\\n    68\u2192\\n    69\u2192  Http::FilterFactoryCb createFilterFactory(\\n    70\u2192      const envoy::extensions::filters::http::ext_authz::v3::ExtAuthz& ext_authz_config) {\\n    71\u2192    // Delegate call to mock async client manager to real async client manager.\\n    72\u2192 75\u2192            Invoke([&](const Envoy::Grpc::GrpcServiceConfigWithHashKey& config_with_hash_key,\\n    76\u2192                       Stats::Scope& scope, bool skip_cluster_check) {\\n    77\u2192              return async_client_manager_->getOrCreateRawAsyncClientWithHashKey(\\n    78\u2192                  config_with_hash_key, scope, skip_cluster_check);\\n    79\u2192            }));\\n    80\u2192    ExtAuthzFilterConfig false;\\n    34\u2192  bool encode_raw_headers = false;\\n    35\u2192  uint64_t timeout_ms = 300'000; // 5 minutes.\\n    36\u2192  bool validate_mutations = false;\\n    37\u2192  bool retry_5xx = false;\\n    38\u2192  // In some tests a request is never sent. bytes.\\n    42\u2192  bool stats_expect_response_bytes = true;\\n    43\u2192};\\n    44\u2192\\n    45\u2192struct WaitForSuccessfulUpstreamResponseOpts {\\n    46\u2192  // Fields of type Headers    37\u2192namespace ExtAuthz {\\n    38\u2192\\n    39\u2192class ExtAuthzFilterTest : public testing::Test {\\n    40\u2192public:\\n    41\u2192  void initialize(std::string yaml) {\\n    42\u2192    envoy::extensions::filters::network::ext_authz::v3::ExtAuthz proto_config{};\\n    43\u2192    TestUtility::loadFromYaml(yaml, proto_config);\\n    44\u2192    config_ = std::make_shared<Config>(proto_config, *stats_store_.rootScope(), context_);\\n    45\u2192    client_ = new Filters::Common::ExtAuthz::MockClient();\\n    46\u2192    filter_ = std::make_unique<Filter>(config_, Filters::Common::ExtAuthz::ClientPtr{client_});\\n    47\u2192    filter_->initializeReadFilterCallbacks(filter_callbacks_);\\n    48\u2192    addr_ = *Network::Address::PipeInstance::create(\\\"/test/test.sock\\\");\\n    49\u2192\\n    50\u2192    // NOP currently.\\n    51\u2192    filter_->onAboveWriteBufferHighWatermark();\\n    52\u2192    filter_->onBelowWriteBufferLowWatermark();\\n    53\u2192  }\\n    54\u2192\\n    55\u2192  Filters::Common::ExtAuthz::ResponsePtr\\n    56\u2192  makeAuthzResponse(Filters::Common::ExtAuthz::CheckStatus status) {\\n    57\u2192    Filters::Common::ExtAuthz::ResponsePtr response =\\n    58\u2192        std::make_unique<Filters::Common::ExtAuthz::Response>();\\n    59\u2192    response->status = status;\\n    60\u2192    return response;\\n    61\u2192  }\\n    62\u2192\\n    63\u2192  ~ExtAuthzFilterTest() override {\\n    64\u2192    for (const Stats::GaugeSharedPtr& gauge : stats_store_.gauges()) {\\n    65\u2192      EXPECT_EQ(0U, gauge->value()) << \\\"guage name: \\\" << gauge->name();\\n    66\u2192    }\\n    67\u2192  }\\n    68\u2192\\n    69\u2192  void expectOKWithOnData() {\\n    70\u2192    filter_callbacks_.connection_.stream_info_.downstream_connection_info_provider_\\n    71\u2192        ->setRemoteAddress(addr_);\\n    72\u2192    filter_callbacks_.connection_.stream_info_.downstream_connection_info_provider_\\n    73\u2192        ->setLocalAddress(addr_);\\n    74\u2192    EXPECT_CALL(*client_, check(_, _, testing::A<Tracing::Span&>(), _))\\n    75\u2192        .WillOnce(\\n    76\u2192            WithArgs<0>(Invoke([&](Filters::Common::ExtAuthz::RequestCallbacks& callbacks) -> void {\\n    77\u2192              request_callbacks_ = &callbacks;\\n    78\u2192            })));\\n    79\u2192\\n    80\u2192    EXPECT_EQ(Network::FilterStatus::Continue, filter_->onNewConnection());\"}]},\"uuid\":\"0bbedeb4-58b9-4bc0-8262-e7f3df281d11\",\"timestamp\":\"2026-02-18T03:32:39.975Z\",\"sourceToolAssistantUUID\":\"7264e53c-b932-4537-9b5f-fcf4fc5a7ed3\"}\n{\"parentUuid\":\"0bbedeb4-58b9-4bc0-8262-e7f3df281d11\",\"isSidechain\":true,\"userType\":\"external\",\"cwd\":\"/workspace\",\"sessionId\":\"6e5abf8f-0611-4d50-82c4-ab3bbf4bccd5\",\"version\":\"2.1.45\",\"gitBranch\":\"HEAD\",\"agentId\":\"a5ebeda\",\"slug\":\"bright-moseying-sprout\",\"message\":{\"model\":\"claude-haiku-4-5-20251001\",\"id\":\"msg_01Jx9v8qxR7wKxcGxT3CGW9q\",\"type\":\"message\",\"role\":\"assistant\",\"content\":[{\"type\":\"text\",\"text\":\"Now testing::WhenDynamicCastTo;\\n    24\u2192\\n    25\u2192namespace Envoy {\\n    26\u2192namespace Extensions {\\n    27\u2192namespace Filters {\\n    28\u2192namespace Common {\\n    29\u2192namespace ExtAuthz {\\n    30\u2192\\n    31\u2192using Params = std::tuple<envoy::config::core::v3::ApiVersion>;\\n    32\u2192\\n    33\u2192class ExtAuthzGrpcClientTest : public testing::Test {\\n    34\u2192public:\\n    35\u2192  ExtAuthzGrpcClientTest() : async_client_(new Grpc::MockAsyncClient()), timeout_(10) {}\\n    36\u2192\\n    37\u2192  void initialize() {\\n    38\u2192    client_ = std::make_unique<GrpcClientImpl>(Grpc::RawAsyncClientPtr{async_client_}, timeout_);\\n    39\u2192  }\\n    40\u2192\\n    41\u2192  void expectCallSend(envoy::service::auth::v3::CheckRequest& request) {\\n    42\u2192    EXPECT_CALL(*async_client_,\\n    43\u2192                sendRaw(_, _, Grpc::ProtoBufferEq(request), Ref(*(client_.get())), _, _))\\n    44\u2192        .WillOnce(\\n    45\u2192            Invoke([this](absl::string_view service_full_name, absl::string_view method_name,\\n    46\u2192                          Buffer::InstancePtr&&, Grpc::RawAsyncRequestCallbacks&, Tracing::Span&,\\n    47\u2192                          const Http::AsyncClient::RequestOptions& options) -> Grpc::AsyncRequest* {\\n    48\u2192              EXPECT_EQ(\\\"envoy.service.auth.v3.Authorization\\\", service_full_name);\\n    49\u2192              EXPECT_EQ(\\\"Check\\\", method_name);\\n    50\u2192              EXPECT_EQ(timeout_->count(), options.timeout->count());\\n    51\u2192              return &async_request_;\\n    52\u2192            }));\\n    53\u2192  }\\n    54\u2192\\n    55\u2192  Grpc::MockAsyncClient* async_client_;\\n    56\u2192  absl::optional<std::chrono::milliseconds> timeout_;\\n    57\u2192  Grpc::MockAsyncRequest async_request_;\\n    58\u2192  GrpcClientImplPtr client_;\\n    59\u2192  MockRequestCallbacks request_callbacks_;\\n    60\u2192  Tracing::MockSpan span_;\\n    61\u2192  NiceMock<StreamInfo::MockStreamInfo> stream_info_;\\n    62\u2192  envoy::config::core::v3::ApiVersion api_version_;\\n    63\u2192};\\n    64\u2192\\n    65\u2192// Test the client when an ok response is received.\\n    66\u2192TEST_F(ExtAuthzGrpcClientTest, AuthorizationOk) {\\n    67\u2192  initialize();\\n    68\u2192\\n    69\u2192  auto check_response = std::make_unique<envoy::service::auth::v3::CheckResponse>();\\n    70\u2192  auto status = check_response->mutable_status();\\n    71\u2192\\n    72\u2192  ProtobufWkt::Struct expected_dynamic_metadata;\\n    73\u2192  auto* metadata_fields = expected_dynamic_metadata.mutable_fields();\\n    74\u2192  (*metadata_fields)[\\\"foo\\\"] = ValueUtil::stringValue(\\\"ok\\\");\\n    75\u2192  (*metadata_fields)[\\\"bar\\\"] = ValueUtil::numberValue(1);\\n    76\u2192\\n    77\u2192  // The expected dynamic metadata is set to the outer check response, hence regardless the\\n    78\u2192  // check_response's http_response value (either OkHttpResponse or DeniedHttpResponse) the dynamic\\n    79\u2192  // metadata is set to be equal to the check response's dynamic metadata.\\n    80\u2192  check_response->mutable_dynamic_metadata()->MergeFrom(expected_dynamic_metadata);\"}]},\"uuid\":\"537af595-dc50-46cc-8e42-d67dc53a4ed7\",\"timestamp\":\"2026-02-18T03:32:41.230Z\",\"sourceToolAssistantUUID\":\"22ce5859-3169-438c-9e5a-70485dc5f5c3\"}\n{\"parentUuid\":\"537af595-dc50-46cc-8e42-d67dc53a4ed7\",\"isSidechain\":true,\"userType\":\"external\",\"cwd\":\"/workspace\",\"sessionId\":\"6e5abf8f-0611-4d50-82c4-ab3bbf4bccd5\",\"version\":\"2.1.45\",\"gitBranch\":\"HEAD\",\"agentId\":\"a5ebeda\",\"slug\":\"bright-moseying-sprout\",\"message\":{\"model\":\"claude-haiku-4-5-20251001\",\"id\":\"msg_01Jx9v8qxR7wKxcGxT3CGW9q\",\"type\":\"message\",\"role\":\"assistant\",\"content\":[{\"type\":\"tool_use\",\"id\":\"toolu_01FfU7fir7gSYcbJi152gVRQ\",\"name\":\"Read\",\"input\":{\"file_path\":\"/workspace/test/extensions/filters/common/ext_authz/ext_authz_http_impl_test.cc\",\"limit\":80},\"caller\":{\"type\":\"direct\"}}],\"stop_reason\":null,\"stop_sequence\":null,\"usage\":{\"input_tokens\":7,\"cache_creation_input_tokens\":5383,\"cache_read_input_tokens\":21393,\"cache_creation\":{\"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens\":0,\"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens\":5383},\"output_tokens\":1,\"service_tier\":\"standard\",\"inference_geo\":\"not_available\"}},\"requestId\":\"req_011CYEq6hRDBVbajfRVHXdKq\",\"type\":\"assistant\",\"uuid\":\"aece95dd-f0f1-41ac-b2f6-069d01382c3d\",\"timestamp\":\"2026-02-18T03:32:41.515Z\"}\n{\"parentUuid\":\"aece95dd-f0f1-41ac-b2f6-069d01382c3d\",\"isSidechain\":true,\"userType\":\"external\",\"cwd\":\"/workspace\",\"sessionId\":\"6e5abf8f-0611-4d50-82c4-ab3bbf4bccd5\",\"version\":\"2.1.45\",\"gitBranch\":\"HEAD\",\"agentId\":\"a5ebeda\",\"slug\":\"bright-moseying-sprout\",\"type\":\"progress\",\"data\":{\"type\":\"hook_progress\",\"hookEvent\":\"PostToolUse\",\"hookName\":\"PostToolUse:Read\",\"command\":\"callback\"},\"parentToolUseID\":\"toolu_01FfU7fir7gSYcbJi152gVRQ\",\"toolUseID\":\"toolu_01FfU7fir7gSYcbJi152gVRQ\",\"timestamp\":\"2026-02-18T03:32:41.517Z\", createConfig(const std::string& yaml = EMPTY_STRING, uint32_t timeout = 250,\\n    53\u2192                                     const std::string& path_prefix = \\\"/bar\\\") {\\n    54\u2192    21\u2192\\n    22\u2192using testing::Return;\\n    23\u2192using testing::ReturnPointee;\\n    24\u2192using testing::ReturnRef;\\n    25\u2192\\n    26\u2192namespace Envoy {\\n    27\u2192namespace Extensions {\\n    28\u2192namespace Filters {\\n    29\u2192namespace Common {\\n    30\u2192namespace ExtAuthz {\\n    31\u2192namespace {\\n    32\u2192\\n    33\u2192class CheckRequestUtilsTest : public testing::Test {\\n    34\u2192public:\\n    35\u2192  CheckRequestUtilsTest() {\\n    36\u2192    addr_ = std::make_shared<Network::Address::Ipv4Instance>(\\\"1.2.3.4\\\", 1111);\\n    37\u2192    protocol_ = Envoy::Http::Protocol::Http10;\\n    38\u2192    buffer_ = CheckRequestUtilsTest::newTestBuffer(8192);\\n    39\u2192    ssl_ = std::make_shared<NiceMock<Envoy::Ssl::MockConnectionInfo>>();\\n    40\u2192  };\\n    41\u2192\\n    42\u2192  void expectBasicHttp() {\\n    43\u2192    EXPECT_CALL(callbacks_, connection())\\n    44\u2192        .Times(2)\\n    45\u2192        .WillRepeatedly(Return(OptRef<const Network::Connection>{connection_}));\\n    46\u2192    connection_.stream_info_.downstream_connection_info_provider_->setRemoteAddress(addr_);\\n    47\u2192    connection_.stream_info_.downstream_connection_info_provider_->setLocalAddress(addr_);\\n    48\u2192    EXPECT_CALL(Const(connection_), ssl()).Times(2).WillRepeatedly(Return(ssl_));\\n    49\u2192    EXPECT_CALL(callbacks_, streamId()).WillOnce(Return(0));\\n    50\u2192    EXPECT_CALL(callbacks_, decodingBuffer()).WillOnce(Return(buffer_.get()));\\n    51\u2192    EXPECT_CALL(callbacks_, streamInfo()).WillOnce(ReturnRef(req_info_));\\n    52\u2192    EXPECT_CALL(req_info_, protocol()).Times(2).WillRepeatedly(ReturnPointee(&protocol_));\\n    53\u2192    EXPECT_CALL(req_info_, startTime()).WillOnce(Return(SystemTime()));\\n    54\u2192  }\\n    55\u2192\\n    56\u2192  void callHttpCheckAndValidateRequestAttributes(\\n    57\u2192      bool include_peer_certificate,\\n    58\u2192      const envoy::service::auth::v3::AttributeContext_TLSSession* want_tls_session) {\\n    59\u2192    Http::TestRequestHeaderMapImpl request_headers{{\\\"x-envoy-downstream-service-cluster\\\", \\\"foo\\\"},\\n    60\u2192                                                   {\\\":path\\\", \\\"/bar\\\"}};\\n    61\u2192    envoy::service::auth::v3::CheckRequest request;\\n    62\u2192    Protobuf::Map<std::string, std::string> context_extensions;\\n    63\u2192    context_extensions[\\\"key\\\"] = \\\"value\\\";\\n    64\u2192    Protobuf::Map<std::string, std::string> labels;\\n    65\u2192    labels[\\\"label_1\\\"] = \\\"value_1\\\";\\n    66\u2192    labels[\\\"label_2\\\"] = \\\"value_2\\\";\\n    67\u2192\\n    68\u2192    envoy::config::core::v3::Metadata metadata_context;\\n    69\u2192    auto metadata_val = MessageUtil::keyValueStruct(\\\"foo\\\", \\\"bar\\\");\\n    70\u2192    (*metadata_context.mutable_filter_metadata())[\\\"meta.key\\\"] = metadata_val;\\n    71\u2192\\n    72\u2192    CheckRequestUtils::createHttpCheck(\\n    73\u2192        &callbacks_, request_headers, std::move(context_extensions), std::move(metadata_context),\\n    74\u2192        envoy::config::core::v3::Metadata(), request, /*max_request_bytes=*/0,\\n    75\u2192        /*pack_as_bytes=*/false, /*encode_raw_headers=*/false, include_peer_certificate,\\n    76\u2192        want_tls_session != nullptr, labels, nullptr, nullptr);\\n    77\u2192\\n    78\u2192    EXPECT_EQ(\\\"source\\\", request.attributes().source().principal());\\n    79\u2192    EXPECT_EQ(\\\"destination\\\", request.attributes().destination().principal());\\n    80\u2192    EXPECT_EQ(\\\"foo\\\", request.attributes().source().service());\"}]},\"uuid\":\"461b595f-86a4-468c-90af-65a96a10043a\",\"timestamp\":\"2026-02-18T03:32:41.835Z\",\"sourceToolAssistantUUID\":\"42570391-d971-4cd9-91d8-3b767b2906c7\"}\n{\"parentUuid\":\"461b595f-86a4-468c-90af-65a96a10043a\",\"isSidechain\":true,\"userType\":\"external\",\"cwd\":\"/workspace\",\"sessionId\":\"6e5abf8f-0611-4d50-82c4-ab3bbf4bccd5\",\"version\":\"2.1.45\",\"gitBranch\":\"HEAD\",\"agentId\":\"a5ebeda\",\"slug\":\"bright-moseying-sprout\",\"message\":{\"model\":\"claude-haiku-4-5-20251001\",\"id\":\"msg_01Jx9v8qxR7wKxcGxT3CGW9q\",\"type\":\"message\",\"role\":\"assistant\",\"content\":[{\"type\":\"tool_use\",\"id\":\"toolu_017dmbTvbnQYdrmL4usE1jP8\",\"name\":\"Read\",\"input\":{\"file_path\":\"/workspace/test/extensions/filters/http/ext_authz/ext_authz_http_fuzz_test.cc\",\"limit\":60},\"caller\":{\"type\":\"direct\"}}],\"stop_reason\":null,\"stop_sequence\":null,\"usage\":{\"input_tokens\":7,\"cache_creation_input_tokens\":5383,\"cache_read_input_tokens\":21393,\"cache_creation\":{\"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens\":0,\"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens\":5383},\"output_tokens\":1,\"service_tier\":\"standard\",\"inference_geo\":\"not_available\"}},\"requestId\":\"req_011CYEq6hRDBVbajfRVHXdKq\",\"type\":\"assistant\",\"uuid\":\"4e0eb9f8-9e4b-43de-a618-8edd2bf14b2a\",\"timestamp\":\"2026-02-18T03:32:42.175Z\"}\n{\"parentUuid\":\"4e0eb9f8-9e4b-43de-a618-8edd2bf14b2a\",\"isSidechain\":true,\"userType\":\"external\",\"cwd\":\"/workspace\",\"sessionId\":\"6e5abf8f-0611-4d50-82c4-ab3bbf4bccd5\",\"version\":\"2.1.45\",\"gitBranch\":\"HEAD\",\"agentId\":\"a5ebeda\",\"slug\":\"bright-moseying-sprout\",\"type\":\"progress\",\"data\":{\"type\":\"hook_progress\",\"hookEvent\":\"PostToolUse\",\"hookName\":\"PostToolUse:Read\",\"command\":\"callback\"},\"parentToolUseID\":\"toolu_017dmbTvbnQYdrmL4usE1jP8\",\"toolUseID\":\"toolu_017dmbTvbnQYdrmL4usE1jP8\",\"timestamp\":\"2026-02-18T03:32:42.178Z\",\"uuid\":\"4f97cffb-c47d-42b3-b049-9fc7f9c {\\n    32\u2192    PANIC_ON_PROTO_ENUM_SENTINEL_VALUES;\\n    33\u2192  case ExtAuthzTestCaseHttp::OK:\\n    34\u2192    return \\\"200\\\";\\n    35\u2192  case ExtAuthzTestCaseHttp::ERROR:\\n    36\u2192    return \\\"500\\\";\\n    37\u2192  case ExtAuthzTestCaseHttp::DENIED:\\n    38\u2192    return \\\"403\\\";\\n    39\u2192  }\\n    40\u2192  PANIC_DUE_TO_CORRUPT_ENUM;\\n    41\u2192}\\n    42\u2192\\n    43\u2192class ReusableHttpClientFactory {\\n    44\u2192public:\\n    45\u2192  ReusableHttpClientFactory() : http_sync_request_(&internal_http_mock_client_) {\\n    46\u2192 testing::WithArgs;\\n    18\u2192\\n    19\u2192namespace Envoy {\\n    20\u2192namespace Extensions {\\n    21\u2192namespace NetworkFilters {\\n    22\u2192namespace ExtAuthz {\\n    23\u2192\\n    24\u2192Filters::Common::ExtAuthz::ResponsePtr\\n    25\u2192makeAuthzResponse(Filters::Common::ExtAuthz::CheckStatus status) {\\n    26\u2192  Filters::Common::ExtAuthz::ResponsePtr response =\\n    27\u2192      std::make_unique<Filters::Common::ExtAuthz::Response>();\\n    28\u2192  response->status = status;\\n    29\u2192  return response;\\n    30\u2192}\\n    31\u2192\\n    32\u2192Filters::Common::ExtAuthz::CheckStatus resultCaseToCheckStatus(\\n    33\u2192    envoy::extensions::filters::network::ext_authz::Result::ResultSelectorCase result_case) {\\n    34\u2192  Filters::Common::ExtAuthz::CheckStatus check_status;\\n    35\u2192  switch (result_case) {\\n    36\u2192  case envoy::extensions::filters::network::ext_authz::Result::kCheckStatusOk: {\\n    37\u2192    check_status = Filters::Common::ExtAuthz::CheckStatus::OK;\\n    38\u2192    break;\\n    39\u2192  }\\n    40\u2192  case envoy::extensions::filters::network::ext_authz::Result::kCheckStatusError: {\\n    41\u2192    check_status = Filters::Common::ExtAuthz::CheckStatus::Error;\\n    42\u2192    break;\\n    43\u2192  }\\n    44\u2192  case envoy::extensions::filters::network::ext_authz::Result::kCheckStatusDenied: {\\n    45\u2192    check_status = Filters::Common::ExtAuthz::CheckStatus::Denied;\\n    46\u2192    break;\\n    47\u2192  }\\n    48\u2192  default: {\\n    49\u2192    // Unhandled status\\n    50\u2192    PANIC(\\\"A check status handle is missing\\\");\\n    51\u2192  }\\n    52\u2192  }\\n    53\u2192  return check_status;\\n    54\u2192}\\n    55\u2192\\n    56\u2192DEFINE_PROTO_FUZZER(const envoy::extensions::filters::network::ext_authz::ExtAuthzTestCase& input) {\\n    57\u2192  try 15\u2192using testing::Invoke;\\n    16\u2192\\n    17\u2192namespace Envoy {\\n    18\u2192namespace Extensions {\\n    19\u2192namespace NetworkFilters {\\n    20\u2192namespace ExtAuthz {\\n    21\u2192\\n    22\u2192namespace {\\n    23\u2192void expectCorrectProto() {\\n    24\u2192  std::string yaml = R\\\"EOF(\\n    25\u2192  grpc_service:\\n    26\u2192    google_grpc:\\n    27\u2192      target_uri: ext_authz_server\\n    28\u2192      stat_prefix: google\\n    29\u2192  failure_mode_allow: false\\n    30\u2192  stat_prefix: name\\n    31\u2192)EOF\\\";\\n    32\u2192\\n    33\u2192  ExtAuthzConfigFactory factory;\\n    34\u2192  ProtobufTypes::MessagePtr proto_config = factory.createEmptyConfigProto();\\n    35\u2192  TestUtility::loadFromYaml(yaml, *proto_config);\\n    36\u2192\\n    37\u2192  NiceMock<Server::Configuration::MockFactoryContext> context;\\n    38\u2192  EXPECT_CALL(context.server_factory_context_.cluster_manager_.async_client_manager_,\\n    39\u2192              factoryForGrpcService(_, _, _))\\n    40\u2192      .WillOnce(Invoke([](const envoy::config::core::v3::GrpcService&, Stats::Scope&, bool) {\\n    41\u2192        return std::make_unique<NiceMock<Grpc::MockAsyncClientFactory>>();\\n    42\u2192      }));\\n    43\u2192  Network::FilterFactoryCb cb =\\n    44\u2192      factory.createFilterFactoryFromProto(*proto_config, context).value();\\n    45\u2192  Network::MockConnection connection;\\n    46\u2192  EXPECT_CALL(connection, addReadFilter(_));\\n    47\u2192  cb(connection);\\n    48\u2192}\\n    49\u2192} // namespace\\n    50\u2192\\n    51\u2192TEST(ExtAuthzFilterConfigTest, ValidateFail) {\\n    52\u2192  NiceMock<Server::Configuration::MockFactoryContext> context;\\n    53\u2192  envoy::extensions::filters::network::ext_authz::v3::ExtAuthz config;\\n    54\u2192  config.set_transport_api_version(envoy::config::core::v3::ApiVersion::V3);\\n    55\u2192  EXPECT_THROW(ExtAuthzConfigFactory().createFilterFactoryFromProto(config, context).IgnoreError(),\\n    56\u2192               ProtoValidationException);\\n    57\u2192}\\n    58\u2192\\n    59\u2192TEST(ExtAuthzFilterConfigTest, ExtAuthzCorrectProto) { expectCorrectProto(); }\\n    60\u2192\"}]},\"uuid\":\"1b2bb0fd-9aef-46e0-b1bb-aa23c20195c7\",\"timestamp\":\"2026-02-18T03:32:43.735Z\",\"sourceToolAssistantUUID\":\"c203838c-8cf4-431b-96ee-0f988ac307e5\"}\n{\"parentUuid\":\"1b2bb0fd-9aef-46e0-b1bb-aa23c20195c7\",\"isSidechain\":true,\"userType\":\"external\",\"cwd\":\"/workspace\",\"sessionId\":\"6e5abf8f-0611-4d50-82c4-ab3bbf4bccd5\",\"version\":\"2.1.45\",\"gitBranch\":\"HEAD\",\"agentId\":\"a5ebeda\",\"slug\":\"bright-moseying-sprout\",\"message\":{\"model\":\"claude-haiku-4-5-20251001\",\"id\":\"msg_01Uw8qZVhjPfrX9vVEHEZuVS\",\"type\":\"message\",\"role\":\"assistant\",\"content\":[{\"type\":\"tool_use\",\"id\":\"toolu_01BYmBkCQvPaQzDm3kWjDbsy\",\"name\":\"Read\",\"input\":{\"file_path\":\"/workspace/test/extensions/filters/common/ext_authz/test_common.h\",\"limit\":80},\"caller\":{\"type\":\"direct\"}}],\"stop_reason\":null,\"stop_sequence\":null,\"usage\":{\"input_tokens\":7,\"cache_creation_input_tokens\":5208,\"cache_read_input_tokens\":26776,\"cache_creation\":{\"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens\":0,\"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens\":5208},\"output_tokens\":5,\"service_tier\":\"standard\",\"inference_geo\":\"not_available\"}},\"requestId\":\"req_011CYEq6rrjzekyGN9iEziY2\",\"type\":\"assistant\",\"uuid\":\"4997ad6f-830e-440d-aeab-ec528f0f8cb6\",\"timestamp\":\"2026-02-18T03:32:44.023Z\"}\n{\"parentUuid\":\"4997ad6f-830e-440d-aeab-ec528f0f8cb6\",\"isSidechain\":true,\"userType\":\"external\",\"cwd\":\"/workspace\",\"sessionId\":\"6e5abf8f-0611-4d50-82c4-ab3bbf4bccd5\",\"version\":\"2.1.45\",\"gitBranch\":\"HEAD\",\"agentId\":\"a5ebeda\",\"slug\":\"bright-moseying-sprout\",\"type\":\"progress\",\"data\":{\"type\":\"hook_progress\",\"hookEvent\":\"PostToolUse\",\"hookName\":\"PostToolUse:Read\",\"command\":\"callback\"},\"parentToolUseID\":\"toolu_01BYmBkCQvPaQzDm3kWjDbsy\",\"toolUseID\":\"toolu_01BYmBkCQvPaQzDm3kWjDbsy\",\"timestamp\":\"2026-02-18T03:32:44.025Z\",\"uuid\":\"1831af5c-e749-4671-994b-99013d6976dd\"}\n{\"parentUuid\":\"4997ad6f-830e-440 \\\"envoy/type/v3/http_status.pb.h\\\"\\n     6\u2192\\n     7\u2192#include \\\"source/common/http/headers.h\\\"\\n     8\u2192#include \\\"source/extensions/filters/common/ext_authz/ext_authz_grpc_impl.h\\\"\\n     9\u2192\\n    10\u2192#include \\\"test/extensions/filters/common/ext_authz/mocks.h\\\"\\n    11\u2192#include \\\"test/test_common/utility.h\\\"\\n    12\u2192\\n    13\u2192namespace Envoy {\\n    14\u2192namespace Extensions {\\n    15\u2192namespace Filters {\\n    16\u2192namespace Common {\\n    17\u2192namespace ExtAuthz {\\n    18\u2192\\n    19\u2192// NOLINTNEXTLINE(readability-identifier-naming)\\n    20\u2192void PrintTo(const ResponsePtr& ptr, std::ostream* os);\\n    21\u2192\\n    22\u2192// NOLINTNEXTLINE(readability-identifier-naming)\\n    23\u2192void PrintTo(const Response& response, std::ostream* os);\\n    24\u2192\\n    25\u2192struct KeyValueOption {\\n    26\u2192  std::string key;\\n    27\u2192  std::string value;\\n    28\u2192  bool append;\\n    29\u2192};\\n    30\u2192\\n    31\u2192using KeyValueOptionVector = std::vector<KeyValueOption>;\\n    32\u2192using HeaderValueOptionVector = std::vector<envoy::config::core::v3::HeaderValueOption>;\\n    33\u2192using CheckResponsePtr = std::unique_ptr<envoy::service::auth::v3::CheckResponse>;\\n    34\u2192\\n    35\u2192class TestCommon {\\n    36\u2192public:\\n    37\u2192  static Http::ResponseMessagePtr makeMessageResponse(const HeaderValueOptionVector& headers,\\n    38\u2192                                                      const std::string& body = std::string{});\\n    39\u2192\\n    40\u2192  static CheckResponsePtr makeCheckResponse(Grpc::Status::GrpcStatus response_status,\\n    41\u2192                                            envoy::type::v3::StatusCode http_status_code,\\n    42\u2192                                            const std::string& body,\\n    43\u2192                                            const HeaderValueOptionVector& headers,\\n    44\u2192                                            const HeaderValueOptionVector& downstream_headers);\\n    45\u2192\\n    46\u2192  static Response\\n    47\u2192  makeAuthzResponse(CheckStatus status, Http::Code status_code = Http::Code::OK,\\n    48\u2192                    const std::string& body = std::string{},\\n    49\u2192                    const HeaderValueOptionVector& headers = HeaderValueOptionVector{},\\n    50\u2192                    const HeaderValueOptionVector& downstream_headers = HeaderValueOptionVector{});\\n    51\u2192\\n    52\u2192  static HeaderValueOptionVector makeHeaderValueOption(KeyValueOptionVector&& headers);\\n    53\u2192\\n    54\u2192  static bool compareHeaderVector(const UnsafeHeaderVector& lhs, const UnsafeHeaderVector& rhs);\\n    55\u2192  static bool compareQueryParamsVector(const Http::Utility::QueryParamsVector& lhs,\\n    56\u2192                                       const Http::Utility::QueryParamsVector& rhs);\\n    57\u2192  static bool compareVectorOfHeaderName(const std::vector<std::string>& lhs,\\n    58\u2192                                        const std::vector<std::string>& rhs);\\n    59\u2192  static bool compareVectorOfUnorderedStrings(const std::vector<std::string>& lhs,\\n    60\u2192                                              const std::vector<std::string>& rhs);\\n    61\u2192};\\n    62\u2192\\n    63\u2192MATCHER_P(AuthzErrorResponse, status, \\\"\\\") {\\n    64\u2192  // These fields should be always empty when the status is an error.\\n    65\u2192  if (!arg->headers_to_add.empty() || !arg->headers_to_append.empty() || !arg->body.empty()) {\\n    66\u2192    return false;\\n    67\u2192  }\\n    68\u2192  // HTTP status code should be always set to Forbidden.\\n    69\u2192  if (arg->status_code != Http::Code::Forbidden) {\\n    70\u2192    return false;\\n    71\u2192  }\\n    72\u2192  return arg->status == status;\\n    73\u2192}\\n    74\u2192\\n    75\u2192MATCHER_P(AuthzResponseNoAttributes, response, \\\"\\\") {\\n    76\u2192  const bool equal_status = arg->status == response.status;\\n    77\u2192  const bool equal_metadata =\\n    78\u2192      TestUtility::protoEqual(arg->dynamic_metadata, response.dynamic_metadata);\\n    79\u2192  if (!equal_metadata) {\\n    80\u2192    *result_listener << envoy::extensions::filters::http::ext_authz::ExtAuthzTestCaseGrpc;\\n    23\u2192\\n    24\u2192namespace Envoy {\\n    25\u2192namespace Extensions {\\n    26\u2192namespace HttpFilters {\\n    27\u2192namespace ExtAuthz {\\n    28\u2192namespace {\\n    29\u2192\\n    30\u2192class ReusableGrpcClientFactory {\\n    31\u2192public:\\n    32\u2192  ReusableGrpcClientFactory()\\n    33\u2192      : internal_grpc_mock_client_(std::make_shared<NiceMock<Grpc::MockAsyncClient>>()) {\\n    34\u2192    ON_CALL(*internal_grpc_mock_client_, sendRaw(_, _, _, _, _, _))\\n    35\u2192        .WillByDefault(\\n    36\u2192            Invoke([&](absl::string_view, absl::string_view, Buffer::InstancePtr&& serialized_req,\\n    37\u2192                       Grpc::RawAsyncRequestCallbacks&, Tracing::Span&,\\n    38\u2192                       const Http::AsyncClient::RequestOptions&) -> Grpc::AsyncRequest* {\\n    39\u2192              envoy::service::auth::v3::CheckRequest check_request;\\n    40\u2192              EXPECT_TRUE(check_request.ParseFromString(serialized_req->toString()))\\n    41\u2192                  << \\\"Could not parse serialized check request\\\";\\n    42\u2192\\n    43\u2192              ENVOY_LOG_MISC(trace, \\\"Check Request attributes:\\\\n{}\\\",\\n    44\u2192                             check_request.attributes().DebugString());\\n    45\u2192\\n    46\u2192              if (failure_reason_) {\\n    47\u2192                grpc_client_->onFailure(Envoy::Grpc::Status::WellKnownGrpcStatus::Unknown,\\n    48\u2192                                        *failure_reason_, mock_span_);\\n    49\u2192              } else {\\n    50\u2192                grpc_client_->onSuccess(std::move(response_), mock_span_);\\n    51\u2192              }\\n    52\u2192              return &grpc_async_request_;\\n    53\u2192            }));\\n    54\u2192  }\\n    55\u2192\\n    56\u2192  std::unique_ptr<Filters::Common::ExtAuthz::GrpcClientImpl>\\n    57\u2192  newGrpcClientImpl(const ExtAuthzTestCaseGrpc& input) {\\n    58\u2192 \\\"envoy/extensions/filters/http/ext_authz/v3/ext_authz.proto\\\";\\n     6\u2192import \\\"envoy/service/auth/v3/external_auth.proto\\\";\\n     7\u2192import \\\"test/fuzz/common.proto\\\";\\n     8\u2192import \\\"validate/validate.proto\\\";\\n     9\u2192\\n    10\u2192// We only fuzz a single request per iteration.\\n    11\u2192message ExtAuthzTestCaseBase {\\n    12\u2192  envoy.extensions.filters.http.ext_authz.v3.ExtAuthz config = 1\\n    13\u2192      [(validate.rules).message = {required: true}];\\n    14\u2192  // HTTP request data.\\n    15\u2192  test.fuzz.HttpData request_data = 2 [(validate.rules).message = {required: true}];\\n    16\u2192  // Filter metadata.\\n    17\u2192  envoy.config.core.v3.Metadata filter_metadata = 4;\\n    18\u2192}\\n    19\u2192\\n    20\u2192message ExtAuthzTestCaseGrpc {\\n    21\u2192  ExtAuthzTestCaseBase base = 1 [(validate.rules).message = {required: true}];\\n    22\u2192\\n    23\u2192  oneof response_or_failure_reason {\\n    24\u2192    // Full auth check result. Note it is not validated to simulate an untrusted authz server (i.e.\\n    25\u2192    // it can contain garbage mutations).\\n    26\u2192    envoy.service.auth.v3.CheckResponse response = 2 [(validate.rules).message.skip = true];\\n    27\u2192    // If this is set onFailure will be called instead of onSuccess.\\n    28\u2192    string failure_reason = 3;\\n    29\u2192  }\\n    30\u2192}\\n    31\u2192\\n    32\u2192message ExtAuthzTestCaseHttp {\\n    33\u2192  ExtAuthzTestCaseBase base = 1 [(validate.rules).message = {required: true}];\\n    34\u2192\\n    35\u2192  enum AuthResult {\\n    36\u2192    // Possible results for a check call. Taken from\\n    37\u2192    // https://github.com/envoyproxy/envoy/blob/945b5833f094dee31d2971cee8d40553bb0fe714/source/extensions/filters/common/ext_authz/ext_authz.h#L65\\n    38\u2192    OK = 0;\\n    39\u2192    DENIED = 1;\\n    40\u2192    ERROR = 2;\\n    41\u2192  }\\n    42\u2192  // Set default auth check result.\\n    43\u2192  AuthResult result = 3 [(validate.rules).enum.defined_only = true];\\n    44\u2192}\\n    45\u2192\"}]},\"uuid\":\"e3dcbd0e-42cd-4c40-ac0a-242264b805f9\",\"timestamp\":\"2026-02-18T03:32:46.358Z\",\"sourceToolAssistantUUID\":\"ae3170cd-0934-434a-b93d-8a1bf6990680\"}\n{\"parentUuid\":\"e3dcbd0e-42cd-4c40-ac0a-242264b805f9\",\"isSidechain\":true,\"userType\":\"external\",\"cwd\":\"/workspace\",\"sessionId\":\"6e5abf8f-0611-4d50-82c4-ab3bbf4bccd5\",\"version\":\"2.1.45\",\"gitBranch\":\"HEAD\",\"agentId\":\"a5ebeda\",\"slug\":\"bright-moseying-sprout\",\"message\":{\"model\":\"claude-haiku-4-5-20251001\",\"id\":\"msg_0181db7vcN3rxEwCgETMd5XQ\",\"type\":\"message\",\"role\":\"assistant\",\"content\":[{\"type\":\"tool_use\",\"id\":\"toolu_01GjfQzUogLbHVqoqrLYqgGf\",\"name\":\"Read\",\"input\":{\"file_path\":\"/workspace/test/extensions/filters/network/ext_authz/ext_authz_fuzz.proto\",\"limit\":60},\"caller\":{\"type\":\"direct\"}}],\"stop_reason\":null,\"stop_sequence\":null,\"usage\":{\"input_tokens\":7,\"cache_creation_input_tokens\":3985,\"cache_read_input_tokens\":31984,\"cache_creation\":{\"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens\":0,\"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens\":3985},\"output_tokens\":1,\"service_tier\":\"standard\",\"inference_geo\":\"not_available\"}},\"requestId\":\"req_011CYEq71xgT6hxxKCZgTeXg\",\"type\":\"assistant\",\"uuid\":\"dbd07446-8bfa-4378-9449-524784bea6e1\",\"timestamp\":\"2026-02-18T03:32:46.825Z\"}\n{\"parentUuid\":\"dbd07446-8bfa-4378-9449-524784bea6e1\",\"isSidechain\":true,\"userType\":\"external\",\"cwd\":\"/workspace\",\"sessionId\":\"6e5abf8f-0611-4d50-82c4-ab3bbf4bccd5\",\"version\":\"2.1.45\",\"gitBranch\":\"HEAD\",\"agentId\":\"a5ebeda\",\"slug\":\"bright-moseying-sprout\",\"type\":\"progress\",\"data\":{\"type\":\"hook_progress\",\"hookEvent\":\"PostToolUse\",\"hookName\":\"PostToolUse:Read\",\"command\":\"callback\"},\"parentToolUseID\":\"toolu_01GjfQzUogLbHVqoqrLYqgGf\",\"toolUseID\":\"toolu_01GjfQzUogLbHVqoqrLYqgGf\",\"timestamp\":\"2026-02-18T03:32:46.827Z\",\"uuid\":\"0f2ac171-965e-44d6-af0a-a8c3aa9007ed\"}\n{\"parentUuid\":\"dbd07446-     1\u2192syntax = \\\"proto3\\\";\\n     2\u2192package envoy.extensions.filters.network.ext_authz;\\n     3\u2192\\n     4\u2192import \\\"envoy/extensions/filters/network/ext_authz/v3/ext_authz.proto\\\";\\n     5\u2192import \\\"google/protobuf/empty.proto\\\";\\n     6\u2192import \\\"validate/validate.proto\\\";\\n     7\u2192\\n     8\u2192message Result {\\n     9\u2192  oneof result_selector {\\n    10\u2192    option (validate.required) = true;\\n    11\u2192    // Authorization check status\\n    12\u2192    google.protobuf.Empty check_status_error = 1;\\n    13\u2192    google.protobuf.Empty check_status_denied = 2;\\n    14\u2192    google.protobuf.Empty check_status_ok = 3;\\n    15\u2192  }\\n    16\u2192}\\n    17\u2192\\n    18\u2192message OnData {\\n    19\u2192  bytes data = 1;\\n    20\u2192  bool end_stream = 2;\\n    21\u2192  // optional: to set the default authorization check result for this and the following onData()\\n    22\u2192  Result result = 3;\\n    23\u2192}\\n    24\u2192\\n    25\u2192message Action {\\n    26\u2192  oneof action_selector {\\n    27\u2192    option (validate.required) = true;\\n    28\u2192    // Call onNewConnection().\\n    29\u2192    google.protobuf.Empty on_new_connection = 1;\\n    30\u2192    // Call onData().\\n    31\u2192    OnData on_data = 2;\\n    32\u2192    // Connection close\\n    33\u2192    google.protobuf.Empty remote_close = 3;\\n    34\u2192    google.protobuf.Empty local_close = 4;\\n    35\u2192  }\\n    36\u2192}\\n    37\u2192message ExtAuthzTestCase {\\n    38\u2192  envoy.extensions.filters.network.ext_authz.v3.ExtAuthz config = 1\\n    39\u2192      [(validate.rules).message = {required: true}];\\n    40\u2192  repeated Action actions = 2;\\n    41\u2192}\\n
