                                                                                    \u2502\\n\u2502 ext_authz_interface:                                                               \u2502\\n\u2502   Files: ext_authz.h                                                               \u2502\\n\u2502   Provides:                                                                        \u2502\\n\u2502     - Client interface (pure virtual)                                              \u2502\\n\u2502     - RequestCallbacks interface (callback on auth response)                       \u2502\\n\u2502     - Response struct (status, headers, dynamic metadata)                          \u2502\\n\u2502   Dependencies:                                                                    \u2502\\n\u2502     - envoy/http:codes_interface, envoy/stream_info, envoy/tracing                \u2502\\n\u2502     - source/common/http:headers_lib, source/common/tracing                       \u2502\\n\u2502                                                                                     \u2502\\n\u2502 ext_authz_grpc_lib:                                                                \u2502\\n\u2502   Files: ext_authz_grpc_impl.h, ext_authz_grpc_impl.cc                            \u2502\\n\u2502   Provides:                                                                        \u2502\\n\u2502     - GrpcClientImpl class (implements Client interface)                            \u2502\\n\u2502     - AsyncClient callbacks for gRPC responses                                     \u2502\\n\u2502   Key Operations:                                                                  \u2502\\n\u2502     - Makes CheckRequest to Authorization service (gRPC)                           \u2502\\n\u2502     - Receives CheckResponse with header/metadata mutations                        \u2502\\n\u2502   Dependencies:                                                                    \u2502\\n\u2502     - check_request_utils_lib                                                      \u2502\\n\u2502     - envoy/grpc:async_client*, envoy/upstream:cluster_manager                    \u2502\\n\u2502     - source/common/grpc:async_client_lib, typed_async_client_lib                 \u2502\\n\u2502     - envoy/service/auth/v3:external_auth.pb                                      \u2502\\n\u2502     - envoy/extensions/filters/http/ext_authz/v3:ext_authz.pb                    \u2502\\n\u2502                                                                                     \u2502\\n\u2502 ext_authz_http_lib:                                                                \u2502\\n\u2502   Files: ext_authz_http_impl.h, ext_authz_http_impl.cc                            \u2502\\n\u2502   Provides:                                                                        \u2502\\n\u2502     - RawHttpClientImpl class (implements Client interface)                         \u2502\\n\u2502     - HTTP async client management                                                \u2502\\n\u2502   Key Operations:                                                                  \u2502\\n\u2502     - Makes CheckRequest to Authorization service (HTTP)                           \u2502\\n\u2502     - Receives CheckResponse with header/metadata mutations                        \u2502\\n\u2502   Dependencies:                                                                    \u2502\\n\u2502     - check_request_utils_lib                                                      \u2502\\n\u2502     - envoy/upstream:cluster_manager                                               \u2502\\n\u2502     - source/common/http:async_client_lib                                          \u2502\\n\u2502     - source/common/common:matchers_lib                                            \u2502\\n\u2502     - envoy/service/auth/v3:external_auth.pb, type/matcher/v3:string.pb          \u2502\\n\u2502                                                                                     \u2502\\n\u2502 check_request_utils_lib:                                                           \u2502\\n\u2502   Files: check_request_utils.h, check_request_utils.cc                            \u2502\\n\u2502   Provides:                                                                        \u2502\\n\u2502     - CheckRequestUtils class with static methods                                 \u2502\\n\u2502     - createHttpCheck() - builds CheckRequest from HTTP stream                    \u2502\\n\u2502     - createTcpCheck() - builds CheckRequest from network stream                  \u2502\\n\u2502     - Header/parameter matchers for filtering what gets sent to auth service       \u2502\\n\u2502   Used By: HTTP filter, network filter, both gRPC and HTTP clients                \u2502\\n\u2502   Dependencies:                                                                    \u2502\\n\u2502     - ext_authz_interface                                                          \u2502\\n\u2502     - Grpc/Http client interfaces                                                  \u2502\\n\u2502     - Cluster manager                                                              \u2502\\n\u2502     - envoy/service/auth/v3:attribute_context.pb                                  \u2502\\n\u2502                                                                                     \u2502\\n\u2502 SHARED USAGE:                                                                      \u2502\\n\u2502   Both HTTP and network ext_authz filters depend on:                              \u2502\\n\u2502     \u2022 ext_authz_interface (abstract client)                                        \u2502\\n\u2502     \u2022 ext_authz_grpc_lib (always used for gRPC path)                              \u2502\\n\u2502     \u2022 check_request_utils (for building requests)                                 \u2502\\n\u2502                                                                                     \u2502\\n\u2502   HTTP filter additionally uses:                                                  \u2502\\n\u2502     \u2022 ext_authz_http_lib (for HTTP auth service)                                  \u2502\\n\u2502     \u2022 mutation_rules_lib (for validation)                                         \u2502\\n\u2502     \u2022 filter factory system                                                        \u2502\\n\u2514\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2518\\n\\nPROTOBUF API DEPENDENCIES\\n========================\\n\\next_authz Configuration:\\n  @envoy_api//envoy/extensions/filters/http/ext_authz/v3:pkg_cc_proto\\n    Defines:\\n      \u2022 ExtAuthz (main filter config)\\n        - grpc_service / http_service (mutually exclusive)\\n        - failure_mode_allow, clear_route_cache\\n        - with_request_body (buffer settings)\\n        - metadata_context_namespaces\\n        - decoder_header_mutation_rules\\n        - etc.\\n      \u2022 ExtAuthzPerRoute (per-route overrides)\\n      \u2022 CheckSettings (per-route check options)\\n\\nAuthorization Service:\\n  @envoy_api//envoy/service/auth/v3:pkg_cc_proto\\n    Defines:\\n      \u2022 CheckRequest (sent to auth service)\\n        - attributes: AttributeContext\\n      \u2022 CheckResponse (received from auth service)\\n        - status: CheckStatus (ALLOW, DENY, ERROR)\\n        - headers: response headers\\n        - dynamic_metadata: Struct\\n        - denied_response / ok_response\\n      \u2022 AttributeContext (request context)\\n        - request: HttpRequest\\n        - destination: Peer\\n        - source: Peer\\n        - metadata_context\\n\\nSupporting Protos:\\n  @envoy_api//envoy/config/core/v3:pkg_cc_proto\\n    Used for: GrpcService, HttpUri, Metadata, HeaderValueOption\\n  @envoy_api//envoy/config/common/mutation_rules/v3:pkg_cc_proto\\n    Used for: header mutation validation rules\\n  @envoy_api//envoy/type/matcher/v3:pkg_cc_proto\\n    Used for: header matching patterns\\n  @envoy_api//envoy/type/v3:pkg_cc_proto\\n    Used for: HttpStatus\\n\\nKEY DATA FLOWS\\n==============\\n\\nINCOMING REQUEST:\\n  1. HTTP stream arrives \u2192 ext_authz filter's decodeHeaders()\\n  2. Check if filter is disabled (runtime flag)\\n  3. Build CheckRequest using check_request_utils::createHttpCheck()\\n     \u2022 Extract HTTP headers, path, method\\n     \u2022 Include request body if configured (with_request_body)\\n     \u2022 Optionally include TLS info\\n     \u2022 Add context extensions from config\\n  4. Call client->check(CheckRequest)\\n  5. Based on configuration (gRPC vs HTTP), route to:\\n     \u2022 GrpcClientImpl \u2192 gRPC async client \u2192 Authorization service\\n     \u2022 RawHttpClientImpl \u2192 HTTP async client \u2192 Authorization service\\n  6. Block decoding, wait for response (asynchronous)\\n\\nAUTH SERVICE RESPONSE:\\n  1. Response received in onComplete() callback\\n  2. Extract CheckResponse with mutations:\\n     \u2022 headers_to_add / headers_to_set / headers_to_remove\\n     \u2022 query_parameters_to_add / query_parameters_to_remove\\n  3. Validate mutations if validate_mutations=true\\n  4. Apply mutations to request:\\n     \u2022 Add/set/remove headers (with mutation rules checks)\\n     \u2022 Modify query parameters\\n  5. Store dynamic metadata from response\\n  6. Optionally clear route cache\\n  7. Continue decoding (if OK) or send denial response\\n\\nENCODING PHASE:\\n  1. Response headers can include headers_to_add from auth response\\n  2. Filter state info about auth check stored in FilterState\\n\\nSTATISTICS TRACKING:\\n  Per-instance stats counters:\\n    \u2022 ext_authz.ok \u2192 CheckStatus::OK\\n    \u2022 ext_authz.denied \u2192 CheckStatus::DENIED\\n    \u2022 ext_authz.error \u2192 CheckStatus::ERROR\\n    \u2022 ext_authz.disabled \u2192 Filter disabled\\n    \u2022 ext_authz.failure_mode_allowed \u2192 Passed due to failure mode\\n    \u2022 ext_authz.invalid \u2192 Invalid response\\n    \u2022 ext_authz.ignored_dynamic_metadata \u2192 Metadata ignored\\n    \u2022 ext_authz.filter_state_name_collision \u2192 State collision\\n\\nTABLE\\ncat /tmp/ext_authz_detailed_deps.txt\\n\",\"description\":\"Create detailed dependency table\"},\"caller\":{\"type\":\"direct\"}}],\"stop_reason\":null,\"stop_sequence\":null,\"usage\":{\"input_tokens\":4,\"cache_creation_input_tokens\":2977,\"cache_read_input_tokens\":50130,\"cache_creation\":{\"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens\":0,\"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens\":2977},\"output_tokens\":4,\"service_tier\":\"standard\",\"inference_geo\":\"not_available\"}},\"requestId\":\"req_011CYEqBmmo463GPL8keP11y\",\"type\":\"assistant\",\"uuid\":\"79827d13-4ce2-4559-9541-49488e49863d\",\"timestamp\":\"2026-02-18T03:34:15.844Z\"}\n{\"parentUuid\":\"79827d13-4ce2-4559-9541-49488e49863d\",\"isSidechain\":true,\"userType\":\"external\",\"cwd\":\"/workspace\",\"sessionId\":\"6e5abf8f-0611-4d50-82c4-ab3bbf4bccd5\",\"version\":\"2.1.45\",\"gitBranch\":\"HEAD\",\"agentId\":\"a4ceb4b\",\"slug\":\"bright-moseying-sprout\",\"type\":\"user\",\"message\":{\"role\":\"user\",\"content\":[{\"tool_use_id\":\"toolu_01VvMNtLB1uyexkYsSSinzF5\",\"type\":\"tool_result\",\"content\":\"DETAILED ext_authz_http_lib:                                                                \u2502\\n\u2502   Files: ext_authz_http_impl.h, ext_authz_http_impl.cc                            \u2502\\n\u2502   Provides:                                                                        \u2502\\n\u2502     - RawHttpClientImpl class (implements Client interface)                         \u2502\\n\u2502     - HTTP async client management                                                \u2502\\n\u2502   Key Operations:                                                                  \u2502\\n\u2502     - Makes CheckRequest to Authorization service (HTTP)                           \u2502\\n\u2502     - Receives CheckResponse with header/metadata mutations                        \u2502\\n\u2502   Dependencies:                                                                    \u2502\\n\u2502     - check_request_utils_lib                                                      \u2502\\n\u2502     - envoy/upstream:cluster_manager                                               \u2502\\n\u2502     - source/common/http:async_client_lib                                          \u2502\\n\u2502     - source/common/common:matchers_lib                                            \u2502\\n\u2502     - envoy/service/auth/v3:external_auth.pb, type/matcher/v3:string.pb          \u2502\\n\u2502                                                                                     \u2502\\n\u2502 check_request_utils_lib:                                                           \u2502\\n\u2502   Files: check_request_utils.h, check_request_utils.cc                            \u2502\\n\u2502   Provides:                                                                        \u2502\\n\u2502     - CheckRequestUtils class with static methods                                 \u2502\\n\u2502     - createHttpCheck() - builds CheckRequest from HTTP stream                    \u2502\\n\u2502     - createTcpCheck() - builds CheckRequest from network stream                  \u2502\\n\u2502     - Header/parameter matchers for filtering what gets sent to auth service       \u2502\\n\u2502   Used By: HTTP filter, network filter, both gRPC and HTTP clients                \u2502\\n\u2502   Dependencies:                                                                    \u2502\\n\u2502     - ext_authz_interface                                                          \u2502\\n\u2502     - Grpc/Http client interfaces                                                  \u2502\\n\u2502     - Cluster manager                                                              \u2502\\n\u2502     - envoy/service/auth/v3:attribute_context.pb                                  \u2502\\n\u2502                                                                                     \u2502\\n\u2502 SHARED USAGE:                                                                      \u2502\\n\u2502   Both HTTP and network ext_authz filters depend on:                              \u2502\\n\u2502     \u2022 ext_authz_interface (abstract client)                                        \u2502\\n\u2502     \u2022 ext_authz_grpc_lib (always used for gRPC path)                              \u2502\\n\u2502     \u2022 check_request_utils (for building requests)                                 \u2502\\n\u2502                                                                                     \u2502\\n\u2502   HTTP filter additionally uses:                                                  \u2502\\n\u2502     \u2022 ext_authz_http_lib (for HTTP auth service)                                  \u2502\\n\u2502     \u2022 mutation_rules_lib (for validation)                                         \u2502\\n\u2502     \u2022 filter factory system                                                        \u2502\\n\u2514\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2518\\n\\nPROTOBUF API DEPENDENCIES\\n========================\\n\\next_authz Configuration:\\n  @envoy_api//envoy/extensions/filters/http/ext_authz/v3:pkg_cc_proto\\n    Defines:\\n      \u2022 ExtAuthz (main filter config)\\n        - grpc_service / http_service (mutually exclusive)\\n        - failure_mode_allow, clear_route_cache\\n        - with_request_body (buffer settings)\\n        - metadata_context_namespaces\\n        - decoder_header_mutation_rules\\n        - etc.\\n      \u2022 ExtAuthzPerRoute (per-route overrides)\\n      \u2022 CheckSettings (per-route check options)\\n\\nAuthorization Service:\\n  @envoy_api//envoy/service/auth/v3:pkg_cc_proto\\n    Defines:\\n      \u2022 CheckRequest (sent to auth service)\\n        - attributes: AttributeContext\\n      \u2022 CheckResponse (received from auth service)\\n        - status: CheckStatus (ALLOW, DENY, ERROR)\\n        - headers: response headers\\n        - dynamic_metadata: Struct\\n        - denied_response / ok_response\\n      \u2022 AttributeContext (request context)\\n        - request: HttpRequest\\n        - destination: Peer\\n        - source: Peer\\n        - metadata_context\\n\\nSupporting Protos:\\n  @envoy_api//envoy/config/core/v3:pkg_cc_proto\\n    Used for: GrpcService, HttpUri, Metadata, HeaderValueOption\\n  @envoy_api//envoy/config/common/mutation_rules/v3:pkg_cc_proto\\n    Used for: header mutation validation rules\\n  @envoy_api//envoy/type/matcher/v3:pkg_cc_proto\\n    Used for: header matching patterns\\n  @envoy_api//envoy/type/v3:pkg_cc_proto\\n    Used for: HttpStatus\\n\\nKEY DATA FLOWS\\n==============\\n\\nINCOMING REQUEST:\\n  1. HTTP stream arrives \u2192 ext_authz filter's decodeHeaders()\\n  2. Check if filter is disabled (runtime flag)\\n  3. Build CheckRequest using check_request_utils::createHttpCheck()\\n     \u2022 Extract HTTP headers, path, method\\n     \u2022 Include request body if configured (with_request_body)\\n     \u2022 Optionally include TLS info\\n     \u2022 Add context extensions from config\\n  4. Call client->check(CheckRequest)\\n  5. Based on configuration (gRPC vs HTTP), route to:\\n     \u2022 GrpcClientImpl \u2192 gRPC async client \u2192 Authorization service\\n     \u2022 RawHttpClientImpl \u2192 HTTP async client \u2192 Authorization service\\n  6. Block decoding, wait for response (asynchronous)\\n\\nAUTH SERVICE RESPONSE:\\n  1. Response received in onComplete() callback\\n  2. Extract CheckResponse with mutations:\\n     \u2022 headers_to_add / headers_to_set / headers_to_remove\\n     \u2022 query_parameters_to_add / query_parameters_to_remove\\n  3. Validate mutations if validate_mutations=true\\n  4. Apply mutations to request:\\n     \u2022 Add/set/remove headers (with mutation rules checks)\\n     \u2022 Modify query parameters\\n  5. Store dynamic metadata from response\\n  6. Optionally clear route cache\\n  7. Continue decoding (if OK) or send denial response\\n\\nENCODING PHASE:\\n  1. Response headers can include headers_to_add from auth response\\n  2. Filter state info about auth check stored in FilterState\\n\\nSTATISTICS TRACKING:\\n  Per-instance stats counters:\\n    \u2022 ext_authz.ok \u2192 CheckStatus::OK\\n    \u2022 ext_authz.denied \u2192 CheckStatus::DENIED\\n    \u2022 ext_authz.error \u2192 CheckStatus::ERROR\\n    \u2022 ext_authz.disabled \u2192 Filter disabled\\n    \u2022 ext_authz.failure_mode_allowed \u2192 Passed due to failure mode\\n    \u2022 ext_authz.invalid \u2192 Invalid response\\n    \u2022 ext_authz.ignored_dynamic_metadata \u2192 Metadata ignored\\n    \u2022 ext_authz.filter_state_name_collision \u2192 State collision\",\"is_error\":false}]},\"uuid\":\"b387fb40-7469-471e-8bfe-20527a4b27c0\",\"timestamp\":\"2026-02-18T03:34:16.013Z\",\"sourceToolAssistantUUID\":\"79827d13-4ce2-4559-9541-49488e49863d\"}\n{\"parentUuid\":\"b387fb40-7469-471e-8bfe-20527a4b27c0\",\"isSidechain\":true,\"userType\":\"external\",\"cwd\":\"/workspace\",\"sessionId\":\"6e5abf8f-0611-4d50-82c4-ab3bbf4bccd5\",\"version\":\"2.1.45\",\"gitBranch\":\"HEAD\",\"agentId\":\"a4ceb4b\",\"slug\":\"bright-moseying-sprout\",\"message\":{\"model\":\"claude-haiku-4-5-20251001\",\"id\":\"msg_0173L9nNQGXLLPMuPKc34s55\",\"type\":\"message\",\"role\":\"assistant\",\"content\":[{\"type\":\"text\",\"text\":\"Perfect! Now let me create one final summary with absolute file paths:\"}],\"stop_reason\":null,\"stop_sequence\":null,\"usage\":{\"input_tokens\":3,\"cache_creation_input_tokens\":6897,\"cache_read_input_tokens\":53107,\"cache_creation\":{\"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens\":0,\"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens\":6897},\"output_tokens\":1,\"service_tier\":\"standard\",\"inference_geo\":\"not_available\"}},\"requestId\":\"req_011CYEqDmx1sD6D5TS8Zxk6U\",\"type\":\"assistant\",\"uuid\":\"b7036b29-0403-4127-94f6-b1e74ca2fe30\",\"timestamp\":\"2026-02-18T03:34:17.084Z\"}\n{\"parentUuid\":\"b7036b29-0403-4127-94f6-b1e74ca2fe30\",\"isSidechain\":true,\"userType\":\"external\",\"cwd\":\"/workspace\",\"sessionId\":\"6e5abf8f-0611-4d50-82c4-ab3bbf4bccd5\",\"version\":\"2.1.45\",\"gitBranch\":\"HEAD\",\"agentId\":\"a4ceb4b\",\"slug\":\"bright-moseying-sprout\",\"message\":{\"model\":\"claude-haiku-4-5-20251001\",\"id\":\"msg_0173L9nNQGXLLPMuPKc34s55\",\"type\":\"message\",\"role\":\"assistant\",\"content\":[{\"type\":\"tool_use\",\"id\":\"toolu_012fbYcJQAHJz6XC1uaR8LZZ\",\"name\":\"Bash\",\"input\":{\"command\":\"cat << 'SUMMARY'\\n\\n================================================================================\\nEXT_AUTHZ HTTP FILTER - COMPLETE DEPENDENCY MAPPING SUMMARY\\n================================================================================\\n\\nEXECUTIVE SUMMARY\\n=================\\n\\nThe ext_authz HTTP filter is an external authorization system that intercepts \\nHTTP requests, sends them to an external authorization service (via gRPC or HTTP),\\nand applies mutations to requests/responses based on the service's decision.\\n\\nIt is both a CONSUMER of many Envoy core libraries and a PROVIDER to the filter \\nchain system through registry-based instantiation.\\n\\nKEY STATISTICS:\\n- ~40KB of C++ code\\n- ~15 direct upstream dependencies (from BUILD file)\\n- Supports both gRPC and HTTP backends\\n- Shared libraries used by network filter variant\\n- Highly modular with clear separation of concerns\\n\\n================================================================================\\nABSOLUTE FILE PATHS AND LOCATIONS\\n================================================================================\\n\\nMAIN FILTER IMPLEMENTATION:\\n  /workspace/source/extensions/filters/http/ext_authz/BUILD\\n  /workspace/source/extensions/filters/http/ext_authz/ext_authz.h\\n  /workspace/source/extensions/filters/http/ext_authz/ext_authz.cc (41KB)\\n  /workspace/source/extensions/filters/http/ext_authz/config.h\\n  /workspace/source/extensions/filters/http/ext_authz/config.cc\\n\\nCOMMON LIBRARY (shared with network filter):\\n  /workspace/source/extensions/filters/common/ext_authz/BUILD\\n  /workspace/source/extensions/filters/common/ext_authz/ext_authz.h\\n  /workspace/source/extensions/filters/common/ext_authz/ext_authz_grpc_impl.h\\n  /workspace/source/extensions/filters/common/ext_authz/ext_authz_grpc_impl.cc\\n  /workspace/source/extensions/filters/common/ext_authz/ext_authz_http_impl.h\\n  /workspace/source/extensions/filters/common/ext_authz/ext_authz_http_impl.cc\\n  /workspace/source/extensions/filters/common/ext_authz/check_request_utils.h\\n  /workspace/source/extensions/filters/common/ext_authz/check_request_utils.cc\\n\\nPROTOBUF DEFINITIONS:\\n  /workspace/api/envoy/extensions/filters/http/ext_authz/v3/ext_authz.proto\\n  /workspace/api/envoy/extensions/filters/http/ext_authz/v3/BUILD\\n  /workspace/api/envoy/service/auth/v3/external_auth.proto\\n  /workspace/api/envoy/service/auth/v3/attribute_context.proto\\n\\nMUTATION RULES (dependency):\\n  /workspace/source/extensions/filters/common/mutation_rules/BUILD\\n  /workspace/source/extensions/filters/common/mutation_rules/mutation_rules.h\\n\\nFACTORY BASE (dependency):\\n  /workspace/source/extensions/filters/http/common/factory_base.h\\n  /workspace/source/extensions/filters/http/common/BUILD\\n\\nNETWORK VARIANT (downstream consumer):\\n  /workspace/source/extensions/filters/network/ext_authz/BUILD\\n  /workspace/source/extensions/filters/network/ext_authz/ext_authz.h\\n  /workspace/source/extensions/filters/network/ext_authz/ext_authz.cc\\n  /workspace/source/extensions/filters/network/ext_authz/config.h\\n  /workspace/source/extensions/filters/network/ext_authz/config.cc\\n\\nCONFIGURATION & REGISTRATION:\\n  /workspace/source/extensions/extensions_build_config.bzl\\n  /workspace/source/extensions/extensions_metadata.yaml\\n  /workspace/source/extensions/filters/http/well_known_names.h\\n\\nTESTS:\\n  /workspace/test/extensions/filters/http/ext_authz/BUILD\\n\\n================================================================================\\nUPSTREAM DEPENDENCY CATEGORIES (FROM BUILD FILE ANALYSIS)\\n================================================================================\\n\\n1. CORE ENVOY INTERFACES (from envoy/ directory):\\n   - envoy/http:codes_interface\\n   - envoy/stats:stats_macros\\n   - envoy/runtime:runtime_interface\\n   - envoy/upstream:cluster_manager_interface\\n   - envoy/registry:registry\\n   - envoy/grpc:async_client_interface\\n   - envoy/grpc:async_client_manager_interface\\n\\n2. COMMON INFRASTRUCTURE LIBRARIES:\\n   - source/common/buffer:buffer_lib\\n   - source/common/common:assert_lib\\n   - source/common/common:empty_string\\n   - source/common/common:enum_to_int\\n   - source/common/common:matchers_lib\\n   - source/common/common:minimal_logger_lib\\n   - source/common/http:codes_lib\\n   - source/common/http:utility_lib\\n   - source/common/http:headers_lib\\n   - source/common/router:config_lib\\n   - source/common/runtime:runtime_protos_lib\\n   - source/common/config:utility_lib\\n   - source/common/protobuf:utility_lib\\n   - source/common/grpc:async_client_lib\\n   - source/common/grpc:typed_async_client_lib\\n   - source/common/http:async_client_lib\\n   - source/common/tracing:http_tracer_lib\\n\\n3. FILTER-SPECIFIC LIBRARIES (ext_authz stack):\\n   - source/extensions/filters/common/ext_authz:ext_authz_interface\\n   - source/extensions/filters/common/ext_authz:ext_authz_grpc_lib\\n   - source/extensions/filters/common/ext_authz:ext_authz_http_lib\\n   - source/extensions/filters/common/ext_authz:check_request_utils_lib\\n   - source/extensions/filters/common/mutation_rules:mutation_rules_lib\\n\\n4. FILTER FACTORY SYSTEM:\\n   - source/extensions/filters/http/common:factory_base_lib\\n\\n5. PROTOBUF/API DEFINITIONS:\\n   - @envoy_api//envoy/config/core/v3:pkg_cc_proto\\n   - @envoy_api//envoy/extensions/filters/http/ext_authz/v3:pkg_cc_proto\\n   - @envoy_api//envoy/service/auth/v3:pkg_cc_proto\\n   - @envoy_api//envoy/config/common/mutation_rules/v3:pkg_cc_proto\\n   - @envoy_api//envoy/type/matcher/v3:pkg_cc_proto\\n   - @envoy_api//envoy/type/v3:pkg_cc_proto\\n\\n================================================================================\\nDOWNSTREAM CONSUMERS\\n================================================================================\\n\\n1. DIRECT FILTER CHAIN CONSUMERS:\\n   - HTTP filter chains that load ext_authz via:\\n     Factory name: \\\"envoy.filters.http.ext_authz\\\"\\n     Registry type: Server::Configuration::NamedHttpFilterConfigFactory\\n\\n2. SHARED LIBRARY CONSUMERS:\\n   - /workspace/source/extensions/filters/network/ext_authz/\\n     (Network layer variant, uses common libraries)\\n\\n3. CONFIGURATION SYSTEM:\\n   - /workspace/source/extensions/extensions_build_config.bzl\\n     (Registers ext_authz in filter registry)\\n   - /workspace/source/extensions/extensions_metadata.yaml\\n     (Documents filter capabilities and stability)\\n\\n4. POTENTIAL METADATA CONSUMERS:\\n   - Any filter that reads \\\"envoy.filters.http.ext_authz\\\" from dynamic metadata\\n   - Example: jwt_authn can have metadata passed through metadata_context_namespaces\\n\\n================================================================================\\nDEPENDENCY DEPTH ANALYSIS\\n================================================================================\\n\\nDIRECT DEPENDENCIES (first level):\\n  - 17 libraries from BUILD file deps array\\n\\nTRANSITIVE DEPENDENCIES (2+ levels deep):\\n  - HTTP layer: Http::HeaderMap, Http::RequestHeaderMap, etc.\\n  - gRPC layer: Grpc::AsyncClient, Grpc::RawAsyncClient, etc.\\n  - Protobuf layer: Multiple generated proto C++ files\\n  - Statistics: Stats::Scope, Stats::Counter, etc.\\n  - Logging: Logger implementation\\n  - Threading: Envoy's thread pool system\\n  - Runtime: Feature flag system\\n\\nTOTAL DEPENDENCY CHAIN:\\n  Estimated 50+ libraries transitively (through common/ and interface dependencies)\\n\\nKEY INTEGRATION POINTS:\\n  1. FilterChainFactoryCallbacks - for filter instantiation\\n  2. StreamDecoderFilterCallbacks - for request interception\\n  3. StreamEncoderFilterCallbacks - for response modification\\n  4. ClusterManager - for auth service cluster access\\n  5. Stats::Scope - for metrics collection\\n  6. Runtime::Loader - for feature flags\\n  7. Router routing table - for per-route config\\n\\n================================================================================\\nCIRCULAR DEPENDENCY ANALYSIS\\n================================================================================\\n\\nNO CIRCULAR DEPENDENCIES FOUND:\\n\\nThe design follows a clean hierarchy:\\n  \\n  Interfaces (envoy/*)\\n       \u2193\\n  Common Libraries (source/common/*)\\n       \u2193\\n  Filter-Specific Common (source/extensions/filters/common/ext_authz/)\\n       \u2193\\n  HTTP Filter (source/extensions/filters/http/ext_authz/)\\n       \u2193\\n  Filter Factory Registration (config factory)\\n\\nThe network variant is isolated and reuses the common layer independently.\\n\\n================================================================================\\nBUILD CONFIGURATION DETAILS\\n================================================================================\\n\\nHTTP Filter Libraries Defined in BUILD:\\n\\n1. \\\"ext_authz\\\" library\\n   Type: envoy_cc_library\\n   Purpose: Main filter implementation\\n   Visibility: Package-scoped\\n   Test target exists: yes\\n\\n2. \\\"config\\\" extension\\n   Type: envoy_cc_extension\\n   Purpose: Filter factory and registration\\n   Registration macro: LEGACY_REGISTER_FACTORY\\n   Registered as: \\\"envoy.ext_authz\\\" (legacy) and \\\"envoy.filters.http.ext_authz\\\"\\n\\nCommon Library Definitions in BUILD:\\n\\n1. \\\"ext_authz_interface\\\"\\n   Type: Header-only library\\n   Exports: Client, RequestCallbacks, Response interfaces\\n\\n2. \\\"ext_authz_grpc_lib\\\"\\n   Type: Implementation library\\n   Exports: GrpcClientImpl class\\n\\n3. \\\"ext_authz_http_lib\\\"\\n   Type: Implementation library\\n   Exports: RawHttpClientImpl class\\n\\n4. \\\"check_request_utils_lib\\\"\\n   Type: Implementation library\\n   Exports: CheckRequestUtils static methods\\n\\n================================================================================\\nCONFIGURATION MESSAGE SCHEMA\\n================================================================================\\n\\nExtAuthz message fields (filter configuration):\\n  - grpc_service / http_service (mutually exclusive, oneof)\\n  - transport_api_version (enum: HTTP1, HTTP2, etc.)\\n  - failure_mode_allow (bool)\\n  - failure_mode_allow_header_add (bool)\\n  - with_request_body (BufferSettings)\\n    * max_request_bytes\\n    * allow_partial_message\\n    * pack_as_bytes\\n  - clear_route_cache (bool)\\n  - status_on_error (HttpStatus)\\n  - validate_mutations (bool)\\n  - metadata_context_namespaces (repeated string)\\n  - typed_metadata_context_namespaces (repeated string)\\n  - route_metadata_context_namespaces (repeated string)\\n  - encoder_header_mutation_rules (MutationRules)\\n  - decoder_header_mutation_rules (MutationRules)\\n  - filter_enabled (FractionalPercent)\\n  - filter_enabled_metadata (MetadataMatcher)\\n  - deny_at_disable (FeatureFlag)\\n  - emit_filter_state_stats (bool)\\n  - enable_dynamic_metadata_ingestion (bool)\\n  - charge_cluster_response_stats (bool)\\n  - filter_metadata (Struct)\\n\\nPer-route override (ExtAuthzPerRoute):\\n  - disabled (bool)\\n  - check_settings (CheckSettings)\\n    * context_extensions (map)\\n    * disable_request_body_buffering (bool)\\n    * with_request_body (BufferSettings)\\n\\n================================================================================\\nUSAGE PATTERNS\\n================================================================================\\n\\nTYPICAL CONFIGURATION (gRPC backend):\\n  name: envoy.filters.http.ext_authz\\n  typed_config:\\n    \\\"@type\\\": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.http.ext_authz.v3.ExtAuthz\\n    grpc_service:\\n      envoy_grpc:\\n        cluster_name: ext_authz_cluster\\n      timeout: 0.2s\\n\\nTYPICAL CONFIGURATION (HTTP backend):\\n  name: envoy.filters.http.ext_authz\\n  typed_config:\\n    \\\"@type\\\": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.http.ext_authz.v3.ExtAuthz\\n    http_service:\\n      server_uri:\\n        uri: http://authz.example.com\\n        cluster: authz_cluster\\n      path_prefix: /check\\n      timeout: 0.2s\\n      authorization_request:\\n        allowed_headers:\\n          patterns:\\n          - exact: authorization\\n          - exact: x-request-id\\n\\n================================================================================\\nSUMMARY STATISTICS\\n================================================================================\\n\\nSource Code Metrics:\\n  Main filter code:        ~1,100 LOC (ext_authz.h/cc)\\n  Factory code:            ~100 LOC (config.h/cc)\\n  Common interface:        ~180 LOC (ext_authz.h)\\n  gRPC implementation:     ~150 LOC (ext_authz_grpc_impl.h/cc)\\n  HTTP implementation:     ~300+ LOC (ext_authz_http_impl.h/cc)\\n  Check request utils:     ~500+ LOC (check_request_utils.h/cc)\\n  Total ext_authz code:    ~2,300+ LOC\\n\\nBuild Artifacts:\\n  Libraries exported:      4 (interface + grpc + http + utils)\\n  Extensions registered:   2 (HTTP + network filters)\\n  Protobuf types used:     8+ major types\\n  Stats counters:          8\\n\\nDependency Count:\\n  Direct deps (BUILD):     17\\n  Transitive deps:         50+\\n  Interfaces used:         15+\\n  Protobuf imports:        6\\n\\nSupported Backends:\\n  - gRPC services\\n  - HTTP services\\n  - Both async-only (no blocking)\\n\\nProcessing Modes:\\n  - Decode path: Always (request interception)\\n  - Encode path: Conditional (response headers)\\n  - Metadata: Optional (with_request_body flag)\\n\\nFilter Configuration:\\n  - Pluggable (via factory)\\n  - Per-route overridable\\n  - Runtime feature flags\\n  - Dynamic enable/disable\\n\\n================================================================================\\n\\nCONCLUSION\\n\\nThe ext_authz HTTP filter is a well-architected, modular component that:\\n\\n1. UPSTREAM: Depends cleanly on ~17 direct dependencies organized in layers\\n   - Interfaces, common libraries, filter-specific components, protobuf definitions\\n   \\n2. DOWNSTREAM: Is consumed only through formal registry mechanisms\\n   - No hard-coded dependencies from other code\\n   - Loaded dynamically via NamedHttpFilterConfigFactory\\n   - Common libraries reused by network variant\\n   \\n3. DESIGN QUALITY: Shows clear separation of concerns\\n   - Interface abstraction (Client, RequestCallbacks)\\n   - Multiple implementations (gRPC, HTTP)\\n   - Shared utilities (check_request_utils)\\n   - Factory pattern for instantiation\\n   \\n4. NO CIRCULAR DEPENDENCIES: Clean dependency graph from interfaces down to implementation\\n\\n5. EXTENSIBILITY: Supports multiple backends (gRPC/HTTP) without filter code changes\\n\\nThis design makes ext_authz maintainable, testable, and suitable for both\\nHTTP and network filter layers.\\n\\n================================================================================\\n\\nSUMMARY\\ncat /tmp/ext_authz_deps_report.txt\\necho \\\"\\\"\\necho \\\"See also:\\\"\\necho \\\"  - Dependency diagram in /tmp/ext_authz_dependency_diagram.txt\\\"\\necho \\\"  - Detailed breakdown in /tmp/ext_authz_detailed_deps.txt\\\"\\n\",\"description\":\"Create comprehensive final summary\"},\"caller\":{\"type\":\"direct\"}}],\"stop_reason\":null,\"stop_sequence\":null,\"usage\":{\"input_tokens\":3,\"cache_creation_input_tokens\":6897,\"cache_read_input_tokens\":53107,\"cache_creation\":{\"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens\":0,\"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens\":6897},\"output_tokens\":1,\"service_tier\":\"standard\",\"inference_geo\":\"not_available\"}},\"requestId\":\"req_011CYEqDmx1sD6D5TS8Zxk6U\",\"type\":\"assistant\",\"uuid\":\"014806ab-1387-4e0c-b237-754fc69c658e\",\"timestamp\":\"2026-02-18T03:34:47.761Z\"}\n{\"parentUuid\":\"014806ab-1387-4e0c-b237-754fc69c658e\",\"isSidechain\":true,\"userType\":\"external\",\"cwd\":\"/workspace\",\"sessionId\":\"6e5abf8f-0611-4d50-82c4-ab3bbf4bccd5\",\"version\":\"2.1.45\",\"gitBranch\":\"HEAD\",\"agentId\":\"a4ceb4b\",\"slug\":\"bright-moseying-sprout\",\"type\":\"user\",\"message\":{\"role\":\"user\",\"content\":[{\"tool_use_id\":\"toolu_012fbYcJQAHJz6XC1uaR8LZZ\",\"type\":\"tool_result\",\"content\":\"================================================================================\\nEXT_AUTHZ HTTP FILTER - COMPLETE DEPENDENCY MAPPING SUMMARY\\n================================================================================\\n\\nEXECUTIVE SUMMARY\\n=================\\n\\nThe ext_authz HTTP filter is an external authorization system that intercepts \\nHTTP requests, sends them to an external authorization service (via gRPC or HTTP),\\nand applies mutations to requests/responses based on the service's decision.\\n\\nIt is both a CONSUMER of many Envoy core libraries and a PROVIDER to the filter \\nchain system through registry-based instantiation.\\n\\nKEY STATISTICS:\\n- ~40KB of C++ code\\n- ~15 direct upstream dependencies (from BUILD file)\\n- Supports both gRPC and HTTP backends\\n- Shared libraries used by network filter variant\\n- Highly modular with clear separation of concerns\\n\\n================================================================================\\nABSOLUTE FILE PATHS AND LOCATIONS\\n================================================================================\\n\\nMAIN FILTER IMPLEMENTATION:\\n  /workspace/source/extensions/filters/http/ext_authz/BUILD\\n  /workspace/source/extensions/filters/http/ext_authz/ext_authz.h\\n  /workspace/source/extensions/filters/http/ext_authz/ext_authz.cc (41KB)\\n  /workspace/source/extensions/filters/http/ext_authz/config.h\\n  /workspace/source/extensions/filters/http/ext_authz/config.cc\\n\\nCOMMON LIBRARY (shared with network filter):\\n  /workspace/source/extensions/filters/common/ext_authz/BUILD\\n  /workspace/source/extensions/filters/common/ext_authz/ext_authz.h\\n  /workspace/source/extensions/filters/common/ext_authz/ext_authz_grpc_impl.h\\n  /workspace/source/extensions/filters/common/ext_authz/ext_authz_grpc_impl.cc\\n  /workspace/source/extensions/filters/common/ext_authz/ext_authz_http_impl.h\\n  /workspace/source/extensions/filters/common/ext_authz/ext_authz_http_impl.cc\\n  /workspace/source/extensions/filters/common/ext_authz/check_request_utils.h\\n  /workspace/source/extensions/filters/common/ext_authz/check_request_utils.cc\\n\\nPROTOBUF DEFINITIONS:\\n  /workspace/api/envoy/extensions/filters/http/ext_authz/v3/ext_authz.proto\\n  /workspace/api/envoy/extensions/filters/http/ext_authz/v3/BUILD\\n  /workspace/api/envoy/service/auth/v3/external_auth.proto\\n  /workspace/api/envoy/service/auth/v3/attribute_context.proto\\n\\nMUTATION RULES (dependency):\\n  /workspace/source/extensions/filters/common/mutation_rules/BUILD\\n  /workspace/source/extensions/filters/common/mutation_rules/mutation_rules.h\\n\\nFACTORY BASE (dependency):\\n  /workspace/source/extensions/filters/http/common/factory_base.h\\n  /workspace/source/extensions/filters/http/common/BUILD\\n\\nNETWORK VARIANT (downstream consumer):\\n  /workspace/source/extensions/filters/network/ext_authz/BUILD\\n  /workspace/source/extensions/filters/network/ext_authz/ext_authz.h\\n  /workspace/source/extensions/filters/network/ext_authz/ext_authz.cc\\n  /workspace/source/extensions/filters/network/ext_authz/config.h\\n  /workspace/source/extensions/filters/network/ext_authz/config.cc\\n\\nCONFIGURATION & REGISTRATION:\\n  /workspace/source/extensions/extensions_build_config.bzl\\n  /workspace/source/extensions/extensions_metadata.yaml\\n  /workspace/source/extensions/filters/http/well_known_names.h\\n\\nTESTS:\\n  /workspace/test/extensions/filters/http/ext_authz/BUILD\\n\\n================================================================================\\nUPSTREAM DEPENDENCY CATEGORIES (FROM BUILD FILE ANALYSIS)\\n================================================================================\\n\\n1. CORE ENVOY INTERFACES (from envoy/ directory):\\n   - envoy/http:codes_interface\\n   - envoy/stats:stats_macros\\n   - envoy/runtime:runtime_interface\\n   - envoy/upstream:cluster_manager_interface\\n   - envoy/registry:registry\\n   - envoy/grpc:async_client_interface\\n   - envoy/grpc:async_client_manager_interface\\n\\n2. COMMON INFRASTRUCTURE LIBRARIES:\\n   - source/common/buffer:buffer_lib\\n   - source/common/common:assert_lib\\n   - source/common/common:empty_string\\n   - source/common/common:enum_to_int\\n   - source/common/common:matchers_lib\\n   - source/common/common:minimal_logger_lib\\n   - source/common/http:codes_lib\\n   - source/common/http:utility_lib\\n   - source/common/http:headers_lib\\n   - source/common/router:config_lib\\n   - source/common/runtime:runtime_protos_lib\\n   - source/common/config:utility_lib\\n   - source/common/protobuf:utility_lib\\n   - source/common/grpc:async_client_lib\\n   - source/common/grpc:typed_async_client_lib\\n   - source/common/http:async_client_lib\\n   - source/common/tracing:http_tracer_lib\\n\\n3. FILTER-SPECIFIC LIBRARIES (ext_authz stack):\\n   - source/extensions/filters/common/ext_authz:ext_authz_interface\\n   - source/extensions/filters/common/ext_authz:ext_authz_grpc_lib\\n   - source/extensions/filters/common/ext_authz:ext_authz_http_lib\\n   - source/extensions/filters/common/ext_authz:check_request_utils_lib\\n   - source/extensions/filters/common/mutation_rules:mutation_rules_lib\\n\\n4. FILTER FACTORY SYSTEM:\\n   - source/extensions/filters/http/common:factory_base_lib\\n\\n5. PROTOBUF/API DEFINITIONS:\\n   - @envoy_api//envoy/config/core/v3:pkg_cc_proto\\n   - @envoy_api//envoy/extensions/filters/http/ext_authz/v3:pkg_cc_proto\\n   - @envoy_api//envoy/service/auth/v3:pkg_cc_proto\\n   - @envoy_api//envoy/config/common/mutation_rules/v3:pkg_cc_proto\\n   - @envoy_api//envoy/type/matcher/v3:pkg_cc_proto\\n   - @envoy_api//envoy/type/v3:pkg_cc_proto\\n\\n================================================================================\\nDOWNSTREAM CONSUMERS\\n================================================================================\\n\\n1. DIRECT FILTER CHAIN CONSUMERS:\\n   - HTTP filter chains that load ext_authz via:\\n     Factory name: \\\"envoy.filters.http.ext_authz\\\"\\n     Registry type: Server::Configuration::NamedHttpFilterConfigFactory\\n\\n2. SHARED LIBRARY CONSUMERS:\\n   - /workspace/source/extensions/filters/network/ext_authz/\\n     (Network layer variant, uses common libraries)\\n\\n3. CONFIGURATION SYSTEM:\\n   - /workspace/source/extensions/extensions_build_config.bzl\\n     (Registers ext_authz in filter registry)\\n   - /workspace/source/extensions/extensions_metadata.yaml\\n     (Documents filter capabilities and stability)\\n\\n4. POTENTIAL METADATA CONSUMERS:\\n   - Any filter that reads \\\"envoy.filters.http.ext_authz\\\" from dynamic metadata\\n   - Example: jwt_authn can have metadata passed through metadata_context_namespaces\\n\\n================================================================================\\nDEPENDENCY DEPTH ANALYSIS\\n================================================================================\\n\\nDIRECT DEPENDENCIES (first level):\\n  - 17 libraries from BUILD file deps array\\n\\nTRANSITIVE DEPENDENCIES (2+ levels deep):\\n  - HTTP layer: Http::HeaderMap, Http::RequestHeaderMap, etc.\\n  - gRPC layer: Grpc::AsyncClient, Grpc::RawAsyncClient, etc.\\n  - Protobuf layer: Multiple generated proto C++ files\\n  - Statistics: Stats::Scope, Stats::Counter, etc.\\n  - Logging: Logger implementation\\n  - Threading: Envoy's thread pool system\\n  - Runtime: Feature flag system\\n\\nTOTAL DEPENDENCY CHAIN:\\n  Estimated 50+ libraries transitively (through common/ and interface dependencies)\\n\\nKEY INTEGRATION POINTS:\\n  1. FilterChainFactoryCallbacks - for filter instantiation\\n  2. StreamDecoderFilterCallbacks - for request interception\\n  3. StreamEncoderFilterCallbacks - for response modification\\n  4. ClusterManager - for auth service cluster access\\n  5. Stats::Scope - for metrics collection\\n  6. Runtime::Loader - for feature flags\\n  7. Router routing table - for per-route config\\n\\n================================================================================\\nCIRCULAR DEPENDENCY ANALYSIS\\n================================================================================\\n\\nNO CIRCULAR DEPENDENCIES FOUND:\\n\\nThe design follows a clean hierarchy:\\n  \\n  Interfaces (envoy/*)\\n       \u2193\\n  Common Libraries (source/common/*)\\n       \u2193\\n  Filter-Specific Common (source/extensions/filters/common/ext_authz/)\\n       \u2193\\n  HTTP Filter (source/extensions/filters/http/ext_authz/)\\n       \u2193\\n  Filter Factory Registration (config factory)\\n\\nThe network variant is isolated and reuses the common layer independently.\\n\\n================================================================================\\nBUILD CONFIGURATION DETAILS\\n================================================================================\\n\\nHTTP Filter Libraries Defined in BUILD:\\n\\n1. \\\"ext_authz\\\" library\\n   Type: envoy_cc_library\\n   Purpose: Main filter implementation\\n   Visibility: Package-scoped\\n   Test target exists: yes\\n\\n2. \\\"config\\\" extension\\n   Type: envoy_cc_extension\\n   Purpose: Filter factory and registration\\n   Registration macro: LEGACY_REGISTER_FACTORY\\n   Registered as: \\\"envoy.ext_authz\\\" (legacy) and \\\"envoy.filters.http.ext_authz\\\"\\n\\nCommon Library Definitions in BUILD:\\n\\n1. \\\"ext_authz_interface\\\"\\n   Type: Header-only library\\n   Exports: Client, RequestCallbacks, Response interfaces\\n\\n2. \\\"ext_authz_grpc_lib\\\"\\n   Type: Implementation library\\n   Exports: GrpcClientImpl class\\n\\n3. \\\"ext_authz_http_lib\\\"\\n   Type: Implementation library\\n   Exports: RawHttpClientImpl class\\n\\n4. \\\"check_request_utils_lib\\\"\\n   Type: Implementation library\\n   Exports: CheckRequestUtils static methods\\n\\n================================================================================\\nCONFIGURATION MESSAGE SCHEMA\\n================================================================================\\n\\nExtAuthz message fields (filter configuration):\\n  - grpc_service / http_service (mutually exclusive, oneof)\\n  - transport_api_version (enum: HTTP1, HTTP2, etc.)\\n  - failure_mode_allow (bool)\\n  - failure_mode_allow_header_add (bool)\\n  - with_request_body (BufferSettings)\\n    * max_request_bytes\\n    * allow_partial_message\\n    * pack_as_bytes\\n  - clear_route_cache (bool)\\n  - status_on_error (HttpStatus)\\n  - validate_mutations (bool)\\n  - metadata_context_namespaces (repeated string)\\n  - typed_metadata_context_namespaces (repeated string)\\n  - route_metadata_context_namespaces (repeated string)\\n  - encoder_header_mutation_rules (MutationRules)\\n  - decoder_header_mutation_rules (MutationRules)\\n  - filter_enabled (FractionalPercent)\\n  - filter_enabled_metadata (MetadataMatcher)\\n  - deny_at_disable (FeatureFlag)\\n  - emit_filter_state_stats (bool)\\n  - enable_dynamic_metadata_ingestion (bool)\\n  - charge_cluster_response_stats (bool)\\n  - filter_metadata (Struct)\\n\\nPer-route override (ExtAuthzPerRoute):\\n  - disabled (bool)\\n  - check_settings (CheckSettings)\\n    * context_extensions (map)\\n    * disable_request_body_buffering (bool)\\n    * with_request_body (BufferSettings)\\n\\n================================================================================\\nUSAGE PATTERNS\\n================================================================================\\n\\nTYPICAL CONFIGURATION (gRPC backend):\\n  name: envoy.filters.http.ext_authz\\n  typed_config:\\n    \\\"@type\\\": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.http.ext_authz.v3.ExtAuthz\\n    grpc_service:\\n      envoy_grpc:\\n        cluster_name: ext_authz_cluster\\n      timeout: 0.2s\\n\\nTYPICAL CONFIGURATION (HTTP backend):\\n  name: envoy.filters.http.ext_authz\\n  typed_config:\\n    \\\"@type\\\": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.http.ext_authz.v3.ExtAuthz\\n    http_service:\\n      server_uri:\\n        uri: http://authz.example.com\\n        cluster: authz_cluster\\n      path_prefix: /check\\n      timeout: 0.2s\\n      authorization_request:\\n        allowed_headers:\\n          patterns:\\n          - exact: authorization\\n          - exact: x-request-id\\n\\n================================================================================\\nSUMMARY STATISTICS\\n================================================================================\\n\\nSource Code Metrics:\\n  Main filter code:        ~1,100 LOC (ext_authz.h/cc)\\n  Factory code:            ~100 LOC (config.h/cc)\\n  Common interface:        ~180 LOC (ext_authz.h)\\n  gRPC implementation:     ~150 LOC (ext_authz_grpc_impl.h/cc)\\n  HTTP implementation:     ~300+ LOC (ext_authz_http_impl.h/cc)\\n  Check request utils:     ~500+ LOC (check_request_utils.h/cc)\\n  Total ext_authz code:    ~2,300+ LOC\\n\\nBuild Artifacts:\\n  Libraries exported:      4 (interface + grpc + http + utils)\\n  Extensions registered:   2 (HTTP + network filters)\\n  Protobuf types used:     8+ major types\\n  Stats counters:          8\\n\\nDependency Count:\\n  Direct deps (BUILD):     17\\n  Transitive deps:         50+\\n  Interfaces used:         15+\\n  Protobuf imports:        6\\n\\nSupported Backends:\\n  - gRPC services\\n  - HTTP services\\n  - Both async-only (no blocking)\\n\\nProcessing Modes:\\n  - Decode path: Always (request interception)\\n  - Encode path: Conditional (response headers)\\n  - Metadata: Optional (with_request_body flag)\\n\\nFilter Configuration:\\n  - Pluggable (via factory)\\n  - Per-route overridable\\n  - Runtime feature flags\\n  - Dynamic enable/disable\\n\\n================================================================================\\n\\nCONCLUSION\\n\\nThe ext_authz HTTP filter is a well-architected, modular component that:\\n\\n1. UPSTREAM: Depends cleanly on ~17 direct dependencies organized in layers\\n   - Interfaces, common libraries, filter-specific components, protobuf definitions\\n   \\n2. DOWNSTREAM: Is consumed only through formal registry mechanisms\\n   - No hard-coded dependencies from other code\\n   - Loaded dynamically via NamedHttpFilterConfigFactory\\n   - Common libraries reused by network variant\\n   \\n3. DESIGN QUALITY: Shows clear separation of concerns\\n   - Interface abstraction (Client, RequestCallbacks)\\n   - Multiple implementations (gRPC, HTTP)\\n   - Shared utilities (check_request_utils)\\n   - Factory pattern for instantiation\\n   \\n4. NO CIRCULAR DEPENDENCIES: Clean dependency graph from interfaces down to implementation\\n\\n5. EXTENSIBILITY: Supports multiple backends (gRPC/HTTP) without filter code changes\\n\\nThis design makes ext_authz maintainable, testable, and suitable for both\\nHTTP and network filter layers.\\n\\n================================================================================\\n\\nEXT_AUTHZ HTTP FILTER DEPENDENCY MAPPING\\n==========================================\\n\\nKEY FILE LOCATIONS:\\n- Main filter: /workspace/source/extensions/filters/http/ext_authz/\\n  - ext_authz.h (Filter implementation)\\n  - ext_authz.cc (Filter logic)\\n  - config.h (Factory configuration)\\n  - config.cc (Factory implementation)\\n  - BUILD (Bazel build configuration)\\n\\n- Common ext_authz library: /workspace/source/extensions/filters/common/ext_authz/\\n  - ext_authz.h (Interface definitions)\\n  - ext_authz_grpc_impl.h/cc (gRPC client)\\n  - ext_authz_http_impl.h/cc (HTTP client)\\n  - check_request_utils.h/cc (Request building utilities)\\n\\n- API definitions: /workspace/api/envoy/extensions/filters/http/ext_authz/v3/\\n  - ext_authz.proto (Configuration message)\\n\\n- Auth service: /workspace/api/envoy/service/auth/v3/\\n  - external_auth.proto (Check/Response messages)\\n  - attribute_context.proto (Request context)\\n\\nUPSTREAM DEPENDENCIES (What ext_authz depends on)\\n==================================================\\n\\n1. ENVOY INTERFACE LIBRARIES:\\n   - envoy/http:codes_interface - HTTP status codes\\n   - envoy/stats:stats_macros - Stats/telemetry macros\\n   - envoy/runtime:runtime_interface - Runtime feature flags\\n   - envoy/upstream:cluster_manager_interface - Cluster management\\n   - envoy/registry:registry - Extension registry\\n   - envoy/grpc:async_client_interface - gRPC async client interface\\n   - envoy/grpc:async_client_manager_interface - gRPC client management\\n\\n2. COMMON LIBRARIES:\\n   - source/common/buffer:buffer_lib - Buffer management\\n   - source/common/common:assert_lib - Assertions\\n   - source/common/common:empty_string - String utilities\\n   - source/common/common:enum_to_int - Enum conversion\\n   - source/common/common:matchers_lib - Matchers (header matching)\\n   - source/common/common:minimal_logger_lib - Logging\\n   - source/common/http:codes_lib - HTTP codes\\n   - source/common/http:utility_lib - HTTP utilities\\n   - source/common/http:headers_lib - HTTP headers handling\\n   - source/common/router:config_lib - Router configuration\\n   - source/common/runtime:runtime_protos_lib - Runtime protobuf utilities\\n   - source/common/config:utility_lib - Configuration utilities\\n   - source/common/protobuf:utility_lib - Protobuf utilities\\n   - source/common/grpc:async_client_lib - gRPC async client implementation\\n   - source/common/grpc:typed_async_client_lib - Typed gRPC async client\\n   - source/common/http:async_client_lib - HTTP async client\\n   - source/common/tracing:http_tracer_lib - Tracing/span support\\n\\n3. FILTER COMPONENTS:\\n   - source/extensions/filters/common/ext_authz:ext_authz_grpc_lib\\n     * Provides gRPC client implementation for checking with auth service\\n   - source/extensions/filters/common/ext_authz:ext_authz_http_lib\\n     * Provides HTTP client implementation for checking with auth service\\n   - source/extensions/filters/common/ext_authz:ext_authz_interface\\n     * Provides Client interface and Response types\\n   - source/extensions/filters/common/ext_authz:check_request_utils_lib\\n     * Utilities for building CheckRequest from HTTP/network info\\n   - source/extensions/filters/common/mutation_rules:mutation_rules_lib\\n     * Validates header mutations from auth service responses\\n\\n4. FACTORY DEPENDENCIES:\\n   - source/extensions/filters/http/common:factory_base_lib\\n     * Base class for HTTP filter factory registration\\n\\n5. PROTOBUF/API DEFINITIONS:\\n   - @envoy_api//envoy/config/core/v3:pkg_cc_proto\\n     * Core configuration (GrpcService, HttpUri, etc.)\\n   - @envoy_api//envoy/extensions/filters/http/ext_authz/v3:pkg_cc_proto\\n     * ext_authz filter configuration (ExtAuthz, ExtAuthzPerRoute, CheckSettings)\\n   - @envoy_api//envoy/service/auth/v3:pkg_cc_proto\\n     * Authorization service (CheckRequest, CheckResponse, AttributeContext)\\n   - @envoy_api//envoy/config/common/mutation_rules/v3:pkg_cc_proto\\n     * Mutation rules configuration\\n   - @envoy_api//envoy/type/matcher/v3:pkg_cc_proto\\n     * String matchers for header filtering\\n   - @envoy_api//envoy/type/v3:pkg_cc_proto\\n     * HTTP status types\\n\\nDOWNSTREAM DEPENDENCIES (What depends on ext_authz)\\n====================================================\\n\\n1. NETWORK EXT_AUTHZ FILTER:\\n   - source/extensions/filters/network/ext_authz/\\n   - Uses the common ext_authz interface (ext_authz_interface, ext_authz_grpc_lib)\\n   - Shares check_request_utils for building CheckRequest from network data\\n   - Network filter version of the same external authorization service\\n\\n2. FILTER CHAIN LOADING:\\n   - Extensions registry loads ext_authz via:\\n     * Factory name: \\\"envoy.filters.http.ext_authz\\\"\\n     * Registered via: LEGACY_REGISTER_FACTORY macro in config.cc\\n   - Used in: source/extensions/extensions_build_config.bzl\\n     * Maps \\\"envoy.filters.http.ext_authz\\\" -> \\\"//source/extensions/filters/http/ext_authz:config\\\"\\n\\n3. CONFIGURATION SYSTEM:\\n   - Registered as: Server::Configuration::NamedHttpFilterConfigFactory\\n   - Configuration type: envoy::extensions::filters::http::ext_authz::v3::ExtAuthz\\n   - Per-route type: envoy::extensions::filters::http::ext_authz::v3::ExtAuthzPerRoute\\n\\n4. COMMON LIBRARY CONSUMERS:\\n   - The common library components (ext_authz_interface, ext_authz_grpc_lib, etc.)\\n     can be used by other filters or components that need:\\n     * Generic external authorization checking\\n     * gRPC communication with auth services\\n     * HTTP communication with auth services\\n     * CheckRequest building utilities\\n\\n5. METADATA INGESTION:\\n   - ext_authz can ingest metadata from other filters like jwt_authn\\n   - Configured via metadata_context_namespaces\\n   - Dynamic metadata is stored under \\\"envoy.filters.http.ext_authz\\\" namespace\\n\\nFILTER INTERFACE IMPLEMENTATION:\\n================================\\n\\nThe ext_authz HTTP filter implements:\\n- Http::StreamFilter interface (decoder and encoder paths)\\n- Filters::Common::ExtAuthz::RequestCallbacks (async response handling)\\n- Logger::Loggable<Logger::Id::ext_authz> (logging)\\n\\nIt performs:\\n1. Decoding phase: Intercepts request, calls external auth service\\n2. Encoding phase: May add response headers based on auth result\\n3. State management: Tracks calling/complete states for async operations\\n\\nSTATISTICS GENERATED:\\n====================\\n- ext_authz.ok - Successful auth checks\\n- ext_authz.denied - Denied requests\\n- ext_authz.error - Check errors\\n- ext_authz.disabled - Filter was disabled\\n- ext_authz.failure_mode_allowed - Passed due to failure mode\\n- ext_authz.invalid - Invalid auth responses\\n- ext_authz.ignored_dynamic_metadata - Ignored metadata\\n- ext_authz.filter_state_name_collision - Filter state collisions\\n\\n\\nSee also:\\n  - Dependency diagram in /tmp/ext_authz_dependency_diagram.txt\\n  - Detailed breakdown in /tmp/ext_authz_detailed_deps.txt\",\"is_error\":false}]},\"uuid\":\"3982920d-8499-4f7c-a2be-90afa1db5812\",\"timestamp\":\"2026-02-18T03:34:47.931Z\",\"sourceToolAssistantUUID\":\"014806ab-1387-4e0c-b237-754fc69c658e\"}\n",

    "task_type": "local_agent"
  }

Search for logging in ext_authz:\\n   - ENVOY_LOG statements\\n   - Debug vs warning vs error level logs\\n   - What information is logged on failures\\n\\n4. 32\u2192namespace ExtAuthz {\\n    33\u2192\\n    34\u2192/**\\n    35\u2192 * All stats for the Ext Authz filter. @see stats_macros.h\\n    36\u2192 */\\n    37\u2192\\n    38\u2192#define ALL_EXT_AUTHZ_FILTER_STATS(COUNTER)                                                        \\\\\\n    39\u2192  COUNTER(ok)                                                                                      \\\\\\n    40\u2192  COUNTER(denied)                                                                                  \\\\\\n    41\u2192  COUNTER(error) COUNTER(failure_mode_allowed)                                                                    \\\\\\n    44\u2192  COUNTER(invalid) 47\u2192\\n    48\u2192/**\\n    49\u2192 * Wrapper struct for ext_authz filter stats. @see stats_macros.h\\n    50\u2192 */\\n    51\u2192struct ExtAuthzFilterStats {\\n    52\u2192  ALL_EXT_AUTHZ_FILTER_STATS(GENERATE_COUNTER_STRUCT)\\n    53\u2192};\\n    54\u2192\\n    55\u2192class ExtAuthzLoggingInfo : public Envoy::StreamInfo::FilterState::Object {\\n    56\u2192public:\\n    57\u2192  explicit ExtAuthzLoggingInfo(const absl::optional<Envoy::ProtobufWkt::Struct> filter_metadata)\\n    58\u2192      : filter_metadata_(filter_metadata) {}\\n    59\u2192\\n    60\u2192  const absl::optional<ProtobufWkt::Struct>& filterMetadata() const { return filter_metadata_; }\\n    61\u2192  absl::optional<std::chrono::microseconds> latency() const { return latency_; };\\n    62\u2192  absl::optional<uint64_t> bytesSent() const { return bytes_sent_; }\\n    63\u2192  absl::optional<uint64_t> bytesReceived() const { return bytes_received_; }\\n    64\u2192  Upstream::ClusterInfoConstSharedPtr clusterInfo() const { return cluster_info_; }\\n    65\u2192  Upstream::HostDescriptionConstSharedPtr upstreamHost() const { return upstream_host_; }\\n    66\u2192\\n    67\u2192  void setLatency(std::chrono::microseconds ms) { latency_ = ms; };\\n    68\u2192  void setBytesSent(uint64_t bytes_sent) { bytes_sent_ = bytes_sent; }\\n    69\u2192  void setBytesReceived(uint64_t bytes_received) { bytes_received_ = bytes_received; }\\n    70\u2192  void setClusterInfo(Upstream::ClusterInfoConstSharedPtr cluster_info) {\\n    71\u2192    cluster_info_ = std::move(cluster_info);\\n    72\u2192  }\\n    73\u2192  void setUpstreamHost(Upstream::HostDescriptionConstSharedPtr upstream_host) {\\n    74\u2192    upstream_host_ = std::move(upstream_host);\\n    75\u2192  }\\n    76\u2192\\n    77\u2192  // For convenience in testing.\\n    78\u2192  void clearLatency() { latency_ = absl::nullopt; };\\n    79\u2192  void clearBytesSent() { bytes_sent_ = absl::nullopt; }\\n    80\u2192  void clearBytesReceived() { bytes_received_ = absl::nullopt; }\\n    81\u2192  void clearClusterInfo() { cluster_info_ = nullptr; }\\n    82\u2192  void clearUpstreamHost() { upstream_host_ = nullptr; }\\n    83\u2192\\n    84\u2192private:\\n    85\u2192  const absl::optional<Envoy::ProtobufWkt::Struct> filter_metadata_;\\n    86\u2192  absl::optional<std::chrono::microseconds> latency_;\\n    87\u2192  // The following stats are populated for ext_authz filters using Envoy gRPC only.\\n    88\u2192  absl::optional<uint64_t> bytes_sent_;\\n    89\u2192  absl::optional<uint64_t> bytes_received_;\\n    90\u2192  Upstream::ClusterInfoConstSharedPtr cluster_info_;\\n    91\u2192  Upstream::HostDescriptionConstSharedPtr upstream_host_;\\n    92\u2192};\\n    93\u2192\\n    94\u2192/**\\n    95\u2192 * Configuration for the External Authorization (ext_authz) filter.\\n    96\u2192 */\\n    97\u2192class FilterConfig {\\n    98\u2192  using LabelsMap = Protobuf::Map<std::string, std::string>;\\n    99\u2192\\n   100\u2192public:\\n   101\u2192  FilterConfig(const envoy::extensions::filters::http::ext_authz::v3::ExtAuthz& config,\\n   102\u2192               Stats::Scope& scope, const std::string& stats_prefix,\\n   103\u2192               Server::Configuration::ServerFactoryContext& factory_context);\\n   104\u2192\\n   105\u2192  bool allowPartialMessage() const { return allow_partial_message_; }\\n   106\u2192\\n   107\u2192  bool withRequestBody() const { return max_request_bytes_ > 0; }\\n   108\u2192\\n   109\u2192  bool failureModeAllow() const { return failure_mode_allow_; }\\n   110\u2192\\n   111\u2192  bool failureModeAllowHeaderAdd() const { return failure_mode_allow_header_add_; }\\n   112\u2192\\n   113\u2192  bool clearRouteCache() const { return clear_route_cache_; }\\n   114\u2192\\n   115\u2192  uint32_t maxRequestBytes() const { return max_request_bytes_; }\\n   116\u2192\\n   117\u2192  bool packAsBytes() const { return pack_as_bytes_; }\\n   118\u2192\\n   119\u2192  bool headersAsBytes() const { return encode_raw_headers_; }\\n   120\u2192\\n   121\u2192  Filters::Common::MutationRules::CheckResult\\n   122\u2192  checkDecoderHeaderMutation(const Filters::Common::MutationRules::CheckOperation& operation,\\n   123\u2192                             const Http::LowerCaseString& key, absl::string_view value) const {\\n   124\u2192    if (!decoder_header_mutation_checker_.has_value()) {\\n   125\u2192      return Filters::Common::MutationRules::CheckResult::OK;\\n   126\u2192    }\\n   127\u2192    return decoder_header_mutation_checker_->check(operation, key, value);\\n   128\u2192  }\\n   129\u2192\\n   130\u2192  // Used for headers_to_remove to avoid a redundant pseudo header check.\\n   131\u2192  bool hasDecoderHeaderMutationRules() const {\\n   132\u2192    return decoder_header_mutation_checker_.has_value();\\n   133\u2192  }\\n   134\u2192\\n   135\u2192  bool enableDynamicMetadataIngestion() const { return enable_dynamic_metadata_ingestion_; }\\n   136\u2192\\n   137\u2192  Http::Code statusOnError() const { return status_on_error_; }\\n   138\u2192\\n   139\u2192  bool validateMutations() const { return validate_mutations_; }\\n   140\u2192\\n   141\u2192  bool filterEnabled(const envoy::config::core::v3::Metadata& metadata) {\\n   142\u2192    const bool enabled = filter_enabled_.has_value() ? filter_enabled_->enabled() : true;\\n   143\u2192    const bool enabled_metadata =\\n   144\u2192        filter_enabled_metadata_.has_value() ? filter_enabled_metadata_->match(metadata) : true;\\n   145\u2192    return enabled && enabled_metadata;\\n   146\u2192  }\\n   147\u2192\\n   148\u2192  bool denyAtDisable() {\\n   149\u2192    return deny_at_disable_.has_value() ? deny_at_disable_->enabled() : false;\\n   150\u2192  }\\n   151\u2192\\n   152\u2192  Stats::Scope& scope() { return scope_; }\\n   153\u2192\\n   154\u2192  Http::Context& httpContext() { return http_context_; }\\n   155\u2192\\n   156\u2192  const std::vector<std::string>& metadataContextNamespaces() {\\n   157\u2192    return metadata_context_namespaces_;\\n   158\u2192  }\\n   159\u2192\\n   160\u2192  const std::vector<std::string>& typedMetadataContextNamespaces() {\\n   161\u2192    return typed_metadata_context_namespaces_;\\n   162\u2192  }\\n   163\u2192\\n   164\u2192  const std::vector<std::string>& routeMetadataContextNamespaces() {\\n   165\u2192    return route_metadata_context_namespaces_;\\n   166\u2192  }\\n   167\u2192\\n   168\u2192  const std::vector<std::string>& routeTypedMetadataContextNamespaces() {\\n   169\u2192    return route_typed_metadata_context_namespaces_;\\n   170\u2192  }\\n   171\u2192\\n   172\u2192  const ExtAuthzFilterStats& stats() const { return stats_; }\\n   173\u2192\\n   174\u2192  void incCounter(Stats::Scope& scope, Stats::StatName name) {\\n   175\u2192    scope.counterFromStatName(name).inc();\\n   176\u2192  }\\n   177\u2192\\n   178\u2192  bool includePeerCertificate() const { return include_peer_certificate_; }\\n   179\u2192  bool includeTLSSession() const { return include_tls_session_; }\\n   180\u2192  const LabelsMap& destinationLabels() const { return destination_labels_; }\\n   181\u2192\\n   182\u2192  const absl::optional<ProtobufWkt::Struct>& filterMetadata() const { return filter_metadata_; }\\n   183\u2192\\n   184\u2192  bool Filters::Common::ExtAuthz::MatcherSharedPtr& disallowedHeadersMatcher() const {\\n   193\u2192    return disallowed_headers_matcher_;\\n   194\u2192  }\\n   195\u2192\\n   196\u2192private:\\n   197\u2192  static Http::Code toErrorCode(uint64_t status) {\\n   198\u2192    const auto code = static_cast<Http::Code>(status);\\n   199\u2192    if (code >= Http::Code::Continue && code <= Http::Code::NetworkAuthenticationRequired) {\\n   200\u2192      return code;\\n   201\u2192    }\\n   202\u2192    return Http::Code::Forbidden;\\n   203\u2192  }\\n   204\u2192\\n   205\u2192 std::string final_prefix = absl::StrCat(prefix, \\\"ext_authz.\\\", filter_stats_prefix);\\n   208\u2192    return {ALL_EXT_AUTHZ_FILTER_STATS(POOL_COUNTER_PREFIX(scope, final_prefix))};\\n   209\u2192  }\\n   210\u2192\\n   211\u2192  // This generates ext_authz.<optional filter_stats_prefix>.name, for example: ext_authz.waf.ok\\n   212\u2192  // when filter_stats_prefix is \\\"waf\\\", and ext_authz.ok when filter_stats_prefix is empty.\\n   213\u2192  const std::string createPoolStatName(const std::string& filter_stats_prefix,\\n   214\u2192                                       const std::string& name) {\\n   215\u2192    return absl::StrCat(\\\"ext_authz\\\",\\n   216\u2192                        filter_stats_prefix.empty() ? EMPTY_STRING\\n   217\u2192                                                    : absl::StrCat(\\\".\\\", filter_stats_prefix),\\n   218\u2192                        \\\".\\\", name);\\n   219\u2192 pool_;\\n   245\u2192\\n   246\u2192  const std::vector<std::string> metadata_context_namespaces_;\\n   247\u2192  const std::vector<std::string> typed_metadata_context_namespaces_;\\n   248\u2192 (ExtAuthzFilterStats stats_).\\n   264\u2192  const Stats::StatName ext_authz_ok_;\\n   265\u2192  const Stats::StatName ext_authz_denied_;\\n   266\u2192  const Stats::StatName ext_authz_error_;\\n   267\u2192  const Stats::StatName ext_authz_invalid_;\\n   268\u2192  const Stats::StatName ext_authz_failure_mode_allowed_;\\n   269\u2192};\\n   270\u2192\\n   271\u2192using FilterConfigSharedPtr = std::shared_ptr<FilterConfig>;\\n   272\u2192\\n   273\u2192/**\\n   274\u2192 * Per route settings for ExtAuth. Allows customizing the CheckRequest on a\\n   275\u2192 * virtualhost\\\\route\\\\weighted cluster level.\\n   276\u2192 */\\n   277\u2192class FilterConfigPerRoute : public Router::RouteSpecificFilterConfig {\\n   278\u2192public:\\n   279\u2192  using ContextExtensionsMap = Protobuf::Map<std::string, std::string>;\\n   280\u2192\\n   281\u2192  FilterConfigPerRoute(\\n   282\u2192      const envoy::extensions::filters::http::ext_authz::v3::ExtAuthzPerRoute& config)\\n   283\u2192      : context_extensions_(config.has_check_settings()\\n   284\u2192                                ? config.check_settings().context_extensions()\\n   285\u2192                                : ContextExtensionsMap()),\\n   286\u2192        check_settings_(config.has_check_settings()\\n   287\u2192                            ? config.check_settings()\\n   288\u2192                            : envoy::extensions::filters::http::ext_authz::v3::CheckSettings()),\\n   289\u2192        disabled_(config.disabled()) {\\n   290\u2192    if (config.has_check_settings() && config.check_settings().disable_request_body_buffering() &&\\n   291\u2192        config.check_settings().has_with_request_body()) {\\n   292\u2192      ExceptionUtil::throwEnvoyException(\\n   293\u2192          \\\"Invalid configuration for check_settings. Only one of disable_request_body_buffering or \\\"\\n   294\u2192          \\\"with_request_body can be set.\\\");\\n   295\u2192    }\\n   296\u2192  }\\n   297\u2192\\n   298\u2192  void merge(const FilterConfigPerRoute& other);\\n   299\u2192\\n   300\u2192  /**\\n   301\u2192   * @return Context extensions to add to the CheckRequest.\\n   302\u2192   */\\n   303\u2192  const ContextExtensionsMap& contextExtensions() const { return context_extensions_; }\\n   304\u2192  // Allow moving the context extensions out of this object.\\n   305\u2192  ContextExtensionsMap&& takeContextExtensions() { return std::move(context_extensions_); }\\n   306\u2192\\n   307\u2192  bool disabled() const { return disabled_; }\\n   308\u2192\\n   309\u2192  envoy::extensions::filters::http::ext_authz::v3::CheckSettings checkSettings() const {\\n   310\u2192    return check_settings_;\\n   311\u2192  }\\n   312\u2192\\n   313\u2192private:\\n   314\u2192  // We save the context extensions as a protobuf map instead of a std::map as this allows us to\\n   315\u2192  // move it to the CheckRequest, thus avoiding a copy that would incur by converting it.\\n   316\u2192  ContextExtensionsMap context_extensions_;\\n   317\u2192  envoy::extensions::filters::http::ext_authz::v3::CheckSettings check_settings_;\\n   318\u2192  bool disabled_;\\n   319\u2192};\\n   320\u2192\\n   321\u2192/**\\n   322\u2192 * HTTP ext_authz filter. Depending on the route configuration, this filter calls the global\\n   323\u2192 * ext_authz service before allowing further filter iteration.\\n   324\u2192 */\\n   325\u2192class Filter : public Logger::Loggable<Logger::Id::ext_authz>,\\n   326\u2192               public Http::StreamFilter,\\n   327\u2192               public Filters::Common::ExtAuthz::RequestCallbacks {\\n   328\u2192public:\\n   329\u2192  Filter(const FilterConfigSharedPtr& config, Filters::Common::ExtAuthz::ClientPtr&& client)\\n   330\u2192      : config_(config), client_(std::move(client)), stats_(config->stats()) {}\\n   331\u2192\\n   332\u2192  // Http::StreamFilterBase\\n   333\u2192  void onDestroy() override;\\n   334\u2192\\n   335\u2192  // Http::StreamDecoderFilter\\n   336\u2192  Http::FilterHeadersStatus decodeHeaders(Http::RequestHeaderMap& headers,\\n   337\u2192                                          bool end_stream) override;\\n   338\u2192  Http::FilterDataStatus decodeData(Buffer::Instance& data, bool end_stream) override;\\n   339\u2192  Http::FilterTrailersStatus decodeTrailers(Http::RequestTrailerMap& trailers) override;\\n   340\u2192  void setDecoderFilterCallbacks(Http::StreamDecoderFilterCallbacks& callbacks) override;\\n   341\u2192\\n   342\u2192  // Http::StreamEncoderFilter\\n   343\u2192  Http::Filter1xxHeadersStatus encode1xxHeaders(Http::ResponseHeaderMap& headers) override;\\n   344\u2192  Http::FilterHeadersStatus encodeHeaders(Http::ResponseHeaderMap& headers,\\n   345\u2192                                          bool end_stream) override;\\n   346\u2192  Http::FilterDataStatus encodeData(Buffer::Instance& data, bool end_stream) override;\\n   347\u2192  Http::FilterTrailersStatus encodeTrailers(Http::ResponseTrailerMap& trailers) override;\\n   348\u2192  Http::FilterMetadataStatus encodeMetadata(Http::MetadataMap& trailers) override;\\n   349\u2192  void setEncoderFilterCallbacks(Http::StreamEncoderFilterCallbacks& callbacks) override;\\n   350\u2192\\n   351\u2192  // ExtAuthz::RequestCallbacks\\n   352\u2192  void onComplete(Filters::Common::ExtAuthz::ResponsePtr&&) override;\\n   353\u2192\\n   354\u2192private:\\n   355\u2192  // Convenience function for the following:\\n   356\u2192  // 1. If `validate_mutations` is set to true, validate header key and value.\\n   357\u2192  // 2. If `decoder_header_mutation_rules` is set, check that mutation is allowed.\\n   358\u2192  Filters::Common::MutationRules::CheckResult\\n   359\u2192  validateAndCheckDecoderHeaderMutation(Filters::Common::MutationRules::CheckOperation operation,\\n   360\u2192                                        absl::string_view key, absl::string_view value) const;\\n   361\u2192\\n   362\u2192  // Called when the filter is configured to reject invalid responses & the authz response contains\\n   363\u2192  // invalid header or query parameters. Sends a local response with the configured rejection status\\n   364\u2192  // code.\\n   365\u2192  void rejectResponse();\\n   366\u2192\\n   367\u2192  absl::optional<MonotonicTime> start_time_;\\n   368\u2192  void addResponseHeaders(Http::HeaderMap& header_map, const Http::HeaderVector& headers);\\n   369\u2192  void initiateCall(const Http::RequestHeaderMap& headers);\\n   370\u2192  void continueDecoding();\\n   371\u2192  bool isBufferFull(uint64_t num_bytes_processing) const;\\n   372\u2192  void updateLoggingInfo();\\n   373\u2192\\n   374\u2192  // This holds a set of flags defined in per-route configuration.\\n   375\u2192  struct PerRouteFlags {\\n   376\u2192    const bool skip_check_;\\n   377\u2192    const envoy::extensions::filters::http::ext_authz::v3::CheckSettings check_settings_;\\n   378\u2192  };\\n   379\u2192  PerRouteFlags getPerRouteFlags(const Router::RouteConstSharedPtr& route) const;\\n   380\u2192\\n   381\u2192  // State of this filter's communication with the external authorization service.\\n   382\u2192  // The filter has either not started calling the external service, in the middle of calling\\n   383\u2192  // it or has completed.\\n   384\u2192  enum class State { NotStarted, Calling, Complete };\\n   385\u2192\\n   386\u2192  // FilterReturn is used to capture what the return code should be to the filter chain.\\n   387\u2192  // if this filter is either in the middle of calling the service or the result is denied then\\n   388\u2192  // the filter chain should stop. Otherwise, the filter chain can continue to the next filter.\\n   389\u2192  enum class FilterReturn { ContinueDecoding, StopDecoding };\\n   390\u2192\\n   391\u2192  Http::HeaderMapPtr getHeaderMap(const Filters::Common::ExtAuthz::ResponsePtr& response);\\n   392\u2192  FilterConfigSharedPtr config_;\\n   393\u2192  Filters::Common::ExtAuthz::ClientPtr client_;\\n   394\u2192  Http::StreamDecoderFilterCallbacks* decoder_callbacks_{};\\n   395\u2192  Http::StreamEncoderFilterCallbacks* encoder_callbacks_{};\\n   396\u2192  Http::RequestHeaderMap* request_headers_;\\n   397\u2192  Http::HeaderVector response_headers_to_add_{};\\n   398\u2192  Http::HeaderVector response_headers_to_set_{};\\n   399\u2192  Http::HeaderVector response_headers_to_add_if_absent_{};\\n   400\u2192  Http::HeaderVector response_headers_to_overwrite_if_exists_{};\\n   401\u2192  State state_{State::NotStarted};\\n   402\u2192  FilterReturn filter_return_{FilterReturn::ContinueDecoding};\\n   403\u2192  Upstream::ClusterInfoConstSharedPtr cluster_;\\n   404\u2192  // The stats for the filter.\\n   405\u2192  ExtAuthzFilterStats stats_;\\n   406\u2192  ExtAuthzLoggingInfo* logging_info_{nullptr};\\n   407\u2192\\n   408\u2192  // This is used to hold the final configs after we merge them with per-route configs.\\n   409\u2192  bool allow_partial_message_{};\\n   410\u2192  uint32_t max_request_bytes_{};\\n   411\u2192\\n   412\u2192  // Used to identify if the callback to onComplete() is synchronous (on the stack) or asynchronous.\\n   413\u2192  bool initiating_call_{};\\n   414\u2192  bool buffer_data_{};\\n   415\u2192  bool skip_check_{false};\\n   416\u2192  envoy::service::auth::v3::CheckRequest check_request_{};\\n   417\u2192};\\n   418\u2192\\n   419\u2192} // namespace ExtAuthz\\n   420\u2192} // namespace HttpFilters\\n   421\u2192} // namespace Extensions\\n   422\u2192} // namespace \\\"source/common/http/utility.h\\\"\\n    15\u2192#include \\\"source/common/router/config_impl.h\\\"\\n    16\u2192\\n    17\u2192namespace Envoy {\\n    18\u2192namespace Extensions {\\n
